example_en: Bah Aman tried to cut down the bamboo but the bamboo did not fall because the machete was blunt.
example_ms: Bah Aman menebang buluh tetapi buluh tersebut tidak tumbang kerana parangnya tumpul.

definition_ms: pinang; buah pinang; sejenis buah yang boleh di makan bersama dengan helaian daun sirih dan dicampur dengan kapur
example_semai: Ku jap kali kenduri caknak mai hik, mesti mong bijamu beleg ru sireh juga.
example_en: At every Semai feast, areca nut and betel leaves are sure to be served as well.
example_ms: Pada setiap kenduri orang Semai, pasti ada dijamu pinang dan sirih juga.

definition_ms: kedatangan yang tidak dijangka dan secara mengejut.
example_semai: Mase Wak Mila ru Wak Mas tengah ubai kayoh meskar, aleh-aleh belej tijik entoi ju belak semak.
example_en: While Wak Mila and Wak Mas were cycling, a large snake suddenly appeared from the underbrush.
example_ms: Semasa Wak Mila dan Wak Mas sedang mengayuh basikal, tiba-tiba muncul seekor ular besar dari semak.

definition_en: damaged due to exposure to natural elements such as air, water, sun, etc.
definition_ms: masuk angin; sesuatu benda menjadi rosak kerana terdedah kepada elemen alam seperti udara, air, matahari, dll.
example_semai: "Mercon adeh ya pek peladoh, enggamak ya belengas," Bah Wan kiurok nu Bah Ban.
example_en: "This firecracker did not explode possibly because it was already damaged," Bah Wan told Bah Ban.
example_ms: "Mercun ini tidak meletup mungkin kerana sudah masuk angin," Bah Wan berkata kepada Bah Ban.

definition_en: tasteless; brackish; having no flavour (concerning food or beverages)
definition_ms: tawar; payau; tidak mempunyai rasa (berkenaan dengan makanan atau minuman) manis atau masin; kurang manis atau kurang masin
example_semai: "Gulei rebog adeh beleu, tambah nij iempoj," Wak Lili kiurok nu ikenon menaleh.
example_en: "This bamboo shoot dish is bland, add more salt," Wak Lili said to her daughter.
example_ms: "Gulai rebong ini tawar, tambah lagi garam," Wak Lili berkata kepada anak gadisnya.

example_semai: "Bernor mat mai biyeg ajeh, hineng belhoi," Wak Sara kipasal nu imenang.
example_en: "That white man's eyes are beautiful, They look blue," Wak Sara told her sister.
example_ms: "Cantik mata orang putih itu, ianya kelihatan biru," Wak Sara memberitahu kepada adiknya.

example_semai: "Eng ngha-et nu kedei ngha-beli ruti, mong ma-ma de habesat?" Bah Sam kiurok nu ikenah.
example_en: "I want to go to the store to buy bread, is there anything you want me to buy?" Bah Sam said to his wife.
example_ms: "Saya mahu ke kedai untuk membeli roti, ada apa-apa yang kamu mahu pesan?" Bah Sam berkata kepada isterinya.

definition_en: chitala fish; a type of freshwater fish
example_semai: Amek Wak Gajah kikot kak belidak medei isej kaha-beh tupu.
example_en: Wak Gajah's mother bought a chitala fish to make fish balls.
example_ms: Ibu Wak Gajah membeli ikan belida untuk membuat bebola ikan.

example_semai: Ku belakang deg Bah Tam mong jeoi cep naidep ku keneng belimbeg medei nayha-cak ipelek ajeh.
example_en: Behind Bah Tam's house there are many birds perched on the starfruit trees because they want to eat the fruit of those trees.
example_ms: Di belakang rumah Bah Tam terdapat banyak burung yang hinggap di pokok belimbing kerana mahu memakan buah di pohon tersebut.

definition_en: to spit up, to cough up milk (as in what babies do after eating)
definition_ms: muntah, mengeluarkan susu (seperti yang dilakukan oleh bayi selepas makan)
example_semai: "Sanget adeh kibelog ha jeoi kimem susu," Wak Minah kipasal nu igensir.
example_en: This baby spit up because he drank too much milk, Wak Minah said to her husband.
example_ms: "Bayi ini muntah kerana terlalu banyak meminum susu," Wak Minah berkata kepada suaminya.

definition_en: tasteless; brackish; having no flavor (concerning food or beverages)
definition_ms: tawar; payau; tidak mempuyai rasa (berkenaan dengan makanan atau minuman)
example_semai: Mai de nyik darah tinggi pek buleh naicanak caknak de gerag, tapi hod naicak caknak de beloj-beloj.
example_en: People with high blood pressure cannot eat salty food but should eat bland food.
example_ms: Orang berpenyakit darah tinggi tidak boleh memakan makanan yang masin, tetapi harus memakan makanan yang tawar.

example_semai: "Amek, apak kiet nu belok?" kenon Wak Gina kitanya bile kineng iapak kicip kihuj mutu.
example_en: "Mother, where is father going?" Wak Gina's son asked when he saw his father leaving on a motorcycle.
example_ms: "Ibu, bapa pergi ke mana?" anak Wak Gina bertanya apabila melihat bapanya pergi dengan menaiki motosikal.

example_semai: Bah Mikah kijog awal nu ikerjak medei mabek ibelok ju Pahang nailei nu imadeg ku arik ajeh.
example_en: Bah Mikah came home early from work because his father-in-law and his family were arriving at his house on that day.
example_ms: Bah Mikah pulang awal dari kerjanya kerana bapa mertua dan keluarga beliau akan ke rumahnya pada hari tersebut.

example_semai: Mong mai naipecaya, belot adeh buleh bibeh penglai ha mai hop.
example_en: Some people believe that eel can be used as a medicine for people with asthma.
example_ms: Ada orang percaya bahawa, belut ini boleh digunakan sebagai ubat untuk orang yang asma.

definition_ms: bertam; sejenis pokok palma yang daunnya boleh digunakan untuk membuat atap rumah. Manakala bilah-bilah batangnya pula boleh dianyam menjadi dinding rumah.
example_semai: Deg de ipelog biui ya beltop mimang leop ru pek beket.
example_en: A house that has a roof made of  palm thatch is not hot.
example_ms: Rumah yang atapnya dibuat daripada bertam tidak panas.

definition_ms: muncul tiba-tiba; datang secara tiba-tiba tanpa diduga
example_semai: Wak Jaja kiwig medei tijik belunj ju engkap sayo mase tengah kijinjaj.
example_en: Wak Jaja screamed as a snake suddenly appeared from crevices between the vegetables while she was pulling out the grass.
example_ms: Wak Jaja menjerit kerana ular tiba-tiba muncul dari celah-celah sayur semasa dia sedang mencabut rumput.

example_semai: Jog Bah Sani kibembeg medei kijag jerlak ru ijerlak ajeh lekat mong ku kateh isej.
example_en: Bah Sani's foot has pus as he stepped on a thorn and the thorn is still in his foot.
example_ms: Kaki Bah Sani bernanah kerana terpijak duri dan duri tersebut masih ada di dalam kulit kakinya.

definition_ms: van; kenderaan enjin beroda empat yang selalunya digunakan untuk mengangkut sesuatu benda dll kegunaan.
example_semai: Bah Lee kiguna ben kiangkot isayo de kicet nu pasa.
example_en: Bah Lee uses a van to deliver the vegetables he grows to the market.
example_ms: Bah Lee menggunakan van bagi menghantar sayur-sayur yang ditanamnya ke pasar.

definition_ms: lemak; zat minyak yang terdapat pada badan manusia atau binatang
example_semai: Bencok kak adeh bor ha kesihatan, lagi-lagi ha mai de mong nyaknik kolestrol tinggi.
example_en: Fatty fish is good for health, especially for those who have high cholestrol.
example_ms: Lemak ikan adalah baik untuk kesihatan, lagi-lagi untuk yang menghidapi penyakit kolestrol tinggi.

definition_ms: bendul; kayu yang dipasang melintang di bawah pintu atau pada tiang rumah
example_semai: "Jebat abor doh hatades bendol pintu ajeh," Bah Mat kiurok nu itengloh.
example_en: "Watch your step, or you will trip on the doorstep," Bah Mat said to his guest.
example_ms: "Pijak elok-elok nanti kamu terlanggar bendul di pintu itu," Bah Mat berkata kepada tetamunya.

example_semai: Bah Mat kien ikenah nu selai medei ikenah ajeh kaha-leh ber gale ru ber paku.
example_en: Bah Mat took his wife to the farm because she wanted to pick the tapoica shoots and the fern shoots.
example_ms: Bah Mat membawa isterinya ke ladang kebun kerana isterinya tersebut hendak memetik pucuk ubi dan pucuk paku.

definition_ms: memakai kain; menyarungkan sesuatu pada anggota badan dari paras pinggang ke bawah (kain, sarung dsb.)
example_semai: Wak Ani kigemar ber abat batek amen ku padeg.
example_en: Wak Ani likes to wear a sarong if she is at home.
example_ms: Wak Ani suka memakai kain sarung sekiranya berada di rumah.

example_semai: Beras had kisui ku darat taleh. Jadi, hod hiet nu darat amen hiha-berkep ber adeh.
example_en: Wild fern shoots only grow in the jungle. So, we must go to the jungle if we want to obtain shoots of this plant.
example_ms: Pucuk paku hutan hanya tumbuh di hutan. Jadi, kita harus ke hutan jika mahu mendapatkan pucuk bagi tumbuhan ini.

example_semai: Wak Mamah kigemar masak ber gale ru jeer.
example_en: Wak Mamah likes to cook the tapioca shoots with coconut milk.
example_ms: Wak Mamah suka memasak pucuk ubi dengan santan.

example_semai: "Eng ngcak ber pag, ngrasa ngbel kerana pek bimasak betol," Wak Anis kipasal nu iamek.
example_en: "I felt drunk after eating the salang shoots, because they had not been cooked the right way," Wak Anis told her mother.
example_ms: "Saya merasa mabuk setelah memakan pucuk salang, kerana ianya tidak dimasak dengan cara yang betul," Wak Anis memberitahu ibunya.

example_semai: Bah Pali kipan-simbang lei berachai ilehig nu mai.
example_en: Bah Pali talks very loudly until his saliva is sprinkled on others.
example_ms: Bah Pali bersembang dengan kuat sehingga air liurnya memercik pada orang lain.

example_semai: Bah Tang mong tujoh urag iberadek. Empat keral, nik kerdor.
example_en: Bah Tang has seven siblings. Four are male and three are female.
example_ms: Bah Tang mempunyai tujuh orang adik-beradik. Empat orang adalah lelaki dan tiga orang adalah perempuan.

example_semai: Bejuhuk ajeh ya berak medei bidek ya liu.
example_en: The tapoica is spoiled because it has been stored for too long.
example_ms: Isi ubi kayu itu sudah rosak kerana disimpan terlalu lama.

example_semai: Bah Razak kiteroj kak kiguna engrat beralang.
example_en: Bah Razak was fishing using grasshoppers for bait.
example_ms: Bah Razak memancing ikan menggunakan umpan belalang.

example_semai: "Mat eng selalo berambeng begei mai raknak manah," Bah Jali kipasal nu ikenah.
example_en: "My eyes are always watery like an old man's," Bah Jali told his wife.
example_ms: "Mata saya selalu berair sepeti orang yang sudah tua," Bah Jali memberitahu kepada isterinya.

example_semai: "Eng huet ku kedei nok, beramos taleh," kipe ya amek nu eng.
example_en: "I want to go to the store first, just for a moment," my mother said to me.
example_ms: "Saya nak pergi ke kedai dulu, sekejap saja," kata emak kepada saya.

definition_ms: beranda; bahagian sisi atau depan rumah yang tidak berdindang dan menjadi pintu masuk utama ke dalam rumah
example_semai: "Deg ku kampug eng mong iberanda ku ngar deg. Jap kelem mesti nggei ku pajeh medei serunuk bipoi ya pinoi sengij," Bah Pipi kipasal nu ikekawat.
example_en: "There is a verandah in front of my house in the village. Every night I will be sure to sit there to feel the fresh air blown by the cold wind," Bah Pipi told his friends.
example_ms: "Terdapat beranda di depan rumah pada rumah di kampung saya. Setiap malam saya pasti akan duduk di situ kerana merasa nyaman ditiup oleh angin yang sejuk," Bah Pipi memberitahu kepada rakan-rakannya.

example_semai: Bah Wan kibercep iduet ku kateh inelipat baju medei kiperasan selalo nyep iduet ku kateh idabal, kisyak bikot ya imenang.
example_en: Bah Wan hid his money between the folds of his shirt (in the closet) because he noticed that the money in his wallet was always missing and he suspected that it was his brother who was stealing the money.
example_ms: Bah Wan menyoroki duitnya di antara lipatan bajunya kerana dia perasan bahawa duit di dalam dompetnya selalu hilang dan beliau mengsyaki adiknya yang mencuri duitnya tersebut.

example_semai: "Berek, engrok eng tok hajoi!" Wak Suri kiles ha imenang de kiyog mase kijerjar.
example_en: "It serves you right, you didn't want to listen to me!" Wak Suri scolded her sister who had fallen while running.
example_ms: "Padan muka, kamu tidak mahu dengar kata-kata saya!" Wak Suri memarahi adiknya yang terjatuh semasa berlari.

definition_ms: pura-pura tidak mendengar; tidak menyahut atau memberi tindakbalas yang sepatutnya apabila dipanggil
example_semai: Bah Eman biles ya iamek medei kiberenteg hamapen ya jeoi kali bicereg.
example_en: Bah Eman was scolded by his mother because he did not respond despite being called many times.
example_ms: Bah Eman dimarahi oleh ibunya kerana tidak menyahut walaupun telah dipanggil banyak kali.

example_semai: Mai Jepon nai gemar cak kak salmon mase tik beres.
example_en: Japanese people like to eat raw salmon.
example_ms: Orang Jepun suka makan ikan salmon semasa masih mentah.

example_semai: Bah Kaling adeh isengoi bergol, kek selalo taleh kikep menghar bile kiet nu serag.
example_en: Bah Kaling is a person who is competent at hunting, he always gets wild animal meat when hunting in the forest.
example_ms: Bah Kaling adalah orang yang mahir apabila memburu, dia selalu sahaja akan mendapat daging haiwan liar apabila memburu ke hutan.

example_semai: Wak Ayu kilog baju iragik beriklet renganj biyeg.
example_en: Wak Ayu is wearing a red and white striped blouse.
example_ms: Wak Ayu memakai baju yang becorak belang merah dan putih.

example_semai: Bah Amri kiberiknos ha imenang medei kibergot ipensil de kihok.
example_en: Bah Amri is angry at his sister because she broke his favorite pencil.
example_ms: Bah Amri marah terhadap adiknya kerana mematahkan pensel kegemarannya.

example_semai: Asa berkes taleh, kemet pen naihol nu madeg.
example_en: When it is evening, mosquitoes will be sure to come to houses.
example_ms: Bila sudah petang, nyamuk pasti akan datang ke rumah.

example_semai: Wak Jaja ajeh numom de nekbelwal, pek sempat mai naiha-berlag ibengwal, ya kisambong ibengwal nij.
example_en: Wak Jaja is a talkative person, there is no opportunity for others to reply, because she will continue talking.
example_ms: Wak Jaja adalah seorang yang kuat bercakap, tidak sempat bagi orang lain membalas kata-katanya, dia sudah menyambung percakapannya.

definition_en: to excuse; to constantly change and speak back and forth
definition_ms: tidak tetap; selalu bertukar-tukar dan cakap berbalik-balik

definition_en: in the twinkling of an eye; very quickly
example_semai: Wak Minah kitutop ientag telas kineng kilat berlij, medei kisengoh ha engrok engkuk.
example_en: Wak Minah covered her ears after seeing the lightning pass in the twinkling of an eye, for fear of the sound of thunder.
example_ms: Wak Minah menutup telinganya setelah melihat kilat berlalu sekelip mata, kerana takut terhadap bunyi guruh.

definition_en: to be delirious; to talk in one's sleep without realizing it
definition_ms: mengigau; bercakap semasa tidur tanpa disedari
example_semai: Bah Ali selalo kibermer bile kibubet.
example_en: Bah Ali was always talking in his sleep.
example_ms: Bah Ali selalu mengigau semasa dia tidur.

definition_en: a kind of herb of which leaves are used for cooking
definition_ms: cemomok; sejenis herba digunakan dalam masakan
example_semai: Kak paten sedap amen bimasak asap sempak ru bidek selak bermong.
example_en: Iridescent shark fish is delicious if cooked with fermented durian and mixed with cemomok leaves.
example_ms: Ikan patin sedap jika dimasak dengan tempoyak dan dicampur dengan daun comomok.

example_semai: Berog mambek suku Iban jeoi ya tatu.
example_en: The bodies of Iban people have many tattoos.
example_ms: Badan orang suku Iban terdapat banyak tatu.

example_semai: Wak Alia kiberoh ha beket iberog.
example_en: Wak Alia got a nosebleed because the temperature of her body was too high.
example_ms: Wak Alia mengalami hidung berdarah kerana badannya terlalu panas.

example_semai: Lapan ikor lembu dat ku padag medei kibertah ya engkuk.
example_en: There were eight cows lying dead in the field due to being struck by lightning.
example_ms: Terdapat lapan ekor lembu mati di padang kerana dipanah oleh petir.

definition_ms: terjun; melompat dari tempat yang tinggi ke bawah
example_semai: "Numom bijumpa dat, bipecayak kibertej ju tingkat lapan," nanek laporan berite kipeder.
example_en: "A man was found dead; It was believed that he had jumped from the eighth floor," a news report said.
example_ms: "Seorang dijumpai mati, dia dipercaya terjun dari tingkat lapan," satu laporan berita mengatakan.

example_semai: Bah Amat kigemar bertot ru ikenon sanget. Hineng doh ubai lekleg ru ubai leklog besama.
example_en: Bah Amat likes to jest with his little boy. They both tickle each other and laugh together.
example_ms: Bah Amat suka bergurau dengan anak kecilnya. Mereka berdua saling menggeletek dan ketawa bersama.

definition_en: mites; a kind of fine flea usually found on chicken and monkey
definition_ms: tungau; sejenis kutu halus biasanya terdapat pada ayam atau kera
example_semai: Berog Bah Adil penuh ya berui medei kimain ku balak semak ru ikekawat kelamnek.
example_en: Bah Adil's body was covered with mites because the previous day he and his friends had been playing in the bushy area.
example_ms: Badan Bah Adil dipenuhi dengan tungau kerana semalam dia dan rakan-rakakannya bermain di kawasan bersemak.

example_semai: Bah Sep kiburu berwog tengah kikek icaknak mase kipekput ku serag.
example_en: Bah Sep saw a bear looking for food when he was hunting (using a blowpipe) in the forest.
example_ms: Bah Sep ternampak beruang sedang mencari makanan semasa dia menyumpit di hutan.

definition_en: to wake (somebody) up; to raise (somebody) up from the dead

example_semai: Atak kibesat nu jik, "Amen engkeet nu lengrik mai, agok sip lei."
example_en: Grandpa advised us, "if you go to someone else's place, do not forget who you are."
example_ms: Datuk memberi nasihat kepada kami, "Jika kamu ke tempat orang, jangan lupa diri."

example_semai: "Eng ngha-et nu kedei, mong ma-ma de habesatka?" Bah Asri kiurok nu ikenah.
example_en: "I want to go the shop, do you have any request?" Bah Asri said to his wife.
example_ms: "Saya mahu pergi kedai, kamu ada apa-apa permintaankah?" Bah Asri berkata kepada isterinya.

example_semai: Ku tepi pagar beg deg sekulah ajeh mong jeoi beseg.
example_en: Alongside the fence near the school are many silver leaf monkeys.
example_ms: Di tepi pagar di sekolah tersebut terdapat banyak monyet lutong kelabu.

example_semai: Wak Alia kicip deras-dears ru kihod agij kijog madeg medei mong numom keral de pek kikenal kibeseh ha ilei ju ikenog.
example_en: Wak Alia walked very fast and was in a hurry to arrive home because an unknown man was following her from behind.
example_ms: Wak Alia berjalan dengan pantas dan mahu cepat sampai ke rumahnya kerana terdapat seorang lelaki yang beliau tidak dikenali mengekorinya dari belakang.

example_semai: Bah Mirul bibeseh ya cok mase kijog ju kedei.
example_en: Bah Mirul was chased by a dog when he returned from the shop.
example_ms: Bah Mirul dikejar oleh anjing semasa pulang dari kedai.

example_semai: Ihat besendap menasak kari kak Wak Nanten.
example_en: Wak Nanten's fish curry is very tasty.
example_ms: Masakan kari ikan Wak Nanten sangat sedap.

definition_ms: melucukan; sesuatu perkara yang membuatkan seseorang ketawa
example_semai: "Tah cerite ma de besengral ku TV? Leknog ubai lei nu deg wal adeh," Wak Ngah kiurok nu igensir ha kekenon kerdor ubai.
example_en: "I wonder what is the funny show that they are watching on the TV? The laughter of the two of them can be heard as far away as the kitchen," Wak Ngah said to her husband about their two daughters.
example_ms: "Cerita apa yang melucukan di TV? Suara mereka berdua ketawa kedengaran sehingga ke dapur," Wak Ngah berkata kepada suaminya tentang kedua-dua anak gadis mereka.

example_semai: Wak Alia ru imenang ubai log besenglar ubai neng cerite lawak ku TV.
example_en: Wak Alia and her sister laughed out loud watching the funny TV show.
example_ms: Wak Alia dan adiknya ketawa dengan terbahak-bahak menontoh cerita lawak di TV.

example_semai: Wak Ania kigemar bet ku deg awat medei ha leap.
example_en: Wak Ania likes to sleep at the bamboo house because it is cool there.
example_ms: Wak Ania suka tidur di rumah buluh kerana ianya sejuk di situ.

definition_en: stinkbean, bitterbean; a large edible foul-smelling bean found in the jungle
example_semai: Pelek betar buleh bicak ibengres atao bibercet.
example_en: The stinkbean seed can be eaten raw or cooked.
example_ms: Buah petai boleh di makan secara mentah atau yang telah di masak.

example_semai: Baju Bah Anip betej kena ya paku.
example_en: Bah Anip's shirt was torn because it got stuck on a nail.
example_ms: Baju Bah Anip menjadi koyak kerana terkena paku.

example_semai: "Bah Rilan adeh ikepale, kibetek mabek sanget nu mateu! Naicip ratak liknai sanget, amen engkecelog harok?" amek kiles ha memenang jik.
example_en: "Bah Rilan is the leader, leading the children to the river! Those who go to the river are only children, what if you all drown?" Mom scolded our younger siblings.
example_ms: "Bah Rilan ini ketuanya, membawa kanak-kanak ke sungai! Yang pergi ke sungai semuanya kanak-kanak sahaja, jika kalian lemas bagaimana?" ibu memarahi adik-adik kami.

example_semai: Wak Arpah kibercet betes de biberkep ya ikenon litau ku kebon sawet.
example_en: Wak Arpah cooks the mushrooms obtained by her son in the oil palm plantation.
example_ms: Wak Arpah memasak cendawan yang diperolehi oleh anak lelakinya di kebun sawit.

definition_en: none or nothing exists; finished up

example_semai: Bah Sedi ru ikawat naibeumal ku jeres.
example_en: Bah Sedi and his friends are hunting in the jungle.
example_ms: Bah Sedi dan kawan-kawannya memburu di hutan.

example_semai: Kui sayet ajeh bihip kena batu.
example_en: The child's head was bleeding from being hit by a rock.
example_ms: Kepala anak itu berdarah kerana terkena batu.

example_semai: "Mat eng pek dapat ngburu bik amen ya kelem," Bah Aril kipasal nu Bah Wan.
example_en: "I can't see clearly at night," Bah Aril told Bah Wan.
example_ms: "Mata saya tidak dapat melihat dengan jelas pada waktu malam," Bah Aril memberitahu kepada Bah Wan.

example_semai: Amek Bah Amat kiguna bilah kicukes icanak ku periuk.
example_en: Bah Amat mother is using a wooden spoon to stir the rice in the cooking pot.
example_ms: Ibu Bah Amat menggunakan senduk kayu untuk mengacau nasi di periok.

example_semai: Amen mong mase, Bah Sani mesti kien iperingak nu zu medei ikekenon naigemar nengneng ha binatag.
example_en: If he has a free time, Bah Sani will definitely take his family to the zoo because his children love to see animals.
example_ms: Jika terdapat kelapangan, Bah Sani pasti membawa keluarganya ke zoo kerana anak-anaknya suka melihat binatang-binatang.

example_semai: Bah Rami kijadi biol telas kiputus tunang.
example_en: Bah Rami became insane after his fiancee broke the engagement.
example_ms: Bah Rami menjadi tidak waras setelah terputus tunang.

example_semai: Tik pegelap lagi birai adeh ya renyah ku engkap deg.
example_en: Magpies are already making a noise early in the morning, in the housing area.
example_ms: Pagi-pagi lagi burung murai sudah membuat bising di kawasan rumah.

definition_en: to be pricked; to be stuck with a thorn
example_semai: Bah Amri kiet nu klinik medei ijog biraj ya jerlak.
example_en: Bah Amri went to the clinic because his leg was pricked by thorns.
example_ms: Bah Amri pergi ke klinik kerana kakinya tertusuk oleh duri.

example_semai: "Mangai ajeh mong ibisa, agok main-main," Bah Ngah kiurok nu icecenok.
example_en: "Scorpions have venom, don't take it lightly," Bah Ngah said to his grandchildren.
example_ms: "Kala jengking tersebut mempunyai bisa, jangan main-main," Bah Ngan berkata kepaa cucu-cucunya.

example_semai: Bah Rahim kipelihara biuku ku ideg.
example_en: Bah Rahim raises southern river terrapins at his home.
example_ms: Bah Rahim memelihara tuntong sungai di rumahnya.

example_semai: Bunga raya apeka had mong warne renganj taleh, mong juga de warne biyeg.
example_en: Hibiscus is not only red, there are also white hibiscus.
example_ms: Bunga raya bukan sahaja cuma berwarna merah sahaja, terdapat juga bunga raya yang berwarna putih.

example_semai: Wan Nina kijap medei ibob sekulah biceg ya imenang sanget. Kek kijap medei kisengoh doh birok ya icekgu.
example_en: Wak Nina cried because her school book had been torn by her little sister. She cried for fear that she would be scolded by her teacher.
example_ms: Wak Nina menangis kerana buku sekolahnya dikoyak oleh adiknya yang kecil. Dia menangis kerana takut akan dimarahi oleh gurunya.

example_semai: "Bok de soh bob eng kateh beg adeh?" Wak Bibah kitanya nu imemenang.
example_en: "Who is the one who took the books that were in this bag?" Wak Bibah asked her younger siblings.
example_ms: "Siapa yang mengelongkar buku-buku yang ada di dalam beg ini?" Wak Bibah bertanya kepada adik-adiknya.

definition_en: to carry something on the front, the back, or the waist
definition_ms: dukung; seseorang mendukung sesuatu di hadapan, di belakang, atau di pinggangnya
example_semai: Wak Nisa kibok imenang ku icelod kiguna abat batek.
example_en: Wak Nisa is using a batik sarong to carry her little brother on her back.
example_ms: Wak Nisa mendukung adiknya di belakang badannya menggunakan kain batik.

example_semai: "Bok imai de kaha-joi eng nu kedei?" Bah Aren kitanya nu ikekenon.
example_en: "Who is it that wants to go with me to the mini market?" Bah Aren asked his children.
example_ms: "Siapakah yang mahu mengikuti saya ke kedai?" Bah Aren bertanya kepada anak-anaknya.

example_semai: "Bok taleh de naihod beneh ceber ju RISDA, buleh naiog muh nu seten kampug," Bah Murad kipasal mase mesyuarat kampug.
example_en: "Anyone who wants the rubber seeds that are supplied by RISDA, please give your name to the assistant of the headman," Bah Murad said during the village meeting.
example_ms: "Sesiapa sahaja yang mahu benih getah yang dibekalkan oleh RISDA, sila beri nama kalian kepada penolong ketua kampung," Bah Murad memberitahu semasa mesyuarat kampung.

example_semai: "Huper, ku dewan sekulah doh mong biui pameran. Bok-bok taleh buleh et," Cikgu Maria kipasal nu ianak muret.
example_en: "Tomorrow there will be an exhibition in the school hall and anyone may go," Teacher Maria told her students.
example_ms: "Esok akan diadakan pameran di dewan sekolah dan terbuka kepada sesiapa sahaja," Cikgu Maria memberitahu kepada anak-anak muridnya.

definition_en: a name of endearment given to a daughter
example_semai: "Bong, cot beleg atei nukebek," Wak Ngah kiurok nu icenok.
example_en: "Dear, bring me a betel nut, please," Wak Ngah said to her granddaughter.
example_ms: "Nak, ambil buah pinang itu sebiji," Wak Ngah berkata kepada cucunya.

example_semai: "Yama jenpej baju eng ajeh? Baju ajeh lekat bor ru lekat buleh ngpakei," Wak Mila kiurok nu iamek.
example_en: "Why did you throw away the shirt? The shirt is still good and I can still wear it," Wak Mila said to her mother.
example_ms: "Kenapa ibu buang baju itu? Baju itu masih baik dan saya masih boleh memakainya," Wak Mila berkata kepada ibunya.

example_semai: Bah Ali kijog awal ju ikerjak ku arik ajeh medei kirasa iberog pek memerip bor.
example_en: Bah Ali returned home early from work that day because he did not feel well.
example_ms: Bah Ali pulang awal dari tempat kerjanya pada hari tersebut kerana merasa badannya tidak berberapa sihat.

example_semai: Amen mong kesempatan, Bah Yadi kigemar engen iperingak becuti nu Cameron Highland medei pemandangan de bor ru cuace de sengij kibeh kek rasa tenang.
example_en: If there is an opportunity, Bah Yadi likes to take his family on holiday to the Cameron Highlands because the beautiful scenery and cool weather make him feel calm.
example_ms: Jika terdapat kesempatan, Bah Yadi suka membawa keluarganya bercuti ke Cameron Highland kerana pemandangan yang cantik dan cuaca yang sejuk membuatkan beliau merasa tenang.

definition_en: to say; to utter; to converse
example_semai: "Pek ngpaham ma de habual ajeh," Bah Atan kiurok nu Bah Man.
example_en: "I do not understand what you said," Bah Atan said to Bah Man.
example_ms: "Saya tidak faham apa yang kamu katakan," Bah Atan berkata kepada Bah Man.

definition_ms: bubuk; serbuk daripada benda-benda yang sudah lapuk
example_semai: "Agok guna cengroi ajeh medei ya bubok," Wak Pika kiurok nu imemang.
example_en: "Do not use that rice because it has already decayed and turned to powder," Wak Pika told her sister.
example_ms: "Jangan guna beras tersebut kerana sudah menjadi bubuk," Wak Pika berkata kepada adiknya.

definition_en: fishtrap which made from rattan or bamboo
definition_ms: bubu; lukah yang diperbuat dari rotan atau buluh
example_semai: Bah Asim kipanei bahbeh bubuk.
example_en: Bah Asim knows how to make a fish trap.
example_ms: Bah Asim tahu membuat bubu.

definition_ms: buaian; tempat duduk yang bokleh diayun
example_semai: Wak Hani selalo kien ikekenon nu taman permainan medei naigemar bemain buei ku pajeh.
example_en: Wak Hani always takes her children to the playground because they like to play on the swings there.
example_ms: Wak Hani selalu membawa anak-anakknya ke taman permainan kerana mereka suka bermain buaian di situ.

example_semai: "Agok buei laju buei ajeh, doh engkeyog," Wak Hani kiurok nu ikekenon.
example_en: "Do not swing on the swing too fast, you will fall," Wak Hani said to her children.
example_ms: "Jangan menghayun buaian tersebut dengan laju, nanti kamu jatuh," Wak Hani berkata kepada anak-anaknya.

definition_ms: buih; gelembung putih yang timbul di atas permukaan air

definition_en: bujuk; forest snakehead; a type of freshwater fish
example_semai: Bah Ramli kikep kak bujug mase kitengroj kelemnek.
example_en: Bah Ramli caught a forest snakehead fish while fishing yesterday.
example_ms: Bah Ramli mendapat ikan bujuk semasa memancing semalam.

example_semai: "Bul abor kak masit ajeh doh kiceret ya roi," ipe ya amek.
example_en: "Wrap the salt fish well or else later the flies will lay their eggs in it," said mother.
example_ms: "Balut baik-baik ikan masin tu nanti lalat bertelur," kata emak.

definition_ms: boleh; berupaya untuk melakukan (sesuatu perkara atau hal); dapat melakukan

example_semai: Ku kelileg deg Wak Rima mong bicet bunga ej pog.
example_en: There is wild sage growing around Wak Rima's house.
example_ms: Sekeliling rumah Wak Rima ada ditanam bunga tahi ayam.

example_semai: Ngoi bunga manor adeh seeg.
example_en: Rafflesias smell like rotten meat.
example_ms: Bunga pakma berbau busuk.

example_semai: Bah Ali kikep bungar mase kipekput nu darat.
example_en: Bah Ali caught a black leaf monkey when hunting using a blowpipe in the jungle.
example_ms: Bah Ali mendapat lutong hitam semasa menyumpit di hutan.

definition_ms: buang; campak; lontar; baling (sampah, bola dll)
example_semai: Bah Kana biles ya icekgu medei bibakek kibuog sampah ratah.
example_en: Bah Kana was scolded by his teacher for throwing rubbish everywhere.
example_ms: Bah Kana dimarahi oleh gurunya kerana kedapatan bahawa dia membuang sampah merata-rata.

example_semai: Bah Lius bibuog ikerjak ha pek kihol memerip arik.
example_en: Bah Lius was fired for not working for several days.
example_ms: Bah Lius dibuang kerja kerana tidak hadir bekerja selama beberapa hari.

definition_en: to meet; to come across; to see
definition_ms: jumpa; sua; temu; semuka; berjumpa; bersua; bertemu; bersemuka
example_semai: Wak Talia kiburuk Wak Suri ru igengsir ubai baklik ku kedei.
example_en: Wak Talia came across Wak Suri and her husband buying items at the shop.
example_ms: Wak Talia ternampak Wak Suri dan suaminya membeli barang di kedai.

definition_ms: tebu; sejenis tumbuhan berbatang tinggi dan beruas-ruas
example_semai: Bah Ajip pai kipanei, gula adeh bibeh ju bus.
example_en: Only now Bah Ajip knows that sugar is made from sugar cane.
example_ms: Bah Ajip baharu mengetahui bahawa gula dibuat (berasal) dari tebu.

example_semai: Busut adeh deg gereec. Tapi, tah yama mai engrak manah entem mai sengoh ha busut.
example_en: Ant hills are the homes of termites. However, I don't know why old people used to fear ant hills.
example_ms: Busut adalah tempat tinggal bagi anai-anai. Tetapi, entah kenapa orang tua dulu-dulu takut terhadap busut.

example_semai: Bah Rami kicantas cabag jehuk legos de ya dat.
example_en: Bah Rami is pruning the dead branch of a rambutan tree.
example_ms: Bah Rami mencantas cabang pohon rambutan yang telah mati.

definition_en: artery road; branch of a river
example_semai: Kuala Lumpur ajeh betol-betol mong ku tremmuk nar cabag teu, teu Gombak ru teu Klang.
example_en: Kuala Lumpur is actually located at the junction of two river branches, namely the Gombak river and the Klang river.
example_ms: Kuala Lumpur betul-betul terletak di pertemuan dua cabang sungai, iaitu sungai Gombak dan sungai Klang.

definition_en: to pull out; to yank out; to extract
definition_ms: cabut; menarik sesuatu keluar dari dasarnya supaya segala isinya kelihatan

example_semai: Kenon Wak Sarah ajeh ya cacat sejak kiyos.
example_en: The son of Wak Sara has been disabled since birth.
example_ms: Anak kepada Wak Sara tersebut telah cacat sejak dilahirkan.

definition_ms: cacau; kacau; tidak tetap fikiran, hati dan perasaan

example_semai: Wak Didi kigemar becacek ha mai.
example_en: Wak Didi likes to belittle other people.
example_ms: Wak Didi suka memperkecil-kecilkan orang lain.

example_semai: Cacing adeh selalo bibeh engrat ha tengroj kak.
example_en: Worms are often used as bait for fishing.
example_ms: Cacing selalunya digunakan sebagai umpan untuk memancing ikan.

definition_ms: mencadangkan; mengusulkan sesuatu; memberi idea; memberi pendapat
example_semai: "Eng ngcadang Bah Ali kijadi ketua," Bah Wan kiurok mase ku sesi penileh ketue kelas enai.
example_en: "I propose that Bah Ali become the class monitor," Bah Wan said at the time of choosing their class monitor.
example_ms: "Saya mencadangkan bahawa Bah Ali menjadi ketua," Bah Wan berkata semasa sesi pemilihan ketua kelas mereka.

example_semai: "Eng ngpanei kenon sanget eng ajeh kaha-cacoh amen ngneng ya kicadok, ku mase ajehleh ngen ilei nu tandas," Wak Melati kipasal nu ijak.
example_en: "I know my little boy wants to defecate if I see him start squatting. At that time I take him to the toilet," Wak Melati told her mother-in-law.
example_ms: "Saya tahu anak kecil saya itu ingin buang air besar sekiranya saya melihat dia mulai mengcangkung. Pada saat itulah saya membawanya ke tandas," Wak Melati memberitahu ibu mertuanya.

example_semai: Bah Rani kigik cag legos de kialak nu deg ilei medei kisengoh doh cag ajeh jer nu kemil ipelog deg.
example_en: Bah Rami is cutting down the branches of the rambutan tree which are growing towards his house because he is worried that the branches will fall on the roof of his house.
example_ms: Bah Rami menebang dahan pokok rambutan yang menghala ke rumahnya kerana risau dahan tersebut jatuh di atap rumahnya.

definition_ms: cincang; rincik; potong kepada beberapa bahagian yang kecil dan halus
example_semai: Wak Lila kicag sej kak medei kaha-beh tupu.
example_en: Wak Lila is mincing the fish flesh to make fish balls.
example_ms: Wak Lila mencincang daging ikan untuk membuat bebola ikan.

definition_en: to pray; to request from the spirits or from the Lord; to wish for something
definition_ms: berdoa; meminta kesejahteraan daripada Tuhan, dewa-dewa atau semangat-semangat tertentu mengikut kepercayaan sesuatu suku masyarakat
example_semai: Wak Imah mong kibeselai ru arik ajeh kek kicagoh dea kimanik medei kihod iceknet bikeraj ya manik.
example_en: Wak Imah was farming and on that day she prayed for rain because she wanted her crops to be dampened by the rain.
example_ms: Wak Imah ada bercucuk-tanam dan pada hari tersebut dia berdoa supaya hujan kerana mahu tanamannya dibasahi hujan.

example_semai: Ku mase kibejampi, halak ajeh kicagoh dea gunik kihol ru kiterbor nyaknik sengoi de nyik.
example_en: When he was casting a spell, the shaman summon the spirit to be present and to cure the illness of his patient.
example_ms: Semasa dia berjampi, bomoh tersebut menyeru supaya roh hadir dan menyembuhkan penyakit yang dihadapi oleh pesakitnya.

definition_ms: meranti; sejenis pokok hutan; diguna untuk membuat penyangga rumah, contohnya seperti rangka-rangka di atas
example_semai: Bah Rumi ru ikekawat naiet nu serag naiha-koh keneng cah ha bahneh deg ilei.
example_en: Bah Rumi and his friends went to the forest to cut down the meranti tree as material to make his house.
example_ms: Bah Rumi dan kawan-kawannya pergi ke hutan untuk menebang pokok meranti sebagai bahan untuk membuat rumahnya.

definition_en: to chop down (grass and small trees)
definition_ms: tebas; rambah (rumput dan pokok-pokok kecil); rintis
example_semai: Bah Jali ru ikenon litau ubai cah selai sempak enai sebelom isempak kijer.
example_en: Bah Jali and his son are cutting down the grass and small trees in their durian orchard before the durian season comes.
example_ms: Bah Jali dan anak lelakinya menebas kebun durian mereka sebelum duriannya jatuh.

example_semai: "Ku mase jisanget entem, mase ajeh pekseg mong letreg. Ku mase ajeh, cahya peliteleh de kiperlau kateh deg. Jibeh kerjak sekulah jiguna pelite taleh. Engkek hunen ya senang, tapi lekat segat belajar," Bah Ngah kiurok nu icecenok.
example_en: "When we were little, electricity was still not available. At that time, only the light of the oil lamp illuminated the house. We were doing our homework using only the light from the lamp. It is much easier for you (guys) now, but you are still lazy to study," Bah Ngah said to his grandchildren.
example_ms: "Sewaktu kami masih kecil, belakan eletrik masih belum ada. Pada masa itu, cuma cahaya pelita yang menerangi rumah. Kami menyiapkan kerja sekolah menggunakan cahaya pelita sahaja. Kamu semua sekarang sudah senang, tetapi masih malas belajar," Bah Ngah berkata kepada cucu-cucunya.

example_semai: "Jihnek jik jicak gulei kari pog," kenon Bah Ali kiurok nu ilei.
example_en: "Earlier we were eating chicken curry," Bah Ali's son said to him.
example_ms: "Tadi kami memakan kari ayam," anak Bah Ali berkata kepadanya.

definition_ms: mengumpat; mengatakan sesuatu yang tidak elok tentang orang lain (dengan orang yang lain) tanpa pengetahuannya
example_semai: "Jerkek adeh sudah-sudahle becakap ruai mai, entah keknit doh lijerkek balek de kena hal de sama," Bah Amat kiurok nu ikenah ru ikenon menaleh.
example_en: "Enough gossiping about others you two, who knows, in the future all the things that you are mentioning could happen to you too," Bah Amat said to his wife and daughter.
example_ms: "Cukup-cukuplah kamu berdua mengumpat mengenai orang lain, mana tahu kemudian nanti kamu berdua sendiri akan terkena hal yang sama," Bah Amat berkata kepada isteri dan anak perempuannya.

definition_en: garbage rake; garbage broom that has blades sparsely positioned among each other
definition_ms: pencakar sampah; penyapu sampah yang mempunyai bilah yang jarang - jarang kedudukannya di antara sama lain
example_semai: Wak Ima kipes ilaman deg kiguna cako.
example_en: Wak Ima swept his yard using a garbage rake.
example_ms: Wak Ima menyapu halaman rumahnya menggunakan pencakar sampah.

definition_en: to say; to talk; to speak
example_semai: "Hek ma hacal jihnek?" Bah Radi kitanya nu ikenah.
example_en: "What did you say, earlier?" Bah Radi asked his wife.
example_ms: "Apa yang kamu cakap tadi?" Bah Radi bertanya kepada isterinya.

definition_en: to pour some of the liquid in one container into another, for example, from one cup to another, but not from bottle to cup
definition_ms: menuang sebahagian; menuang sebahagian cecair yang ada pada sesuatu bekas ke bekas yang lain, contohnya, dari satu cawan ke cawan yang lain, tapi bukan dari botol ke cawan
example_semai: Wak Lila kicalok kupi de ku icawan nu cawan de kilek medei kipanei pek lalu kaha-perdij.
example_en: Wak Lila poured some of the coffee that she had in her cup into another cup because she knew that she could not finish it.
example_ms: Wak Lila menuangkan sebahagian kopi yang ada dicawannya ke cawan yang lain kerana dia mengetahui bahawa dia tidak mampu untuk menghabiskannya.

definition_en: diluted; not concentrated; not strong; weak
example_semai: Wak Sita kibeh ikupi ihad calou medei pek kigemar ngut kupi pekat.
example_en: Wak Sita makes her coffee very weak because she does not like to drink strong coffee.
example_ms: Wak Sita membuat kopinya cair kerana tidak suka meminum kopi yang pekat.

example_semai: Mai biyeg amen mai cacak nai guna camca ru garpu.
example_en: Westerners always use spoons and forks when eating.
example_ms: Orang putih selalunya menggunakan garpu dan sudu apabila makan.

definition_en: to interfere; to enter into the other people's affairs; associate with
definition_ms: mencampuri; turut memasuki hal orang lain; bergaul atau menggabungkan diri dengan
example_semai: "Eng ya ngget hek agok campeg ha hal mai. Neng hunen, mai biurok hek hapengaroh sengoi ajeh dea kibeh hal de nej," Bah Aren kiles ha ikenah.
example_en: "I already prohibited you from interfering in other people's affairs. Look now, they are accusing you of influencing that person to do bad things," Bah Aren said, scolding his wife.
example_ms: "Saya sudah melarang kamu mencampuri urusan hidup orang lain. Lihat sekarang, orang-orang sudah menuduh kamu mempengaruhi orang itu melakukan hal yang tidak elok," Bah Aren memarahi isterinya.

example_semai: Ber gale de bicampor ru kel sedap icaknak.
example_en: Tapioca shoots mixed with banana heart are delicious when eaten.
example_ms: Pucuk ubi kayu yang dicampur dengan jantung pisang sedap apabila dimakan.

definition_en: pelvic spine; poisonous spike protruding from certain species of fish
definition_ms: tulang sengatan ikan; tulang tajam yang terdapat pada sesetengah ikan (cth: ikan keli, ikan baung)
example_semai: Caneg kak keli ajeh ihad bisa, Bah Ali de ya engrak ajeh pen buleh kijap bisej ya canek kak keli.
example_en: Catfish spines are very poisonous, even Bah Ali who is an adult cries when he has been stung by the catfish's spines.
example_ms: Tulang sengatan ikan keli adalah sangat berbisa, Bah Ali yang sudah dewasa itu pun boleh menangis apabila disengat oleh tulang sengatan ikan keli.

example_semai: Cangker de bikot ya Wak Ana ajeh ihad ibernor.
example_en: The porcelain cup which Wak Ana bought is very beautiful.
example_ms: Cawan yang dibeli oleh Wak Ana itu sangat cantik.

definition_en: bulldozer; a machinery to push or move the soil
example_semai: "Jap kali naiha-tulak ha keneng sawet, mai kampug jik mesti nainyong cangkok ju tukeh cina," Bah Lali kipasal nu ikekawat.
example_en: "Every time I want to clear the plantation of oil palm trees, the people of my village are sure to rent a bulldozer belonging to a Chinese boss," Bah Lali told his friends.
example_ms: "Setiap kali mahu membersihkan ladang dari pokok kelapa sawit, orang-orang di kampung saya pasti menyewa jentolak milik taukeh cina," Bah Lali memberitahu kepada kawan-kawannya.

example_semai: Bah Amri kibeh lungkang macot kiguna cangkol.
example_en: Bah Amri is making a small ditch using a hoe.
example_ms: Bah Amri membuat longkang kecil menggunakan cangkul.

example_semai: Bah Ali kikena jerlak ku icanong jog.
example_en: Bah Ali was hurt by a thorn in his heel.
example_ms: Bah Ali terkena duri pada tumit kakinya.

example_semai: Cog de gecat ajeh bibeg ru cantom nanek.
example_en: The severed rope has been tied and joined together.
example_ms: Tali yang putus itu diikat dan dicantum setempat.

example_semai: "Amek kicip canuk nu pasa malam medei kaha-beli sayo, kisengoh doh dij," Wak Aminah kipasal nu iapak.
example_en: "Mother went to the night market first because she wanted to buy vegetables, she was worried that the vegetables will sold out if she goes later," Wak Aminah told her father.
example_ms: "Ibu pergi dulu ke pasar malam kerana mahu membeli sayur, dia risau sayur akan habis jika lewat," Wak Aminah memberitahu kepada bapanya.

example_semai: "Nah, tulog cap sekejap ya hek, ngha-beg cog kasot-ng nok," Wak Nani kiog ibob nu Wak Mala, telas ajeh kibeg icog kasot.
example_en: "Here, please hold this for a moment, I want to tie my shoelaces," Wak Nani gave her book to Wak Mala, then tied her shoelaces.
example_ms: "Nah, kamu tolong pegang sekejap ya, saya mahu mengikat tali kasut saya," Wak Nani memberikan bukunya kepada Wak Mala, kemudian mengikat tali kasutnya.

example_semai: "Agok cap cirek ajeh, ilei lekat beket. Doh tog teg engkek," Wak Jijah kipasal nu ikekenon.
example_en: "Do not touch the kettle, it is still hot. It will burn your hand lif you touch it," Wak Jijah told her children.
example_ms: "Jangan sentuh cerek tersebut, ianya masih panas. Nanti akan melecut tangan kalian jika menyentuhnya," Wak Jijah memberitahu kepada anak-anaknya.

example_semai: Bah Amat ru Bah Ali ubai cap memerip ikor pog medei apak ubai kaha-jual nu pasa.
example_en: Bah Amat and Bah Ali are catching some chickens because their father wants to sell them at the market.
example_ms: Bah Amat dan Bah Ali menangkap berberapa ekor ayam kerana bapa mereka mahu menjualnya ke pasar.

definition_en: pieces; small pieces of the larger objects
definition_ms: cebisan; bahagian kecil dari benda yang lebih besar
example_semai: Butol de ceeh ajeh jeoi icapeh de bemacot.
example_en: The broken bottle comprised of many small pieces.
example_ms: Botol yang pecah itu mempunyai banyak cebisan yang kecil-kecil.

example_semai: Bah Lan capek ijog englag ya eksiden mutu ku tahut canuk.
example_en: One of Bah Lan's legs is paralysed as a result of a motorcycle accident that happened last year.
example_ms: Kaki Bah Lan menjadi tempang akibat kemalangan motosikal yang terjadi pada tahun lepas.

example_semai: Bah Zaki kicar ceos medei kaha-rup os ha reknag kak.
example_en: Bah Zaki split the firewood because he wanted to kindle it to grill the fish.
example_ms: Bah Zaki membelah kayu api kerana mahu menghidupkan bagi membakar ikan.

example_semai: Bah Ngah kiajar icecenok care harok ha beh bubu.
example_en: Bah Ngah taught his grandchildren the way to make a fishtrap.
example_ms: Bah Ngah mengajar cucu-cucunya cara membuat bubu.

definition_en: to be sprained; to be injured due to a fall (tendons or ligaments)
example_semai: Jog Wak Intan kicarel medei tesilap kijebat lubang.
example_en: Wak Intan's leg is sprained because he accidentally stepped in a hole.
example_ms: Kaki Wak Intan terseliuh kerana tersilap terpijak pada lubang.

definition_en: to utter vulgar and filthy words
definition_ms: mencarut; menyebut perkataan yang keji dan tidak sopan
example_semai: Bah Aja bitampar ikaming ya iapak medei kicarot ha imenang.
example_en: Bah Aja's cheek was slapped by his father for uttering vulgar words to his brother.
example_ms: Pipi Bah Aja ditampar oleh bapanya kerana mencarut kepada adiknya.

definition_en: smoke; gas and carbon ash that comes from a fire
definition_ms: asap; gas karbon yang keluar dari benda-benda yang terbakar
example_semai: Bah Aman biles ya ikenah medei kirup os ru icas kimuj nu madeg.
example_en: Bah Aman was scolded by his wife because he kindled the fire and the smoke entered the house.
example_ms: Bah Aman dimarahi oleh isterinya kerana menghidupkan api dan asapnya memasuki ke dalam rumah.

definition_ms: cat; pewarna (biasanya bersifat cair dan berminyak) yang digunakan untuk mewarnai sesuatu (lukisan, bangunan, rumah kediaman, pakaian dsbnya)
example_semai: Bah Adi kibeli cat warne belaer medei kaha-cat ideg.
example_en: Bah Adi bought green paint to paint his house.
example_ms: Bah Adi membeli cat berwarna hijau bagi mengecat rumahnya.

example_semai: Bah Kudi kicat ipagar deg medei ya beuseg selalo kena pengrag ru manik.
example_en: Bah Kudi painted the fence of his house as it was dilapidated because it is always exposed to the heat of the sun and affected by the rain.
example_ms: Bah Kudi mengecat pagar rumahnya kerana sudah menjadi usang kerana selalu terdedah kepada panas matahari dan ditimpa hujan.

example_semai: Bah Nan pek lalu kaha-cat cenan ajeh ha iberog entoi.
example_en: Bah Nan was unable to climb the hill because of his weight.
example_ms: Bah Nan tidak mampu mendaki bukit tersebut kerana badannya yang besar.

definition_en: to gather; to arrange; to collect
definition_ms: kumpul; susun; himpun; kutip; pungut; gabung; cantum
example_semai: Bah Atan kicatu lada de bileh ya ilei ru ikekenon nu nanek bekas, telas ajeh kijual nu pasa.
example_en: Bah Atan gathered the peppers picked by himself and his children into one container, then sold it at the market.
example_ms: Bah Atan mengumpulkan lada-lada yang dipetik oleh dirinya sendiri dan anak-anaknya ke dalam satu bekas yang sama, kemudian menjualnya ke pasar.

definition_en: to splashl to splatter; to sprinkle
example_semai: Bah Pani kicau teu nu renes Bah Hakim de kipingsan ku balak beket.
example_en: Bah Pani splashed water on Bah Hakim's face who had fainted because of the heat.
example_ms: Bah Pani merenjiskan air ke muka Bah Hakim yang pengsan di tengah panas.

definition_en: tool that is like an adze except the blade is in line with the handle, not at right angles to it
definition_ms: pencebak; sejenis alat untuk membuat lubang pada tanah, ianya mempunyai bilah yang bermata leper
example_semai: Bah Manan kiguna cebak kaha-beh lubog de kaha-cep cenol cenglei abat.
example_en: Bah Manan used a tool like an adze to make holes in the ground for the poles of the clothesline.
example_ms: Bah Manan menggunakan pencebak untuk membuat lubang pada tanah bagi tiang penyidai kain.

definition_en: to dig or rake the ground
example_semai: Wak Nina kior igensir kicebak tik ha ipasu bunga.
example_en: Wak Nina told her husband to dig the ground to get soil to put into her flower pots.
example_ms: Wak Nina menyuruh suaminya menggali tanah untuk mendapatkan tanah bagi diisi pada pasu bunganya.

example_semai: Bah Kamal ru Bah Dani ubai tengroj ku cebak teu Perak.
example_en: Bah Kamal and Bah Dani went fishing at the mouth of the Perak River.
example_ms: Bah Kamal dan Bah Dani pergi memancing di muara Sungai Perak.

example_semai: Adeh neh jeoi mai bimutong mandei regak ceber ya huj.
example_en: Nowadays lots of people are tapping rubber because the price of latex has increased.
example_ms: Sekarang ini ramai yang menoreh getah kerana harga getah sudah naik.

definition_en: to well up in one's eyes (of tears)
example_semai: Ceber teu mat Wak Tila medei kaha-jap biles ya iapak.
example_en: Wak Tila's tears welled up because she wanted to cry due to being scolded by her father.
example_ms: Air mata Wak Tila bergenang kerana mahu menangis akibat dimarahi oleh bapanya.

definition_en: to pinch; to take a little
example_semai: Wak Mala kikot nek nucebot talek kak mileh medei ha iregak mahal.
example_en: Wak Mila bought just a small amount of anchovies because of the high price.
example_ms: Wak Mila membeli cuma sejemput sahaja ikan bilis kerana harganya yang mahal.

example_semai: Lampu nong de ku ngar deg tok penghulu ajeh cecengol taleh hineng, pek memerip terang.
example_en: The street light that in front of the headman's house is dim and not very bright.
example_ms: Lampu jalanraya yang terdapat di hadapan rumah tok penghulu tersebut kelihatan malap dan tidak berberapa terang.

example_semai: Cedau selalojeh mong kihol telas manik.
example_en: A rainbow usually appears after rain.
example_ms: Pelangi selalunya muncul setelah hujan.

definition_en: to bend head down and lifted buttock up
definition_ms: menonggeng; perbuatan atau kelakuan membongkokkan badan dan mengangkat punggung ke atas
example_semai: Sanget ajeh kicedek ikit nu ikekawat sebegei tanda kinyeh ha enai.
example_en: That boy bent his head down and lifted his buttocks up towards his friends as a sign that he was mocking them.
example_ms: Budak itu menonggeng punggungnya ke arah kawan-kawannya sebagai tanda bahawa dia mengejek mereka.

definition_en: to carry; to carry something (usually a baby, a child or something small or light) on someone's chest, or the waist, or on the back
definition_ms: mendukung; membawa sesuatu di hadapan, di pinggang atau di belakang seseorang, selalunya yang dibawa adalah bayi, kanak-kanak, atau benda yang kecil dan ringan
example_semai: Wak Alisha kicedup imenang ya abat batek ku ikenog.
example_en: Wak Alisha is carrying her brother on her back utilising a sarong.
example_ms: Wak Alisha mendukung adiknya di belakangnya menggunakan kain batik.

example_semai: "Ngkerngoi ceeg, tah ma de ngej?" Bah Oli kipasal nu ikenah.
example_en: "It smells as if something is burnt, I wonder what it is?" Bah Oli told his wife.
example_ms: "Saya bau seperti ada benda yang terbakar, apa ya?" Bah Oli memberitahu isterinya.

example_semai: Cermin de bigantong ku dinig ajeh yog ru kiceeh.
example_en: The mirror which hung on the wall has fallen off and broken.
example_ms: Cermin yang digantung di dinding tersebut telah jatuh dan menjadi pecah.

definition_ms: sakit ulu hati; pedih ulu hati
example_semai: Bah Midan kirasa ceel inos medei lekat pek kicakcak sejak ju pegelap.
example_en: Bah Medan felt heartburn because he had not eaten since morning.
example_ms: Bah Medan merasa sakit pada ulu hatinya kerana belum lagi makan sejak dari waktu pagi.

definition_en: sweet; a taste like sugar or honey
definition_ms: manis; rasa seperti gula atau madu
example_semai: Sempog luei ajeh irasa ihad ceet.
example_en: The bee's honey tastes very sweet.
example_ms: Madu lebah itu rasanya sangat manis.

example_semai: Bah Medan kiceg gek ibaju medei kaha-balot luka ku ijog.
example_en: Bah Medan tore a little piece of his shirt because he wanted to bandage the wound on his leg.
example_ms: Bah Medan mengoyakkan sedikit bajunya kerana mahu membalut luka yang terdapat pada kakinya.

example_semai: Kak tengas naigei ku cegar.
example_en: Copper Mahseer usually live in areas of the river where there is a fast current.
example_ms: Ikan tengas selalunya tinggal di kawasan sungai yang arusnya deras.

definition_en: hard; tight; difficult to open; difficult to cut; difficult to break or separated
definition_ms: keras; ketat; sukar dibuka; sukar dipotong; sukar dipatahkan atau diuraikan
example_semai: Wak Dia kiog butol jem nu igensir medei cegeh pek lalu kibuka.
example_en: Wak Dia gave the jam bottle to her husband because the lid was tight and she was not able to open it.
example_ms: Wak Dia memberikan botol jem kepada suaminya kerana penutupnya keras dan dia tidak mampu membukanya.

example_semai: Hamapen deg Bah Tang ajeh bibeh ju awat, tapi ilei cegeh ru pek tateh mase pes jear padehjeh. Deg mabek kilek de bibeh ju jehuk bernor buleh kitateh, tapi mahentok jadi ku deg kek.
example_en: Although Bah Tang's house is made from bamboo, his house is strong and did not collapse during the storm the other day. Someone else's house made of solid wood collapsed, but nothing happened to his house.
example_ms: Walaupun rumah Bah Tang diperbuat daripada buluh, tetapi rumahnya tersebut kuat dan tidak runtuh semasa berlaku kejadian ribut tempoh hari. Rumah orang lain yang dibuat daripada kayu yang sempurna telah runtuh, tetapi tiada apa yang terjadi kepada rumahnya.

example_semai: Wak Pira kiseh lada lei ceh medei kinyek imat lada seksog ku lemunj.
example_en: Wak Pira pounded the pepper until it became very fine because she did not want the pepper seeds to get stuck in anyone's teeth.
example_ms: Wak Pira menumbuk lada sehingga lumat kerana tidak mahu biji lada tersangkut pada gigi.

example_semai: Wak Salmah kiceh sej pog ku canak ikenon sanget.
example_en: Wak Salmah tore the chicken meat into pieces onto the rice for her little boy.
example_ms: Wak Salmah mencarik daging ayam pada nasi bagi anak kecilnya.

example_semai: Amen hiet nu serag, mesti mong jeoi engrok ceh.
example_en: If we go to the forest, there are sure to be a lot of insect sounds.
example_ms: Jika kita pergi ke hutan, mesti akan terdapat banyak bunyi serangga.

definition_en: stench; the smell of urine or stinking like smelly drain water
definition_ms: hancing; bau kencing atau bau busuk seperti bau air longkang
example_semai: Tandas ku dewan kampug ajeh ingoi cehar medei ya liu pek bisuj.
example_en: The toilet in the village hall smelled of urine because it had not been cleaned for a long time.
example_ms: Tandas di dewan kampung tersebut bebau hancing kerana sudah lama tidak dicuci.

definition_en: to incite; to arouse anger or hatred between one another
definition_ms: menghasut; membangkitkan kemarahan atau kebencian di antara satu sama lain
example_semai: Wak Ani kigemar ceher ha ikekawat dea pek naikawat ru mai kilek.
example_en: Wak Ani likes to incite her friends not to be friends with others.
example_ms: Wak Ani suka menghasut kawan-kawannya supaya tidak berkawan dengan yang lain.

example_semai: Wak Yana kigemar ha warne ceher. Dij iarap amen buleh kihot warne ajeh, begei ibaju, ikasot, ibeg, ru macam-macam nij.
example_en: Red is Wak Yana's favourite color. All her belongings are that color such as her clothes, shoes, bags and many more.
example_ms: Merah adalah warna kegemaran Wak Yana. Semua brang-barang kepunyaannya adalah berwarna tersebut seperti bajunya, kasutnya, begnya dan pelbagai lagi.

definition_en: afternoon; the time between about 1pm and 6pm
definition_ms: petang; dari pukul 1 sehingga 6 petang; waktu selepas tengahari
example_semai: Kawat eng kijanji cehoi doh kaha-nyong bob ku deg eng.
example_en: My friend promised to pick up the book at my house sometime after noon.
example_ms: Kawan saya berjanji iaitu mahu mengambil buku di rumah saya pada waktu selepas tengahari.

definition_en: to be tired; to be out of breath
definition_ms: termengah-mengah; tercungap-cungap; bernafas dengan agak kencang kerana terlalu penat
example_semai: Bah Kiki kicehos medei kijerjar nyak.
example_en: Bah Kiki was out of breath as he had run a long way.
example_ms: Bah Kiki menjadi tercungap-cungap kerana telah berlari dengan jauh.

definition_en: roar; the sound of water coming down or falling from a high place, such as a waterfall
definition_ms: berderu; bunyi air yang turun atau jatuh dari tempat yang tinggi, contohnya air terjun
example_semai: Teu lata ku beng deg eng adeh hicerengai cehus.
example_en: We can hear the roar of the waterfall that is near to my house.
example_ms: Berderu kedengaran bunyi air terjun yang berdekatan dengan rumah saya.

example_semai: "Cek!" Bah Saki kiharok ha cok.
example_en: "Shoo!" Bah Saki chased away a dog.
example_ms: "Shu!" Bah Saki menghalau anjing.

definition_en: louse, a small insect that sucks the blood of people or animals and often found in the hair or fur
definition_ms: kutu; serangga kecil yang menghisap darah manusia atau binatang, dan sering ditemui pada rambut atau bulu
example_semai: Wak Lila kiloj kui ikenon medei ikuy ajeh tebeg ya cek.
example_en: Wak Lila shaved her daughter's head because it was full of lice.
example_ms: Wak Lila mencukur kepala anaknya kerana dipenuhi oleh kutu.

definition_en: Miss; a title for an unmarried woman
definition_ms: cik; panggilan bagi gadis atau wanita yang belum berkahwin
example_semai: Cekgu jik selalo bicereg Cik Angeline medei ilei pekseg kibegensir.
example_en: Our teacher is often called Miss Angeline because she is not yet married.
example_ms: Cikgu kami selalunya dipanggil Cik Angeline kerana dia belum berumahtangga.

definition_en: to cock the trgger of a rifle or pistol so that can fire a shoot
definition_ms: mencekah; menarik kuda-kuda pada senapang atau pistol supaya dapat menembak
example_semai: Bah Selah ya kicekah isenapang kaha-bedel dog.
example_en: Bah Selah had cocked his rifle to shoot the monkey.
example_ms: Bah Selah sudah mencekah senapangnya untuk menembak monyet.

definition_ms: cekak rambut; alat yang berbentuk cengkung, berbatang kecil dan mempunyai gigi-gigi halus dibahagian bawah bagi menahan rambut supaya kemas dan biasanya dipakai di atas kepala
example_semai: Wak Mira kigemar log cekak ha isog ajeh selalo kikembang.
example_en: Wak Mira likes to wear a hairband because her hair is straggly.
example_ms: Wak Mira suka memakai cekak rambut kerana rambutnya yang kembang.

definition_en: to choke; repeated coughing because something was improperly swallowed
example_semai: Mase tengah kicakcak, Bah Mali kicekdeg lalu kingut teu.
example_en: Bah Mali choked while eating, then he drank some water.
example_ms: Bah Mali tersedak semasa sedang makan, lalu dia meminum air.

definition_ms: mencekik; mencengkam leher hingga tidak dapat bernafas
example_semai: Menang eng kicekeg kenon kuceg lei kiselei.
example_en: My sister choked the kitten until the kitten became weak.
example_ms: Adik saya mencekik anak kucing sehingga kucing tersebut menjadi lemah.

definition_en: to stand with one's hands on (one's waist)
example_semai: "Neng Bah Sulah ajeh, kicekek iwog begei bos ru langsong pek kitulog kerjak de tengah bibeh," Bah Man kiurok nu Bah Rani.
example_en: "Look at Bah Sulah, with his hands on his waist - he is behaving like a boss. He is not helping the people who are working," Bah man said to Bah Rani.
example_ms: "Lihat Bah Sulah tersebut, dia mencekak pinggangnya dan lagaknya itu seperti seorang bos. Dia langsung tidak membantu orang-orang yang sedang melalukan kerja tersebut," Bah man berkata kepada Bah Rani.

example_semai: Wak Jangkor kikot cekelat ha imenang.
example_en: Wak Jangkor bought sweets for his sister.
example_ms: Wak Jangkor membeli gula-gula untuk adik.

definition_en: teacher; title for men and women whose job it is to teach knowledge; educators (school or kindergarten, etc.)
definition_ms: cikgu; panggilan kepada lelaki dan wanita yang tugasnya mengajar ilmu pengetahuan; pendidik (sekolah atau tadika dll)
example_semai: Wak Timah biles ya icekgu medei pek kiseryap ikerjak sekulah.
example_en: Wak Timah was scolded by her teacher for not completing her school work.
example_ms: Wak Timah dimarahi oleh cikgunya kerana tidak menyiapkan kerja sekolahnya.

example_semai: "Hek haog sej ajeh iceknenka ibengres?" ajok Wak Salwa kitanya nu icenok.
example_en: "Is the meat that you gave cooked or still raw?" Wak Salwa's grandmother asked her grandson.
example_ms: "Daging yang kamu beri itu sudah dimasak atau yang masih mentah?" nenek kepada Wak Salwa bertanya kepada cucunya.

definition_en: outer skin of tree (bark), of fruit, of shell, of animals
definition_ms: kulit kayu; kulit buah-buahan; cengkerang binatang; lapisan atau bahagian luar (anggota badan; binatang; tumbuhan; benda)
example_semai: Cekop sempak ajeh tajap ijerlak.
example_en: The thorns on the durian skin are sharp.
example_ms: Duri yang pada kulit durian adalah tajam.

definition_en: peel or skin of 'langsat' fruit; the peel is taken from 'langsat' fruit, boiled and the water is drunk - the taste is bitter and can kill worms
definition_ms: kulit langsat; diambil dari kulit langsat, direbus dan airnya diminum. Rasanya pahit dan dapat membunuh cacing
example_semai: Cekop langsat ajeh ceraket ya iceber.
example_en: The langsat skin is sticky because of the sap.
example_ms: Kulit langsat itu melekit kerana terdapat getahnya.

definition_en: to level, scrap, or push the dirt using heavy or light equipment
definition_ms: meratakan, mengorek atau menolak tanah menggunakan jentera berat atau peralatan ringan
example_semai: Bah Selan kisiwa cengkor tukeh cina kicekor itapak deg.
example_en: Bah Selan rented a bulldozer belonging to a Chinese boss to level the site for his new house.
example_ms: Bah Selan menyewa jentolak milik taukeh cina bagi meratakan tanah untuk tapak rumahnya.

example_semai: Bah Padil kicekot iarap ku meskar.
example_en: Bah Padil tied his things to the bicycle.
example_ms: Bah Padil mengikat barangnya di basikal.

example_semai: Jeoi roi de cektat ku cat dinig medei naidep mase cat ajeh lekat keaj.
example_en: There are many flies stuck to the paint on the wall because the flies landed on the paint when it was still wet.
example_ms: Terdapat banyak lalat yang melekat pada cat pada dinding kerana lalat-lalat tersebut hinggap pada cat tersebut semasa cat tersebut masih basah.

definition_ms: celaka; malang; sial; tidak baik (berkenaan dengan nasib dll)

example_semai: Mat sempak de bicet ajeh ya mula kiceldol.
example_en: The durian seeds that have been planted have already started to grow.
example_ms: Biji durian yang ditanam tersebut sudah mulai tumbuh.

example_semai: Wak Nina nyik itangkog, jadi susah kaha-celeg nu celod.
example_en: Wak Nina's neck hurt, so it was difficult for her to look backwards.
example_ms: Tengkok Wak Nina sakit, jadi susah baginya untuk menoleh ke belakang.

definition_ms: turun; bergerak dari tempat yang tinggi ke tempat yang rendah; beralih dari atas ke bawah
example_semai: Kenon cok ajeh kisengoh kaha-celeh ju rangkal.
example_en: The puppy was afraid to come down from the stairs.
example_ms: Anak anjing tersebut takut untuk turun dari tangga.

definition_ms: menyidai; meletakkan kain yang basah di atas tali, batang kayu dll bagi tujuan untuk mengeringkannya
example_semai: Bah Kamis kicelei ituala ku tingkap medei kihod asot.
example_en: Bah Kamis hung his towel on the window because he wanted it to be dry.
example_ms: Bah Kamis menyidai tualanya di tingkap kerana mahu ianya menjadi kering.

definition_en: to smooth with a knife before plaiting; to whittle (pandan strips)
definition_ms: merautkan atau melicinkan sebelum dianyam (daun mengkuang)
example_semai: Amek Bah Rani kiceles selak sekik kaha-beh ceruk.
example_en: Bah Rani's mother smoothed the pandan leaves to make a mat.
example_ms: Ibu Bah Rani meraut daun mengkuang untuk membuat tikar.

example_semai: Bah Lan kibok raga sempak ku icelod.
example_en: Bah Lan carried the durian basket on his back.
example_ms: Bah Lan memikul bakul durian di belakangnya.

definition_ms: lemas; susah bernafas kerana tiada udara (oksigen)
example_semai: Wak Sisah kicelog ha kikedei liloi ku teu.
example_en: Wak Sisah drowned because she did not know how to swim.
example_ms: Wak Sisah lemas kerana tidak pandai berenang.

example_semai: Wak Nora kicelop ibaju biyeg ya pewarne merah jambu.
example_en: Wak Nora dipped her white shirt in the pink dye.
example_ms: Wak Nora mencelup bajunya yang berwarna putih pada pewarna merah jambu.

definition_en: to dip something into hot water to make it wilt
definition_ms: mencelupkan sesuatu ke dalam air panas supaya layu
example_semai: Wak Mila kicelor taugeh, telas ajeh kiletak kicap. Ajeh taleh care kek kimasak sayo.
example_en: Wak mila dips the bean sprouts into hot water, then puts the soy sauce on the bean sprouts. That's the way she cooks vegetables.
example_ms: Wak mila mencelur taugeh, kemudian meletakkan kicap ke taugeh tersebut. Itu sahaja cara beliau memasak sayur.

definition_ms: tercekik; tersangkut sesuatu (makanan, objek dll) di kerongkong
example_semai: Kenon sanget Wak Mala kicelul jeag kak medei lekat kikedei cakcak kak.
example_en: Wak Mala's young son choked on a fish bone because he still not know how to eat fish.
example_ms: Anak Wak Mala yang masih kecil tercekik tulang ikan kerana masih tidak pandai memakan ikan.

definition_ms: muncul secara tiba-tiba; datang secara tiba-tiba; kedatangan yang tidak disangka-sangka
example_semai: Kerite de kicelun ju kenog Wak Mina ru Wak Lala mase ubai tengah ubai poj lampu isarat ku simpang ajeh nek, kibeh ubai de ku kemil mutu ajeh ubai kekjet.
example_en: The car that appeared suddenly from behind Wak Mina and Wak Lala while they were waiting for the traffic lights at the intersection, startled the two of them that were on the motorcycle. Screen reader support enabled.
example_ms: Kereta yang muncul dengan secara tiba-tiba dari arah belakang Wak Mina dan Wak Lala semasa mereka berdua sedang menunggu lampu isyarat di simpang tadi membuatkan mereka berdua yang ada di atas motosikal tersebut menjadi terkejut.

definition_ms: buih; busa; gelembung putih yang timbul di atas permukaan air
example_semai: Teu beag ajeh kibeh becemboh.
example_en: The tide looks foamy.
example_ms: Air pasang itu kelihatan berbuih.

definition_ms: cemburu; iri hati; dengki; sakit hati
example_semai: Wak Lila kicemburu kineng ikawat kikot leptop pai.
example_en: Wak Lila is jealous seeing her friend buy a new laptop.
example_ms: Wak Lila cemburu melihat kawannya membeli laptop yang baharu.

definition_en: sound; a continuous voice from animals or humans; the non-stop conversation of someone speaking
definition_ms: bunyi; sesuatu suara yang dikeluarkan oleh binatang atau manusia dan ianya tidak berhenti-henti berbunyi; suara orang bercakap tidak berhenti-henti
example_semai: Bah Pani kihalei taleh de belwal tapi higertek cemerbej.
example_en: Only Bah Pani was spoke but it sounded like he never stopped talking.
example_ms: Hanya Bah Pani seorang sahaja yang bercakap tetapi kedengaran bahawa dia tak henti-henti bercakap.

example_semai: Wak Nisa iempag cempet bile kibelwal.
example_en: Wak Nisa is skillful at talking.
example_ms: Wak Nisa mahir ketika bercakap.

definition_ms: tumbuh dengan subur (tumbuhan); tumbuh semula (berkenaan dengan tumbuh-tumbuhan) dan membesar dengan keadaan yang subur
example_semai: Pucok ubi de bicet beng tepi nong ajeh ihad cemug.
example_en: The shoots of the tapioca that were planted by the side of the road are growing very well.
example_ms: Pucuk ubi kayu yang ditanam di tepi jalan itu tumbuh dengan sangat subur.

example_semai: Ajok Bah Salman ya cenak ipenghod, jadi dij ikenon-cenok naijog naiha-neng ha ilei.
example_en: Bah Salman's grandmother was on her death bed, so all her children and grandchildren went home to see her.
example_ms: Nenek Bah Salman sudah sakit tenat, jadi semua anak-anak dan cucu-cucunya pulang bagi melihat beliau.

example_semai: "Bah Suren ihad cenak telas kieksiden mutu mase kijog ju ikerjak. Hunen ilei lekat ku hospitel, kikoma," Bah Mali kipasal nu ikekawat.
example_en: "Bah Suren suffered severe injuries after having a motorcycle accident on his way home from work. Now he is still in the hospital and in a coma," Bah Mali told his friends.
example_ms: "Bah Suren mengalami kecederaan yang teruk selepas mengalami kemalangan motosikal semasa pulang dari tempat kerjanya. Sekarang dia masih berada di hospital dan dalam keadaan koma," Bah Mali memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

example_semai: Wak Jangkor ajeh kigemar cenakap ruai ha mai.
example_en: Wak Jangkor likes to gossip about other people.
example_ms: Wak Jangkor suka mengumpat mengenai orang lain.

definition_ms: bukit yang tinggi; gunung; tanah tinggi berpuncak
example_semai: Jeoi mai bicet sempak ku cenan.
example_en: There are many people who plant durians on the high hills.
example_ms: Terdapat banyak orang menanam durian di bukit yang tinggi.

definition_en: splasher; one of the tools during healing ceremonies by shamans; the tool made of the leaves of the temulih tree that are tied and use as a splasher to splash the spelled water on the patient
definition_ms: renjisan; alat untuk merenjis; daun pokok temulih yang dikat sebagai alat renjisan air jampian yang direnjis kepada orang dijampi
example_semai: Mai bejampi selalo naiguna cenau bile naibejampi.
example_en: Shamans often use a splasher when performing the healing ceremonies.
example_ms: Bomoh selalunya menggunakan renjisan ketika melakukan upacara perjampian.

definition_en: torpedo scad; a type of ocean fish
example_semai: Wak Hani pek kigemar cak kak cencaru medei mong isikek de keras.
example_en: Wak Hani does not like to eat the torpedo scad fish because it has hard scales.
example_ms: Wak Hani tidak suka makan ikan cencaru kerana ianya mempunyai sisik yang keras.

definition_ms: sandar; duduk atau berdiri sambil mengenakan badan pada sesuatu (tiang, dinding dsb)
example_semai: Bah Midin kiet nu belakang sekali mase mesyuarat ku kateh dewan medei kaha-becendot ku dinig.
example_en: Bah Mindin went to the back of the hall during the meeting because he wanted to lean on the wall.
example_ms: Bah Mindin pergi ke bahagian belakang dewan semasa mesyuarat kerana mahu bersandar pada dinding.

definition_ms: cener; sejenis cendawan yang boleh dimakan
example_semai: Betes cener selalo nai cuai ku keneng ceber de la karuk.
example_ms: Sejenis cendawan ini selalunya tumbuh di batang pokok getah yang sudah reput.

definition_en: to lie on one side of the body when sleeping
definition_ms: tidur mengiring dengan posisi tidur pada sebelah badan sahaja
example_semai: Kenon Wak Agem ya nik gencek ru lekat kidak cener.
example_en: Wak Agem's son is three months old and is still lying on one side of his body when he is sleeping.
example_ms: Anak Wak Agem sudah berumur tiga bulan dan masih tidur mengiring lagi.

definition_en: thurible, censer, a container for burning incense in religious rituals
a type of tree commonly used for house building
definition_ms: cengal; sejenis pokok kayu yang sangat baik untuk dibuat bahan rumah
example_semai: Jengoi mai kampug nai beh deg ju jehuk cengal.
example_en: Most of the villagers make their houses from the wood of the cengal tree.
example_ms: Kebanyakan orang kampung membuat rumah mereka dari pokok cengal.

definition_en: to stink with an odour like a drain; to have body odour of someone who hasn't bathed in several days, a burnt or sour smell
definition_ms: berbau busuk seperti bau air longkang, bau badan seseorang yang berberapa hari tidak mandi, bau hangit, atau bau masam
example_semai: Bah Abu ingoi cengis ha pek kimamuh ya nar arik.
example_en: Bah Abu's body stank because he had not taken a bath for two days.
example_ms: Badan Bah Abu berbau busuk kerana sudah dua hari tidak mandi.

definition_en: wooden beam; horizontal wood that holds the floor of the house
definition_ms: gelegar; kayu melintang yang menahan lantai rumah
example_semai: Bah Man ru Bah Din ubai et nu serag, ubai kek jehuk, baiha-ganti cengkar deg amek jop enai.
example_en: Bah Man and Bah Din went to the forest to look for wood because they wanted to replace the beams at their grandmother's house.
example_ms: Bah Man dan Bah Din pergi ke hutan bagi mencari kayu kerana mahu menggantikan kayu gelegar pada rumah nenek mereka.

example_semai: Bah Lan kikot cengkot wog pai medei icengkot wog pai kirusak.
example_en: Bah Lan bought a new belt because his current belt had just worn out.
example_ms: Bah Lan membeli tali pinggang yang baharu kerana tali pinggangnya baharu rosak.

definition_en: clothesline; hanger; place to hang wet clothes or laundry
definition_ms: ampaian; penyidai; tempat menyidai pakaian yang basah atau lembap supaya menjadi kering; tempat pakaian dijemur
example_semai: Bah Dani kikek awat medei ikenah kihod, kaha-beh cenglei abat.
example_en: Bah Dani is looking for bamboo sticks because his wife wants them. She wants to make them into a place to hang the lanudry.
example_ms: Bah Dani mencari buluh kerana isterinya mengkehendakinya. Beliau mahu membuatnya sebagai ampaian.

definition_en: to misbehave; to act in a naughty way
example_semai: Bah Selan kipet ikenon medei ikenon ajeh kicengor mase mong tengloh naihol nu madeg enai cinek.
example_en: Bah Selan hit his son because earlier that day, his son misbehaved when there were guests in their house.
example_ms: Bah Selan memukul anaknya kerana sebelum itu anaknya tersebut berkelakuan nakal semasa terdapat tetamu di rumah mereka.

example_semai: Menaleh hunen cengor ju pek enai joi ngrok mai raknak.
example_en: Nowadays girls are coquettes and they do not obey the advice of the elders.
example_ms: Gadis zaman sekarang suka menggoda dan mereka tidak patuh nasihat orang tua.

definition_en: a type of leaf used to roll the tobacco as cigarette
definition_ms: sejenis daun yang digunakan untuk membalut tembakau
example_semai: Mai raknak manah entem niaiuna selak cengrat naibalot bakau.
example_en: Older people in olden times were using cengrat leaves to roll tobacco.
example_ms: Orang tua dulu-dulu menggunakan daun cengrat bagi membalut tembakau.

example_semai: Wak Talia kibeli tepong cengroi, kaha-beh koi.
example_en: Wak Talia bought rice flour to make cakes.
example_ms: Wak Talia membeli tepung beras untuk membuat kuih.

definition_en: fingernail, toenail; hard part which grows at the end of human (and some animal) fingers or toes
definition_ms: kuku; benda keras yang tumbuh di hujung jari manusia dan sesetengah binatang
example_semai: Mambek menaleh naigemar gep hinei ku cengros.
example_en: Young girls nowadays like to use henna on their fingernails.
example_ms: Anak gadis suka memakai inai di kuku mereka.

example_semai: Mambek menaleh nai gemar becanggung cengros jog enai.
example_en: Girls love to color their toenails.
example_ms: Anak gadis suka mewarna kuku kaki mereka.

example_semai: Cengros teg Wak Bella ajeh caceh medei kena ya batu.
example_en: Wak Bella's fingernails were torn on a rock.
example_ms: Kuku jari tangan Wah Bella itu terkopek terkena batu.

definition_en: fraud who cheat, clever in lying
definition_ms: penipu; licik; seorang yang pandai menipu
example_semai: Peminte sedekah ajeh nekcennong, kipure-pure ilei capek dea mai biyayak neng ha ilei, padehal ilei bor.
example_en: The beggar is a fraud, he pretends to be lame so that others will feel sorry for him, but in fact he is healthy.
example_ms: Peminta sedekat tersebut adalah penipu, dia berpura-pura tempang supaya orang lain kasihan melihatnya, tetapi sebenarnya dia sihat.

example_semai: Wak Ngah mong jeoi icenok, mong 14 urag.
example_en: Wak Ngah has many grandchildren, 14 altogether.
example_ms: Wak Ngah mempunyai ramai cucu, 14 orang kesemuanya.

definition_ms: tiang; batang sama ada dari kayu, atau besi, dsbnya yang didirikan atau berdiri lurus menegak (Cth: tiang rumah, tiang eletrik, tiang bendera, dll)
example_semai: Deg Bah Kaling baru anen bicep icenol.
example_en: The pillars of Bah Kaling's house have just been erected.
example_ms: Tiang rumah Bah Kaling baharu sahaja didirikan.

definition_ms: simpang; sesuatu yang bercabang atau melencong dari yang lurus (jalan raya, sungai)
example_semai: "Nong ku kampug eng mong jeoi icentag nu deg-deg mai. Jadi, bile ya halei ku miknuj kampug jik, hatalipon eng ru eng doh ngnyong hek. Amen tok, doh senang harikroj," Bah Lan kipasal nu Bah Aril.
example_en: "There are many junctions on the road in my village, to access the villagers' houses. So, when you have reached the main entrance to my village, call me so I can pick you up. Otherwise, you will easily get lost," Bah Lan told Bah Aril.
example_ms: "Terdapat banyak simpang pada jalan di kampung untuk ke rumah-rumah para penduduk. Jadi, apabila kamu sudah sampai ke jalan masuk utama ke kampung saya, kamu hubungi saya supaya saya boleh menjemput kamu. Jika tidak, kamu akan mudah tersesat," Bah Lan memberitahu kepada Bah Aril.

definition_en: centong; traditional musical instrument made from bamboo, used in the sewang ceremony
definition_ms: centong; alat muzik tradisi dibuat daripada buluh yang digunakan semasa upacara sewang
example_semai: Centeg adeh selalo bibeh ju awat. Tapi hunen, ya mong mai de naiguna batag paep PVC medei lebeh tahan liu.
example_en: The Centong is usually made of bamboo. However, nowadays there are people who use PVC pipes because they are more durable than bamboo.
example_ms: Centong selalunya diperbuat dari buluh. Tetapi sekarang sudah terdapat orang yang menggunakan batang paip PVC kerana ianya lebih tahan lama berbanding buluh.

example_semai: Mai cina selalonya naiguna cenukas bile naicakcak.
example_en: The Chinese use chopsticks for eating.
example_ms: Orang cina selalunya menggunakan penyepit makanan ketika makan.

example_semai: Wak Lila kiceog bile ikenon sanget kiternol nu suig, paknyaneh ikenon ajeh kiternyol nu cep de tengah kihengheg.
