definition_ms: rama-rama Rajah Brooke; sejenis rama-rama yang berwarna hitam, hijau dan kuning
example_semai: "Hunen ya hajap hiha-bakek raje berok adeh, had ku taman rama-rama taleh buleh hibakek," ajok kiurok nu jik.
example_en: "Now it is difficult to find the Rajah Brooke butterfly, it can only be found at a butterfly farm," grandmother told us.
example_ms: "Sekarang susah hendak menjumpai rama-rama Rajah Brooke, cuma boleh ditemui di taman rama-rama sahaja," nenek berkata kepada kami.

definition_ms: rajin; gemar atau suka melakukan sesuatu perkerjaan
example_semai: Wak Maira ajeh rajet kitulog iamek beh kerjak deg.
example_en: Wak Maira diligently helped her mother with housework.
example_ms: Wak Maira rajin menolong ibunya membuat kerja rumah.

example_semai: Bah Samli kien ipanah ru rajot kak medei kaha-panah kak nu mateu.
example_en: Bah Samli brought a fishing spear and a sack (to put the fish in) because he wanted to spear fish at the river.
example_ms: Bah Samli membawa pemanah ikan dan karung ikan kerana mahu memanah ikan di sungai.

example_semai: Wak Sika kirakam video ikenon kiguna itelipon.
example_en: Wak Sika recorded a video of her son using her mobile phone.
example_ms: Wak Sika merakam video anaknya menggunakan telefon bimbitnya.

example_semai: Hat mai raknak taleh de biog muj nu wad ICU, sanget kurang dari 18 tahut biget muj.
example_en: Only adults are allowed to enter the ICU ward, but minors under the age of 18 are not allowed to enter.
example_ms: Hanya orang dewasa sahaja yang dibenarkan memasuki wad ICU, tetapi budak yang berumur kurang dari 18 tahun tidak dibenarkan memasukinya.

example_semai: Deg Bah Rilan nu itempat kerjak ihad iraknek, pek lei 5 minit ceknip jog ya buléh kilei nu itempat kerjak.
example_en: Bah Rilan's house is very close to his workplace, the distance is less than 5 minutes walk from his house.
example_ms: Rumah Bah Rilan sangat hampir dengan tempat kerjanya, tidak sampai sehingga 5 minit berjalan kaki dari rumahnya, beliau sudah boleh tiba ke tempat kerjanya.

example_semai: Wak Mira ajeh rakyat mai Malaysia, tapi igensir rakyat Thailand.
example_en: Wak Mira is a Malaysian citizen, but her husband is Thai.
example_ms: Wak Mira adalah rakyat Malaysia, tetapi suaminya berkerakyatan Thailand.

definition_en: hung up; caught on a hanger
example_semai: Wak Gina kijap medei ral ijog ku roda meskar.
example_en: Wak Gina cried because her foot got stuck on the bike wheel.
example_ms: Wak Gina menangis kerana kakinya tersangkut pada roda basikal.

definition_ms: mengacau; menggaul sesuatu sehingga bercampur betul
example_semai: Kuar igenuna ha raleh canak de pai bibercet.
example_en: A wooden spoon is used to stir freshly-cooked rice.
example_ms: Senduk kayu kegunaannya adalah untuk mengacau nasi yang baru dimasak.

example_semai: Bah Andi ajeh ramah isengoi.
example_en: Bah Andi is a friendly person.
example_ms: Bah Andi itu ramah orangnya.

definition_en: a type of tropical fruit which tastes sweet and sour
definition_ms: rambai; sejenis buah tropikal yang manis dan asam
example_semai: Bah Atan kiteh pelek ramei medei kaha-jual.
example_en: Bah Atan picked the rambai fruit (Baccaurea motleyana) because he wanted to sell it.
example_ms: Bah Atan memetik buah rambai kerana dia hendak menjualnya.

example_semai: Kuceg ajeh kitejaga ju ibuknet medei kikekjet ha engrok neramoh Bah Daus de kipan-ramoh kerana imoh pejet muj ya cas menasak sambal iamek.
example_en: The cat woke up from its sleep because it was surprised by the loud sound of Bah Daun sneezing. He was sneezing because his nose felt hot on account of the steam from his mother's cooking. She was cooking sambal.
example_ms: Kucing tersebut terjaga dari tidurnya kerana terkejut dengan bunyi Bah Daun yang terbersin dengan sangat kuat kerana hidungnya terasa pedas akibat wap dari masakan ibunya yang sedang memasak sambal.

example_semai: Bah Wan ru ikenah baikek rangas nu tik ienjop.
example_en: Bah Wan and his wife are looking for firewood in his grandmother's farm.
example_ms: Bah Wan dan isterinya mencari kayu api di kebun neneknya.

example_semai: Rangkal ku deg Bah Deli bibeh ju jehuk.
example_en: The stairs in Bah Deli's house are made of wood.
example_ms: Tangga di rumah Bah Deli diperbuat dari kayu.

example_semai: Bah Man ajeh jenis de rangkeng hamapen kuat icaknak.
example_en: Bah Man is a skinny type even though he is actually a big eater.
example_ms: Bah Man adalah jenis yang berbadan kurus kering walaupun sebenarnya dia seorang yang kuat makan.

example_semai: Bah Zainal kikot rantei mas ha iamek.
example_en: Bah Zainal bought a gold necklace for his mother.
example_ms: Bah Zainal membeli rantai emas untuk ibunya.

example_semai: Bah Lian kiraroh ha ikebon sempak.
example_en: Bah Lian is clearing underbrush at his durian orchard.
example_ms: Bah Lian menebas kebun duriannya.

example_semai: Wak Yani kirasa pek sedap iberog telas biceh ya manik mase kijog ju kerjak.
example_en: Wak Yani felt unwell after being in the rain when she was returning from work.
example_ms: Wak Yani merasa tidak sedap badan setelah ditimpa oleh hujan semasa pulang dari kerja.

example_semai: Bah Selah kitambah nij gula ku kateh iteh medei kirasa teh bahneh itenek ajeh beloj.
example_en: Bah Selah added more sugar to his tea because he felt that the tea made by his sister was tasteless.
example_ms: Bah Selah menambah lagi gula ke dalam tehnya kerana merasa teh yang dibuat oleh kakaknya tersebut adalah tawar.

definition_en: to eat sidedish (without eating rice together)
example_semai: Wak Sapi kiratah mor ha kak taleh, pek kicak canak.
example_en: Wah Sapi only eats the fish, she does eat the rice.
example_ms: Wah Sapi hanya memakan ikan sahaja, dia tidak memakan nasi.

definition_ms: sembarangan; siapa atau apa sahaja; sebarang apa sahaja asal ada
example_semai: Bah Rilan kipileh ratah bawang ku kedei ajeh medei ha kikedei nengneng ilei belok de bor, ilei belok de niknej.
example_en: Bah Rilan chose any onion available at the store because he did not know how to distinguish a good onion from a rotten one.
example_ms: Bah Rilan memilih sebarangan bawang yang terdapat di kedai tersebut kerana dia tidak tahu membezakan bawang yang masih baik dengan bawang yang sudah rosak.

example_semai: Bah Ulan kiog duet bantuan ju NGO ajeh had nu ratak keluarge ilei taleh, nu mai kilek pek kiog.
example_en: Bah Ulan only distributes the aid money from the NGOs  among his own family members, and does not give it to others.
example_ms: Bah Ulan hanya memberikan duit bantuan dari NGO cuma pada kalangan ahli keluarganya sendiri sahaja, dan tidak memberikannya kepada orang lain.

example_semai: Nong nu Bidor ajeh pek ratak, betampal-tampal inong.
example_en: The road to Bidor is uneven, the roads have been patched up.
example_ms: Jalan ke Bidor adalah tidak rata, jalannya bertampal-tampal.

example_semai: "Eng ngha-pinjam due ratos ju hek bulehka?" Bah Tila kisemanj nu ikenah.
example_en: "Can I borrow two hundred ringgit from you?" Bah Tila asked his wife.
example_ms: "Bolehkah saya meminjam dua ratus ringgit dari kamu?" Bah Tila meminta kepada isterinya.

example_semai: Tiap dui mong jeoi rau naihol nu kebon sawet naikek caknak.
example_en: Every evening many macaques come to the palm oil plantation to look for food.
example_ms: Pada setiap petang, terdapat banyak kera yang datang ke kebung sawit bagi mencari makanan.

example_semai: Ku Malaysia mong jeoi jenis raya, medei mong jeoi bangsa ru jeoi agame.
example_en: There are various kinds of celebration in Malaysia because there are multiple races and religions.
example_ms: Terdapat pelbagai jenis perayaan di negara Malaysia kerana terdapat pelbagai bilangan bangsa dan agama.

example_semai: Wak Tila bien nu hospitel medei ijog birebaj ya cok liar mase kijog ju isekulah.
example_en: Wak Tila was taken to the hospital when her leg was bitten by a wild dog on her way home from school.
example_ms: Wak Tila dibawa ke hospital kerana kakinya digigit oleh anjing liar semasa dia pulang dari sekolah.

example_semai: Nong nu Cameron Highland mong tik rebak, jadi nong nu majeh bitutop hunen.
example_en: There was a landslide on the road to Cameron Highlands, so the road is now closed.
example_ms: Terdapat kejadian tanah runtuh di jalan ke Cameron Highland, jadi jalan ke sana sekarang ditutup.

example_semai: Wak Milah kibercet rebog de biberkep ya iamek pegelap cinek.
example_en: Wak Milah cooked the bamboo shoots that had been obtained by her mother earlier that morning.
example_ms: Wak Milah memasak rebung yang diperolehi oleh ibunya pada waktu pagi.

definition_ms: radio; sejenis alat untuk mendengar lagu atau siaran suara
example_semai: Wak Santa kigemar cergai redio mase tengah kimasak. Kek kigemar ceringai siaran redio negeri Perak.
example_en: Wak Santa likes to listen to the radio while cooking. She likes to listen to Perak state radio broadcasts.
example_ms: Wak Santa suka mendengar radio semasa sedang memasak. Dia suka mendengar siaran radio negeri Perak.

definition_en: price; the cash value of goods or service
definition_ms: harga; nilai tunai sesuatu barang, keperluan atau perkhidmatan
example_semai: Bah Nan kibeli deg pai, iregak RM120 ribu.
example_en: Bah Nan bought a new house, the price was RM120 thousand.
example_ms: Bah Nan memberli rumah baharu, harganya ialah RM120 ribu.

example_semai: Bah Rilan kibeli seknep keromdog medei kipanei ingoi reh kuat amen pek kipakei ajeh.
example_en: Bah Rilan bought a deodorant for his armpits because he knew his armpits would smell foul if he did not use the deodorant.
example_ms: Bah Rilan membeli deodoran untuk ketiak kerana dia tahu, bau ketiaknya akan berbau kuat jika tidak menggunakan deodoran tersebut.

example_semai: Bah Abu kilog baju de ikale rehoi.
example_en: Bah Abu wore a yellow shirt.
example_ms: Bah Abu memakai baju yang berwarna kuning.

example_semai: Keneng jehuk bakau mong jeoi ireis ru beentoi-entoi.
example_en: Mangroves have a lot of big roots.
example_ms: Pokok bakau mempunyai banyak akar dan besar-besar belaka.

definition_en: to gnaw; to nibble; to eat bit by bit
definition_ms: unggis; menggigit sedikit-sedikit seperti arnab, tikus, anai-anai dan lain-lain
example_semai: Cenol cenglei abat ya karog mendei birej ya gerej.
example_en: The clothes post is already rotten because it has been eaten by termites.
example_ms: Tiang penyidai kain sudah reput kerana diunggis oleh anai-anai.

definition_ms: dekat; hampir; rapat; jarak yang tidak jauh
example_semai: Wak Cina kihod ikerjak ajeh rek ru ideg medei iamek ku padeg ajeh kinyik ru bok hentok ha jaga.
example_en: Wak Cina wants a job that is located near to her house, because her mother is at home sick and there is no one who can take care of her.
example_ms: Wak Cina mahu tempat kerjanya dekat dengan rumahnya, kerana ibunya yang terdapat di rumah sedang sakit dan tiada siapa yang boleh menjaganya.

definition_en: trivet; a base or resting spot of pot or pan
definition_ms: lekar; pengalas periuk atau kuali; pelapik periuk yang selalunya diperbuat dengan cara menganyam cebisan belahan batang pokok rotan atau buluh
example_semai: Wak Jaja kidek periok beket ku kemil rekal.
example_en: Wak Jaja placed a saucepan on the hot pad.
example_ms: Wak Jaja meletakkan periuk panas di atas lekar.

example_semai: "Hek mong reket? Amen mong, jok himain batminten," Wak Lili kiajaq nu Wak Iya.
example_en: "Do you have a badminton racket? If you have one, let's play badminton," Wak Lili invited Wak Iya.
example_ms: "Kamu ada raket badminton? Jika kamu mempunyainya, mari kita bermain badminton," Wak Lili mengajak Wak Iya.

definition_en: orphan; child whose parents have died

example_semai: "Abor, ku engkap semak ajeh mong rekop," ajok kipasal nu menang eng mase kikek beleg de jer ju ikeneng.
example_en: "Be careful, there is often an asian vine snake on that bush," my grandmother said to my sister when she was looking for a betel nut that had fallen from the tree.
example_ms: "Hati-hati, di semak tersebut selalunya terdapat ular lidi hijau," nenek berkata kepada adik saya yang mencari pinang yang jatuh dari pohonnya.

example_semai: "Relahet taleh ipinoi hirasa, kaha-manik gamak," Bah Gurek kipasal nu ikekawat mase tengah naitengroj.
example_en: "It feels cold, the wind is blowing, maybe it's going to rain soon," Bah Gurek said to his friends while they were fishing.
example_ms: "Dingin rasanya angin bertiup, barangkali hari mahu hujan," Bah Gurek berkata berkata kepada kawan-kawannya semasa mereka sedang memancing.

example_semai: "Cip neng, tah yama cok arok naijel sejaq cinek ku deg pog? Entah mong relai kimuj kaha-cak pengleg pog," Wak Samnah kipasal nu igensir.
example_en: "Go and see! Why have the dogs been barking for some time at the chicken coop? Maybe there is a python there and it wants to eat the chicken's eggs," Sak Samnah told her husband.
example_ms: "Pergi lihat, kenapa anjing tersebut menyalak sejak dari tadi di reban ayam? Mungkin terdapat ular sawa yang mahu memakan telur ayam," Sak Samnah memberitahu kepada suaminya.

example_semai: Wak Mila pek kihol nu kerjak ya niq ariiq medei pek kisihat. Kirasa beket iberog ru relanyut tengor ikui.
example_en: Wak Mila have not been to work for three days because she is not feeling well. She has a fever and her head is throbbing with dizziness.
example_ms: Sudah tiga hari Wak Mila tidak hadir bekerja kerana beliau tidak sihat. Beliau merasa badannya panas dan kepalanya pening berdenyut-denyut.

definition_en: to whisper; to speak softly so as to not be heard by other people
definition_ms: berbisik-bisik; bercakap perlahan supaya tidak didengari oleh orang lain
example_semai: "Relaunj seminbang ubai ajeh, tah ma bahrip de baiha-kerdik lei pek buleh bicerengai ya mai kilek," Wak Jenah kipasal nu igensir ha kekenon menaleh ubai.
example_en: "They are talking to each other in whispers, I wonder what they want to hide so that they cannot be heard by anyone else," Wak Jenah asked her husband about their daughters.
example_ms: "Mereka bersembang dengan berbibisik, entah apa yang mereka hendak rahsiakan sehingga tidak boleh didengari oleh orang lain," Wak Jenah memberitahu kepada suaminya mengenai anak-anak gadis mereka.

definition_en: to separate; to resolve a fight
example_semai: Bah Samdin as ikaming medei bitumbok mase kirelei mai begadoh ku itempat kerjak.
example_en: Bah Samdin's cheek was swollen as a result of being punched when he wanted to resolve a fight that took place at his workplace.
example_ms: Pipi Bah Samdin bengkak akibat ditumbuk semasa mahu meleraikan pergaduhan yang berlaku di tempat kerjanya.

example_semai: Bah Ian bipet ya iapak medei kiremeh cat de bor bisiap ku stor. Kitup dij cat ajeh nu ris.
example_en: Bah Ian was beaten by his father for playing with the paints that had been tidily put away in the storage room. He poured all the paints on the floor.
example_ms: Bah Ian kipukul oleh bapanya kerana mengusik cat yang telah elok-elok disimpan di stor. Dia menuang kesemua cat tersebut ke lantai.

example_semai: Wak Lili kigaol serbok remet ru empoj nu kak sebelom kigureng.
example_en: Wak Lili mixed the turmeric powder and salt with the fish before frying it.
example_ms: Wak Lili menggaul serbuk kunyit dan garam pada ikan sebelum menggorengnya.

definition_ms: rempah; sejenis bahan campuran (cth: kulit kayu manis, cengkih, buah pelaga, jintan manis, dll) untuk menyedapkan rasa sesuatu masakan; perasa makanan
example_semai: Bah Joe kigureng canuk kayu manis ru bunga lawang sebegei irempah, sebelom kiletak bawang ru iserbok kari mase kigulei ikari sej.
example_en: Bah Joe fried cinnamon and star anise first for spiciness, before adding onions and curry powder when he cooked the buffalo meat curry.
example_ms: Bah Joe menggoreng kayu manis dan bunga lawang terlebih dahulu sebagai rempah, sebelum memasukkan bawang dan serbuk kari semasa memasak gulai kari daging.

definition_en: to cane; to crush; to hit with a cane or a twig
definition_ms: merotan; melibas; memukul dengan menggunakan rotan atau ranting
example_semai: Wak Mia kirempet ikenon medei ha kidegil, kinyek jekjug hamapen iarik ya pukol dua belas kelem.
example_en: Wak Mia caned her son because he was stubborn, he did not want to go home even though it was twelve midnight.
example_ms: Wak Mia merotan anaknya kerana dia degil, tidak mahu pulang ke rumah walaupun sudah jam dua belas tengah malam.

definition_en: cnesmone javanica miq; a type of tree which has poisonous hair that causes skin problems
definition_ms: jelatang rusa; pokok beracun di mana apabila daunnya terkena pada kulit akan membuat kulit terasa pedih
example_semai: Wak Hani kijap medei kirasa ihad pelit ijog kena ya rempoi.
example_en: Wak Hani cried because her leg stung after touching the Cnesmone Javanica leaves.
example_ms: Wak Hani menangis kerana kakinya terasa sangat pedih akibat terkena daun jelatang rusa.

example_semai: Renes Wah Rina kutor kena ya lulog.
example_en: Wak Rina's face got dirty with mud.
example_ms: Muka Wah Rina kotor terkena lumpur.

example_semai: Baju Wak Salwa terok ya cat renganj mase naiseryap kerjak sekulah ha Pendidikan Seni.
example_en: Wak Salwa's shirt was stained by the red paint when they wanted to finish up the Art class' homework.
example_ms: Baju Wak Salwa terkena cat merah semasa mereka mahu meniyapakan kerja rumah bagi matapelajaran Pendididkan Seni.

example_semai: Kuceg Wak Tania ajeh ihad rengeh lei amen kigigei ku luar deg ku arik kelem, susah hiha-bakek ilei. Pernah nukali, ilei silap bilanggar ya meskar ku arik kelem medei pek bibakek kilintas nong.
example_en: Wak Tania's cat is so black that it is difficult to see it if the cat sits outside the house at night. The cat was accidentally hit by a bicycle at night because the person didn't see it crossing the road.
example_ms: Kucing milik Wak Tania itu sangat hitam sehingga susah untuk melihatnya jika ia duduk di luar rumah pada waktu malam. Kucing tersebut pernah tersilap dilanggar oleh basikal pada waktu malam kerana orang tidak dapat melihatnya melintas jalanraya.

example_semai: Bah Kudi ru ikekawat naipan-renggah cog mase naiberkep cog de naiha-guna ha bahneh deg pender.
example_en: Bah Kudi and his friends yanked the rattan as hard as they could when they wanted to get the rattan which they would use for making a hut.
example_ms: Bah Kudi dan rakan-rakannya menyentap rotan dengan sekuat-kuatnya semasa mereka mahu mendapatkan rotan-rotan yang akan digunakan bagi membuat pondok.

example_semai: Wak Melah reninen irenes begei renes iamek.
example_en: Wak Melah looks like her mother.
example_ms: Rupa Wak Melah seperti rupa ibunya.

example_semai: Renes Wak Manje ajeh selej, walah pek bermon.
example_en: Wak Manja's face is smooth without acne.
example_ms: Muka Wak Manja adalah licin tidak berjerawat.

example_semai: "Megot neh eng tok kep ngdekdak mandei renyah engrok mai berunggen," Wak Nina kipasal nu igensir.
example_en: "I could not sleep last night because the sound from the people who were partying was noisy," Wak Nina told her husband.
example_ms: "Malam tadi saya tidak dapat tidur kerana bising bunyi dari orang yang berjoget," Wak Nina memberitahu suaminya.

example_semai: "Wes agok renyah, apak kaha-bukbet," amek kibual nu jik.
example_en: "Don't make a noise, dad wants to sleep," mum told us.
example_ms: "Jangan bising, bapa mahu tidur," ibu berkata kepada kami.

example_semai: Bah Guni kisetet cereg ru kikep nik ikor, jadi isentol cereg ajeh kirep canuk sebelom kimasak isej.
example_en: Bah Guni catapulted squirrels and got three of them, then, the squirrels' hair was removed first by burning before the meat was cooked.
example_ms: Bah Guni melastik tupai dan mendapat sebanyak tiga ekor, jadi bulu tupai-tupai tersebut dibakar terlebih dahulu sebelum daging-dagingnya dimasak.

definition_en: to wade; to cross the river
example_semai: Bah Paya ru ikekawat naires teu naiha-et nu englag, naiha-sektet cep ku englag teu ateh.
example_en: Bah Paya and his friends crossed the river to the other side because they wanted to catapult birds on the other side of the river.
example_ms: Bah Paya dan kawan-kawannya meranduk sungai untuk ke seberang kerana mahu melastik burung di seberang sungai tersebut.

definition_ms: hidup; masih lagi bernyawa; tidak mati; masih bernafas
example_semai: Bah Meran kigemar tengroj. Kak de kikep selalo ha laok, tapi kak de tik res kibela ku kateh kulam ku deg ilei.
example_en: Bah Meran loves fishing. The fish he gets will usually be eaten but the fish that are still alive will be kept in the pond at his house.
example_ms: Bah Meran suka memancing. Ikan yang beliau dapat biasanya akan dimakan, tetapi ikan yang masih hidup akan dibela di dalam kolam yang terdapat di rumahnya.

example_semai: Bah Jali ru iperingak naikep reski ju kaknek cog ku serag.
example_en: Bah Jali and his family earn a living by looking for rattan at the jungle.
example_ms: Bah Jali dan keluarganaya memperolehi rezeki dengan mencari rotan di hutan.

example_semai: Wak Wani kiriag ha iperingak ku kampug medei ilei ya 4 gencek pek kijog nu kampug medei kikerakjak ku Pulau Pinang.
example_en: Wak Wani misses her family in the village. She has not returned to her village for 4 months now because she is working in Penang.
example_ms: Wak Wani merindui keluarganya di kampung kerana dia sudah 4 bulan tidak pulang ke kampungnya kerana bekerja di Pulau Pinang.

example_semai: Wak Asi beg riben ku hadiah ha hari jadi iamek.
example_en: Wak Asi tied a ribbon on a gift for his mother on the occasion of her birthday.
example_ms: Wak Asi mengikat riben pada hadiah untuk ibunya sempena harijadinya.

example_semai: Bah Wan kiet nu sekulah memandu kaha-beh lisen rida ha cengkor tik.
example_en: Bah Wan went to a driving school because he wanted to get a license to drive a ground digger tractor to excavate the soil.
example_ms: Bah Wan pergi ke sekolah memandu kerana ingin membuat lesen memandu traktor pengorek tanah.

example_semai: Wak Kila ru ikekawat naiberihat ku kerop jehuk telas dij naijinjaj ku kebon.
example_en: Wak Kila and her friends rested under a tree after finishing up weeding the grass at the garden.
example_ms: Wak Kila dan rakan-rakannya berehat di bawah pokok setelah selesai mencabut rumput di kebun.

example_semai: Memerip urag sanget kampug bicap ya pules medei nairikres mutu ku nong entoi.
example_en: Several teenagers from the village were arrested by the police because they illegally raced motorbikes on the road.
example_ms: Terdapat beberapa orang remaja kampung ditangkap oleh pihak polis kerana berlumba haram motosikal di jalanraya.

example_semai: Bah Suan imat rilan. Sebab ajeh iapak kicereg kek Bah Rilan.
example_en: Bah Suan has big eyes. That is why his father named him Bah Rilan.
example_ms: Bah Suan memiliki mata yang besar. Itulah sebabnya bapanya memanggil dia dengan nama Bah Rilan.

definition_en: all counted together; all of; both of
example_semai: Wak Ramlah kiog rimempat-empat kenon kuceg de pai yos ajeh nu ikawat medei ya mong jeoi kuceg ku deg enai.
example_en: Wak Ramlah gave all of the four newborn kittens to her friend because there were already many cats at her house.
example_ms: Wak Ramlah memberi keempat-empat ekor anak kucing yang baharu lahir tersebut kepada kawannya kerana di rumahnya sudah terdapat banyak kucing.

example_semai: Bah Kukag kirungel ikui bile biajak nu Gupeg ya Bah Bidi.
example_en: Bah Kukag shook his head when Bah Bidi invited him to accompany him to Gopeng town.
example_ms: Bah Kukag menggelengkan kepalanya semasa  Bah Bidi diajak keluar ke pekan Gopeng.

definition_en: to fan; to flap or wave to produce wind
example_semai: Bah Aril kiripoi iberog ya surat kabar medei kibeket.
example_en: Bah Aril fanned his body with the newspaper because of the heat.
example_ms: Bah Aril mengipas badannya dengan surat khabar kerana kepanasan.

example_semai: Bah Sali kiripot nu cikgu ha ikekawat naiponteng sekulah.
example_en: Bah Sali reported to the teacher that his friends were skipping school.
example_ms: Bah Sali melapor kepada guru bahawa kawan-kawannya ponteng sekolah.

definition_en: floor; the floor of the house either made by cement, wood, plywood, bamboo, or etc.
definition_ms: lantai; dasar rumah yang diperbuat dari simen, kayu, papan, buluh, dsbnya
example_semai: Ris deg Bah Man ajeh ris cengkar.
example_en: The floor of Bah Man's house is made from bamboo.
example_ms: Lantai rumah Bah Man adalah lantai buluh.

example_semai: Wak Salwa kirisau ha ikenon de pekseg kijug nu madeg hamapen iarik ya kelem.
example_en: Wak Salwa is worried about his son who has not returned home even though it is already night.
example_ms: Wak Salwa risau akan anaknya yang belum pulang ke rumah walaupun hari sudah malam.

example_semai: Bah Man ajeh numom aska. Tiap kali kaha-muj nu serag, mesti biog risen.
example_en: Bah Man is a soldier. Every time he goes to the forest, he will be supplied with food rations.
example_ms: Bah Man adalah seorang askar. Setiap kali dia akan ke hutan, dia mesti akan dibekalkan dengan resen makanan.

definition_ms: perah; memerah (berkenaan dengan sesuatu yang mengandungi cecair. Cth: air dari kain yang basah, dsb)
example_semai: Wak Ria kirit iabat de pai kisah sebelom kitil medei kihod aderas sot.
example_en: Wah Ria wrung the clothes she had just washed before drying them because she wanted them to dry quickly.
example_ms: Wah Ria memerah kain-kain yang baharu dibasuhnya sebelum menjemurnya kerana dia mahu kain-kain tersebut cepat mengering.

example_semai: Bah Suan kirog lubang singki ya jehuk medei kiseksog ya minyak ru sise caknak.
example_en: Bah Suan poked the plug hole in the sink with a piece of wood because it was clogged with oil and food waste.
example_ms: Bah Suan menjolok lubang sinki dengan kayu kerana ianya tersumbat oleh minyak dan sisa makanan.

example_semai: Bah Nila kien ikekenon-kenah rahroh nu Pulau Pinang ku mase musem cuti sekulah.
example_en: Bah Nila took his wife and children for sightseeing to Penang during the school holiday.
example_ms: Bah Nila membawa anak-anak dan isterinya berjalan-jalan ke Pulau Pinang semasa musim cuti persekolahan.

definition_en: to slash; to cut down; to clear undergrowth
example_semai: Bah Kuan kiroh itik sempak sebelom musem sempak kitiba.
example_en: Bah Kuan cut down the bushes and the weeds in his durian orchard before the durian season arrived.
example_ms: Bah Kuan menebas semak dan lalang di kebun duriannya sebelum musim durian menjelang tiba.

example_semai: Wak Manik kitup teh de ku kateh jag ajeh medei bimuj ya roi.
example_en: Wak Manik threw the tea in the jug away because flies had got in it.
example_ms: Wak Manik membuang teh yang didalam jag tersebut kerana ianya telah dimasuki oleh lalat.

definition_en: to remove; to pull out; to extract
definition_ms: cabut; mencabut; menarik sesuatu keluar dari dasar atau pangkalnya
example_semai: Wak Cici pek lalu kaha-roj rumpot ajeh kihalei ku arik ajeh, jadi kisambong nij ku arik huper.
example_en: Wak Cici won't be able to finish pulling out the grass by herself on that day, so she will continue on the next day.
example_ms: Wak Cici tidak mampu menghabiskan mencabut rumput tersebut seorang diri pada hari tersebut, jadi dia akan menyambungnya pada keesokan harinya pula.

example_semai: Bah Cindy ru ikekawat nairoj ku pekan Taiping mase naiha-et nu zu.
example_en: Bah Cindy and his friends got lost in Taiping town when they were wanting to go to the zoo.
example_ms: Bah Cindy dan rakan-rakannya sesat di pekan Taiping semasa mahu ke zoo.

example_semai: Wak Bibah kirok ha imenang medei ha bisoh iarap.
example_en: Wak Bibah scolded her sister for rummaging through her belongings.
example_ms: Wak Bibah memarahi adiknya kerana menyelongkar barang-barangnya.

definition_en: to grope for; to search blindly or uncertainly by feeling with the hands
definition_ms: menggagau (ikan, udang dll); menangkap (ikan, udang) dengan cara menuba menggunakan akar tuba dll.
example_semai: Mambek ranak naigemar rop kak ku bendang.
example_en: Old people like to grope for fish in padi fields.
example_ms: Orang tua suka menggagau ikan di dalam sawah.

example_semai: "Hahol ru bok?" amek kitanya nu Wak Sali mase ubai teserempak ku pasaraya.
example_en: "Who did you come with?" mother asked Wak Sali as they bumped into each other in the supermarket.
example_ms: "Kamu datang dengan siapa?" ibu bertanya kepada Wak Sali semasa mereka saling terserempak di pasaraya.

example_semai: Sebelom kijog nu imadeg, Bah Lee kisingah nu kedei kaha-beli empoj ru gula.
example_en: Bah Lee stopped by the store to buy salt and sugar before returning home,
example_ms: Sebelum pulang ke rumah, Bah Lee singgah ke kedai untuk membeli garam dan gula.

example_semai: Wak Tina kiruah ten saden kiguna yoj.
example_en: Wak Tina opened the can of sardines using a knife.
example_ms: Wak Tina membuka tin sardin menggunakan pisau.

example_semai: Petue manah mai engrak, naiurok amen hod deras bor luka, hod cak kak ruan.
example_en: Tip from elderly people long ago: they said, if you want the wound to heal quickly, you should eat the snakehead fish.
example_ms: Petua orang tua lama dahulu, katanya jika mahu luka cepat sembuh, harus makan ikan haruan.

definition_en: to sow; to scatter; to disseminate; to disperse
example_semai: Wak Kila kirui caknak pog ku laman.
example_en: Wak Kila is scattering food for the chickens in the yard.
example_ms: Wak Kila menabur makanan ayam di halaman rumah.

definition_en: uncomfortable; restlessness; restless; miserable condition, concerning the feelings of the soul
definition_ms: rimas; tidak selesa; gelisah; resah; tidak tenteram keadaanya; berkenaan dengan perasaan jiwa
example_semai: Wak Maria kitas isog patik, kaha-merek begei ha sog keral ha bilir kiruis sog cereg.
example_en: Wak Maria cut her hair short, almost like a man's because she felt uncomfortable with long hair.
example_ms: Wak Maria memotong rambutnya menjadi pendek, hampir seperti rambut lelaki kerana rimas berambut panjang.

example_semai: Bah Ani kinyuk rukok ku luar deg medei mong ikenon sanget ku kateh deg.
example_en: Bah Ani smokes cigarettes outside the house because his child, who is still small, is inside.
example_ms: Bah Ani menghisap rokok di luar rumah kerana terdapat anaknya yang masih kecil di dalam rumah.

example_semai: "Kenon eng ajeh pai kibelajar rul," Wak Lini kipasal nu Wak Yoshi.
example_en: "My son has just learned to crawl," Wak Lini told Wak Yoshi.
example_ms: "Anak saya baru saja belajar merangkak," Wak Lini memberitahu kepada Wak Yoshi.

definition_en: to shake head as a sign of not wanting or not agreeing
definition_ms: menggelengkan kepala tanda tidak mahu atau tidak setuju
example_semai: Wak Samnah kirungel ikui bile bitanya kaha-cakcakka tok.
example_en: Wak Samnah shook her head when asked if she wanted to eat or not.
example_ms: Wak Samnah menggelengkan kepalanya bila ditanya samada dia mahu makan ataupun tidak.

example_semai: Ku tiap arik Saptu, mesti mong runggen ku kampug mai hik.
example_en: Every Saturday, there must be a dance party in Orang Asli village.
example_ms: Pada setiap hari Sabtu, mesti terdapat pesta joget di kampung Orang Asli.

example_semai: Wak Lidia kiberunggen bile kicerengai lagu dangdut bipasag.
example_en: Wah Lidia danced when she heard a dangdut melody being played.
example_ms: Wah Lidia berjoget bila mendengar lagu dangdut dimainkan.

example_semai: Bah Milan kiet kibakek dokte medei ha nyik irungkog.
example_en: Bah Milan went to see a doctor because his throat hurt.
example_ms: Bah Milan pergi berjumpa dengan doktor kerana kerongkongnya sakit.

example_semai: Wak Sila kijap medei isog birunj ya imenang keral.
example_en: Wak Sila cried because her little brother pulled her hair.
example_ms: Wak Sila menangis kerana rambutnya ditarik oleh adik lelakinya.

example_semai: Jap dui Wak Bibah kirup os medei kinyek ha kemet.
example_en: Every evening, Wak Bibah started a fire because he wanted to repel the mosquitoes.
example_ms: Pada setiap petang, Wak Bibah menghidupkan api kerana mahu menghalau nyamuk.

example_semai: Sedap sej rusa amen bimasak kari.
example_en: Deer meat is delicious if cooked with curry.
example_ms: Daging rusa sedap jika dimasak kari.

example_semai: Jap pegelap, Wak Salwa kigemar cak ruti de bisapu ru planta.
example_en: Wak Salwa likes to eat bread with margarine every morning.
example_ms: Wak Salwa suka memakan roti yang disapu dengan planta pada setiap pagi.

definition_ms: sabar; tabah menghadapi sesuatu rintangan atau pencubaan; dalam keadaan tenang dan bersifat tidak lekas marah
example_semai: Bah Duan kikerakdik, kisabar pek kibual ma-ma bile binyeh ya ikekawat sekulah, ilei ajeh niknij begei ha dog.
example_en: Bah Duan remained silent and patient without saying anything when his schoolmates mocked him saying he was as ugly as a monkey.
example_ms: Bah Duan berdiam dan bersabar tidak berkata apa-apa apabila diejek oleh rakan-rakan sekolahnya bahawa dia itu hodoh seperti monyet.

definition_en: to suspect; to doubt; to presume; to guess
example_semai: Bah Kadi kipet ha ikenah medei kisabek ikenah mong hubungan sulet ru keral kilek.
example_en: Bah Kadi beat his wife because he suspected she was having an affair with another man.
example_ms: Bah Kadi memukul isterinya kerana dia syak isterinya mempunyai hubungan sulit dengan lelaki lain.

definition_ms: sabit; sejenis pisau yang selalunya digunakan untuk memotong rumput. Biasanya pisau ini berbentuk melengkung dan mempunyai pelbagai saiz.

example_semai: Bah Ali kisuj imutu kiguna sabon serbok ha sahnah abat.
example_en: Bah Ali washed his motorcycle with a soap powder.
example_ms: Bah Ali membasuh motosikalnya menggunakan sabun serbuk pencuci pakaian.

definition_ms: kabur; tidak dapat melihat dengan jelas dan terang
example_semai: Bah Itam kiet nu kedei speg mat, kaha-beh speg medei imat ya sabor kerana ilei ya guengrak.
example_en: Bah Itam went to the optometrist to make some glasses because his vision was blurred due to aging.
example_ms: Bah Itam pergi ke kedai cermin mata untuk membuat cermin mata kerana matanya sudah kabur akibat sudah meningkat tua.

definition_ms: ikan sardin; sejenis ikan laut dalam
example_semai: Wak Maria kimasak kak saden ha laok caknak tengah arik.
example_en: Wak Maria is cooking sardines as the side-dish for lunch.
example_ms: Wak Maria memasak ikan sardin sebagai lauk makanan tengah hari.

definition_ms: awan; wap air yang bergumpal-gumpal di langit
example_semai: Ku Cameron Highland hineng isagop ajeh kiceleh nu kerop lod telas manik kihoj.
example_en: In the Cameron Highlands the clouds descend over the mountains after it stops raining.
example_ms: Di Cameron Highland, akan kelihatan awan turun meliputi gunung selepas  hujan turun.

definition_en: to wash something such as cloth, clothes or hair
definition_ms: membasuh sesuatu lembaran seperti kain, pakaian atau rambut
example_semai: Wak Salwa ru iamek ubai sah kapet ku teu entoi.
example_en: Wak Salwa and his mother washed the carpet in the river.
example_ms: Wak Salwa dan ibunya membasuh karpet di sungai.

example_semai: Ubai Wak Tina ru Bah Mino ya sah baibekenah-gensir.
example_en: Wak Tina and Bah Mino have legally become husband and wife.
example_ms: Wak Tina dan Bah Mino telah sah bergelar suami isteri.

definition_ms: menyeret; menarik sesuatu bergerak ke suatu arah yang lain
example_semai: Jog mije ajeh papeh mase Wak Melati kisaher mije ajeh ju ruang tamu nu deg wal.
example_en: One of table's leg broke when Wak Melai dragged the table from the living room to the kitchen.
example_ms: Kaki meja tersebut menjadi patah semasa Wak Melai menyeret meja tersebut dari ruang tamu ke dapur.

example_semai: Bah Milo kidek butol sos ajeh sahreh medei kihot isos ajeh naijer nu iempag butol dea senang kiperhol.
example_en: Bah Milo placed the bottle of chili sauce upside down so that the sauce will fall to the mouth of the bottle so that it would be easier for him to extract it.
example_ms: Bah Milo meletakkan botol sos cili secara terbalik supaya sosnya jatuh ke bibir botol tersebut supaya senang untuk beliau mengeluarkannya.

definition_ms: tandatangan; pengenalan diri seseorang yang diturunkan atau ditulis atau ditanda dengan cap jari sebagai pengesahan tuan empunya hak bagi sesuatu dokumen atau pelbagai urusan
example_semai: Bah Sani pek kikep bantuan ju kerajaan negeri medei iborang pek mong sain ju penghulu kampug.
example_en: Bah Sani did not receive financial assistance from the state government because his application form did not contain the signature of the village headman.
example_ms: Bah Sani tidak mendapat bantuan kewangan dari kerajaan negeri kerana borang pemohonannya tidak mengandungi tandatangan dari penghulu kampung.

example_semai: Siti kinyek besain surat kebenaran ha igensir kaha-bekenah nanek nij.
example_en: Siti does not want to sign a letter of permission for her husband to marry another woman.
example_ms: Siti tidak mahu menandatangani surat kebenaran untuk suaminya berkahwin baharu.

example_semai: Bah Rilan saje kihol nu itempat kerjak awal medei kinyek doh sesak inong ya jem amen kihol ju kendeg lingah.
example_en: Bah Rilan came to work early on purpose to avoid traffic jams if he left the house later.
example_ms: Bah Rilan sengaja datang awal ke tempat kerja bagi mengelakan kesesakan jalanraya jika keluar lebih lewat dari rumah.

definition_ms: sarjan; pangkat dalam angkatan tentera atau polis dll yang lebih tinggi daripada koperal dan dilambangkan dengan tiga jalur
example_semai: Gecek keknit doh Wak Lila biperhuj ipangkat nu sajen.
example_en: Next month, Wak Lila will be promoted to the rank of sergeant.
example_ms: Pada bulan hadapan, Wak Lila akan dinaikkan pangkat ke pangkat sarjan.

example_semai: Wak Nila kisak ikenon litau kinyok rukok medei ingoi cektat ku ibaju sekulah.
example_en: Wak Nila suspects her son is smoking cigarettes because there is a smell of cigarette smoke on his school uniform.
example_ms: Wak Nila mengesyaki anak lelakinya menghisap rokok kerana terdapat bau asap rokok pada baju sekolahnya.

example_semai: Wak Pera kijap medei bisakal ya itenek de cengor.
example_en: Wak Pera was crying because her head had been punched by his naughty brother.
example_ms: Wak Pera menangis kerana disekeh oleh abangnya yang nakal.

definition_en: to rag; to tease in order to make someone scared or crying
definition_ms: menyakat supaya menjadi takut, menangis, dsb.
example_semai: Bah Ajis kigemar besakat ha ianak buah lei naijap.
example_en: Bah Ajis likes to tease his nephews and nieces until they cry.
example_ms: Bah Ajis suka menyakat anak-anak buahnya dia sehingga mereka menangis.

definition_en: fruit skin; animal skin or shell
example_semai: Wak Melati kipej sakop udang nu luar deg dea bicak ya cok.
example_en: Wak Melati throws shrimp shells outside the house to be eaten by dogs.
example_ms: Wak Melati membuang kulit udang di luar rumah supaya dimakan oleh anjing.

definition_ms: pemetik api; sejenis alat untuk menyalakan api
example_semai: Wak Lela kiguna sakpik kitod ha sampah.
example_en: Wak Lela uses a lighter to burn the trash.
example_ms: Wak Lela menggunakan pemetik api untuk membakar sampah.

example_semai: Bah Kali birok ya iamek medei salah kiije muh ilei sendiri ku ibob sekulah.
example_en: Bah Kali was scolded by his mother for spelling his own name wrong in his school book.
example_ms: Bah Kali dimarahi oleh ibunya kerana salah mengeja namanya sendiri di buku sekolahnya.

definition_en: thorny palm; a type of fruit of jungle palm tree
example_semai: Hunen ya hajap hiha-berkep pelek salak medei ya jeoi tik bibuka ha tik ceber ru tik sawet. Amen hiet nu jeres, baru mong enggamak.
example_en: Now it is getting harder and harder to get the thorny palm fruit because most of the land has been cleared for rubber plantations and oil palm plantations. We can maybe find it if we go to the forest.
example_ms: Sekarang sudah semakin susah untuk mendapatkan buah salak kerana sudah banyak tanah yang diterokai bagi kebun getah dan kebun sawit. Mungkin kita dapat menjumpainya jika ke hutan.

definition_ms: salai; makanan (seperti daging, ikan, dsb.) yang dikeringkan di atas api
example_semai: Wak Ati kimasak kak salei ajeh kibeh masak lemak.
example_en: Wak Ati is cooking the smoked fish with the coconut milk.
example_ms: Wak Ati memasak ikan salai tersebut dengan membuat masak lemak.

definition_en: to change clothes; to shed skin (for animal, like snake)
example_semai: Bah Rika biles ya iamek medei kisalet ibaju telas kimain bula tapi pek kimamuh canuk.
example_en: Bah Rika was scolded by his mother because he changed his shirt after playing football but did not take a shower first.
example_ms: Bah Rika dimarahi oleh ibunya kerana menyalin bajunya setelah bermain bola sepak tetapi tidak mandi terlebih dahulu.

definition_ms: tergelincir; terjatuh akibat terpijak benda atau permukaan yang licin
example_semai: Wak Ami bien nu hospitel telas kisalur ku deg mahnuh.
example_en: Wak Ami was taken to the hospital after slipping in the bathroom.
example_ms: Wak Ami dibawa ke hospital setelah tergelincir di dalam bilik mandi.

example_semai: Bah Wan ru Bah Ian ajeh kerbar ru renes ubai ayat sama, susah hiha-beza ilei belok itek, ilei belok imenang.
example_en: Bah Wan and Bah Ian are twins and their outlook is the same. It is difficult to distinguish which is the older and which the younger.
example_ms: Bah Wan dan Bah Ian adalah kembar dan paras mereka adalah sama dan susah untuk membezakan yang mana satu abang, yang mana satu adik.

definition_en: sambal, a generic name for food with cili papper as the base
definition_ms: sambal; nama umum bagi makanan berasakan cili
example_semai: Bah Loli had kimasak sambal kak mileh ha icaknak tengah arik. Kimasak ringkas taleh medei ha kibujang.
example_en: Bah Loli only cooked anchovy sambal as a side-dish for lunch. He cooked simple food because he is still single.
example_ms: Bah Loli cuma memasak sambal ikan bilis sebagai lauk makan tengah hari. Dia memasak dengan ringkas sahaja kerana dia masih bujang.

definition_ms: beruang; sejenis binatang buas yang biasanya berbulu panjang dan berkuku tajam serta bersaiz besar
example_semai: Ku kebon sempak Bah Tilut mong bibakek samiw kicak sempak de jer.
example_en: People have seen a bear eating the durians that have fallen on the ground at Bah Tilut's durian orchard.
example_ms: Orang ada melihat beruang memakan durian yang jatuh ke tanah di kebun durian Bah Tilut.

definition_ms: sampah; bahan sisa atau benda yang dibuang kerana tidak digunakan atau diperlukan lagi
example_semai: Bah Kuan kisapu sampah de bipej majeh-manen ya mai de belalu ku depan ikedei.
example_en: Bah Kuan is sweeping up the rubbish that has been thrown away by the people that pass by in front of his shop.
example_ms: Bah Kuan menyapu sampah yang dibuang merata-rata oleh orang yang berlalu-lalang di hadapan kedainya.

example_semai: Sampei hunen Wak Mia pek kibesimbang ru Wak Ria telas ubai bejawab minggu padehjeh.
example_en: Until now, Wak Mia has not talked to Wak Ria, after they had an argument last week.
example_ms: Sehingga sekarang Wak Mia tidak bertegur sapa dengan Wak Ria selepas mereka bertengkar pada minggu lepas.

definition_ms: berselimut; menutup separuh atau keseluruhan anggota tubuh badan dari kepala sehingga ke hujung kaki dengan selimut
example_semai: Bah Roro kisamuk dij iberok medei kirasa ihad sengij ku kelem ajeh.
example_en: Bah Roro covered his whole body with a blanket because he felt very cold that night.
example_ms: Bah Roro menyelimuti keseluruhan badannya kerana merasa sangat sejuk pada malam tersebut.

definition_en: to welcome; to receive; to celebrate; to observe
definition_ms: sambut; menerima atau mengalu-alukan kehadiran seseorang atau tetamu
example_semai: Wak Jira kisamut bor teniba pelajar-pelajar ju Korea nu imadeg.
example_en: Wak Jira welcomed the arrival of the students from Korea to her house.
example_ms: Wak Jira menerima dengan baik kedatangan pelajar-pelajar dari Korea ke rumahnya.

definition_ms: menerima, menadah atau menangkap sesuatu dengan tangan
example_semai: "Kenon hek ya panei besamut bula hamapen ilei pai nutahut lebeh iumor," Wak Julai kipasal nu Wak Lini.
example_en: "Your son is good at catching the ball even though he is just over a year old," Wak Julai told Wak Lini.
example_ms: "Anak kamu sudah pandai menyambut bola walaupun umurnya baharu mencecah setahun lebih," Wak Julai berkata kepada Wak Lini.

example_semai: "Jik jisamut arik raya puase ru arik Krismas ku deg jik medei mong numom tenek eng de Islam, ru numom nij de Kristian," Wak Maria kipasal nu ikawat keral.
example_en: "We celebrate Eid and Christmas at our house because I have a Muslim sister and a Christian brother," Wak Maria told her boyfriend.
example_ms: "Kami menyambut perayaan hari raya puasa dan hari Krismas di rumah kami kerana terdapat seorang kakak saya yang beragama Islam dan seorang abang saya yang beragama Kristian," Wak Maria memberitahu kepada teman lelakinya.

example_semai: Wak Lila kimasak sang kak kembong kaha-bercak ikuceg.
example_en: Wak Lila cooks mackerel fish's gills as food for her cats.
example_ms: Wak Lila memasak insang ikan kembung sebagai makan kucingnya.

definition_ms: tudung saji; penutup makanan bagi mengelakkan makanan dari tercemar
example_semai: Wak Mawar kitutop caknak de mong ku kemil mije ya sangei medei kinyek doh bitop ya roi.
example_en: Wak Mawar covered the food on the table with a food cover because she did not want the flies to land on it.
example_ms: Wak Mawar menutup makanan yang terdapat di atas meja menggunakan tudung saji kerana tidak mahu ianya dihinggapi oleh lalat.

definition_en: child; children; minor, a person who is still legally minor
example_semai: Mong jeoi mambek sanget ku deg Bah Selah medei kek kibeh harijadi ikenon.
example_en: There were many children in Bah Selah's house because he was celebrating his son's birthday.
example_ms: Terdapat ramai kanak-kanak di rumah Bah Selah kerana dia membuat sambutan harijadi anaknya.

definition_ms: takat; had; paras; sampai pada takat yang tertentu
example_semai: "Kelemnek kimanik ihad lebat lei teu ku englag deg jik ajeh ya kihuj lei nu sangkat rengkal deg jik. Ihat jisengoh doh jadi beag," Bah Kamil kipasal nu ikekawat kerjak.
example_en: "Yesterday it rained so hard that the river to the side of our house overflowed to the level of the stairs at the enterance. We are very afraid of floods happening," Bah Kamil told his colleagues.
example_ms: "Semalam hujan dengan sangat lebat sehingga sungai yang terdapat di tepi rumah kami melimpah sehingga paras tangga di rumah kami. Kami sangat takut banjir akan terjadi," Bah Kamil memberitahu kepada kawan-kawan sekerjanya.

definition_en: to be scared; to be afraid
definition_ms: takut; rasa gementar kerana bimbangkan sesuatu perkara yang dianggap akan membahayakan keselamatan diri
example_semai: Wak Gina kisangoh ha tabeg.
example_en: Wak Gina is afraid of frogs.
example_ms: Wak Gina takut terhadap katak.

definition_ms: dirasuki; badan dimasuki oleh roh jahat
example_semai: Wak Lala bisangrog ya nyanik telas kijog ku ceknop danan iamek jop.
example_en: Wak Lala was possessed by an evil spirit after returning home from her grandmother's funeral.
example_ms: Wak Lala dirasuki oleh roh jahat setelah pulang dari upacara pengkebumian neneknya.

definition_en: coiffure; knot of hair; hair bun
example_semai: Sangul sog Wak Jaja kitateg bijonj ya imenang.
example_en: Wak Jaja's bun came off after her brother pulled in.
example_ms: Sanggul Wak Jaja tertanggal selepas ditarik oleh adiknya.

example_semai: Wak Ani kisangul isog medei ha kibeket.
example_en: Wak Ani twisted her hair into a bun because of the heat.
example_ms: Wak Ani menyanggul rambutnya kerana kepanasan.

example_semai: Mai Kristian naipecaya Kelog Santen ajeh Kelog Jenang.
example_en: Christians believe that the Holy Spirit is the Spirit of God.
example_ms: Orang yang beragama Kristian mempercayai bahawa Roh Kudus adalah Roh Allah.

definition_en: scoop; a type of device with a net often used to catch fish
definition_ms: sauk; sejenis alat yang berjaring dan sering digunakan untuk menangkap ikan
example_semai: Mabek sanget naibekarau telas naibakek tijik mase tengah naibesaok kenon kak ku pateu.
example_en: The children screamed after seeing a snake while they were using a scoop-net to catch small fish in the river.
example_ms: Para kanak-kanak menjerit selepas ternampak ular semasa mereka sedang menyauk anak ikan di sungai.

definition_en: small hut with no floor built in the jungle
definition_ms: pondok yang kecil yang tidak berlantai yang didirikan di dalam hutan
example_semai: Bah Bidin kibeh deg sapau ku ibelakang deg sebegei tempat kaha-rag kak.
example_en: Bah Bidin built a hut at the back of his house to use as a place to grill fish.
example_ms: Bah Bidin membina pondok di belakang rumahnya sebagai tempat untuk membakar ikan.

example_semai: Jap jis Sabtu ru minggu, pejabat-pejabat kerajaan bitutop.
example_en: Government offices are closed every Saturday and Sunday.
example_ms: Pejabat-pejabat kerajaan ditutup pada setiap hari Sabtu dan Ahad.

definition_ms: menyapu; membersihkan kekotoran dengan menggunakan sesuatu penyapu, kain dsb.
example_semai: Wak Bibah kisapu ideg medei jeoi paser ju mabek sanget de naimuj-hol pek bekasot.
example_en: Wak Bibah swept his house because there was a lot of sand due to her children going in and out of the house barefoot.
example_ms: Wak Bibah menyapu rumahnya kerana terdapat banyak pasir dari anak-anaknya yang keluar-masuk ke rumah berkaki ayam.

definition_ms: menyapu; melumurkan; memalitkan dengan sesuatu seperti cat, perwarna dll pada sesuatu permukaan
example_semai: Wak Jira kisapu losen ku iteg ru ijog telas kimamuh.
example_en: Wak Jira applied a lotion to her hands and feet after taking a shower.
example_ms: Wak Jira menyapu losyen di tangan dan kakinya setelah mandi.

definition_ms: sarang; tempat tinggal serangga atau binatang seperti burung, semut, tebuan, dll.
example_semai: Bah Deli kitod sarag senej ku keneng legos ku beg ideg medei kisengoh doh naisej ikekenon.
example_en: Bah Deli burned the venomous bees' nest which was in the rambutan tree by the side of his house for fear that it would sting his children.
example_ms: Bah Deli membakar sarang penyengat yang terdapat pada pokok rambutan di tepi rumahnya kerana risau ianya akan menyengat anak-anaknya.

definition_ms: terserah; diserahkan kepada sesuatu keadaan atau keputusan berdasarkan pengertian dan persetujuan bersama berkenaan dengan sesuatu perkara
example_semai: Wak Ani pek kipeduli, sarak nu igensir nu belok doh naibeh deg telas ubai pencen ju kerjak liubai.
example_en: Wak Ani did not mind and was submissive to her husband when deciding where they would build the house after they both retired from their respective jobs.
example_ms: Wak Ani tidak kisah dan berserah kepada suaminya untuk memutuskan dimana mereka akan membuat rumah setelah mereka berdua pencen dari kerja masing-masing.

example_semai: Tik penep kemoj Bah Sedi ajeh ya sarep.
example_en: The ground of the late Bah Sadi' grave has been sunken.
example_ms: Tanah kubur mendiang Bah Sadi sudah runtuh.

example_semai: "Sarik anoh juga ngjug nu kampug amen mong mai nyenngyong ha eng," Wak Ani kiurok nu iamek ku kateh talipon.
example_en: "Right now I will return to the village if someone comes to pick me up," Wak Ani said to his mother by phone.
example_ms: "Sekarang ini juga saya akan balik ke kampung sekiranya ada orang yang datang mengambil saya," Wak Ani berkata kepada ibunya melalui telefon.

example_semai: Bah Pelan kikos sarik ju ibuknet telas kicerengai engrok ijam luceng.
example_en: Bah Plan immediately woke up after hearing the sound from his alarm clock.
example_ms: Bah Pelan segera bangun dari tidur selepas mendengar bunyi jam locengnya.

example_semai: Bah Mika kisah isarong bantal, isarong tilam ru iabat medei ya berngoi.
example_en: Bah Mika washed his pillowcase, mattress cover and blanket because they smelled bad.
example_ms: Bah Mika membasuh sarung bantal, sarung tilam dan selimutnya kerana ianya sudah berbau.

example_semai: Seluar Bah Jali kutor kena ya teu kupi de saruk kerana kitapes icawan ya teg ilei sendiri.
example_en: Bah Jali's pants became dirty with a coffee stain spilt over as a consequence of him accidentally shaking the cup off with his hand.
example_ms: Seluar Bah Jali menjadi kotor setelah terkena air kopi yang tertumpah akibat cawan kopi yang tertepis oleh tangannya sendiri.

definition_en: hampala fish; a type of fresh water fish
definition_ms: ikan sebarau; sejenis ikan air tawar

definition_en: blowdart with a lot of poison on it, used to hunt larger animals
definition_ms: damak yang ada banyak racun, diguna untuk memburu binatang besar

example_semai: Wak Pura kisat yoj ku ipelog deg dea pek lei biha-kot ya ikenon de sanget.
example_en: Wak Pura inserted a knife on the roof of her house so that it could not be reached by her young son.
example_ms: Wak Pura menyisip pisau di atap rumahnya supaya ianya tidak dapat dicapai oleh anaknya yang masih kecil.

definition_ms: sate; sejenis makanan dengan potongan daging bersaiz kecil yang dicucuk dengan lidi dan dibakar
example_semai: Bah Rilan kibeli sate pog ku pasa malam ha ikekenon-kenah.
example_en: Bah Rilan buys chicken satay at the night market for his wife and children.
example_ms: Bah Rilan membeli sate ayam di pasar malam untuk anak-anak dan isterinya.

definition_en: oyster; type of oyster living in the sandy water where its flesh can be eaten
definition_ms: sejenis tiram air tawar yang terdapat di sungai dan bekas lombong
example_semai: Wak Era ru igensir ubai berkep jeoi sawap ku lumbung.
example_en: Wak Era and her husband got a lot of oysters at the abandoned mine.
example_ms: Wak Era dan suaminya mendapat banyak tiram di lombong.

definition_en: mustard, a green plant used for food
definition_ms: sawi; sejenis tumbuhan yang dijadikan sebagai sayur
example_semai: Wak Jati kiterbor sawi medei kaha-masak ru bihon.
example_en: Wak Jati cuts mustard greens because she wants to cook them with the vermicelli.
example_ms: Wak Jati menyiang sayur sawi kerana mahu memasaknya dengan mihun.

definition_en: to chase; to drive away; to shoo
example_semai: Muthu kisayau ilembu-lembu de naiha-muj nu selai mai kilek.
example_en: Muthu drove away the cows that wanted to enter another person's field.
example_ms: Muthu menghalau lembu-lembunya yang hendak memasuki ke ladang orang lain.

example_semai: Wak Maria kineng ju itingkap bilek mabek sayet naimamuh teu manik.
example_en: Wak Maria watched the children taking a shower in the rain from the window of her bedroom.
example_ms: Wak Maria memerhatikan dari tingkap biliknya para kanak-kanak yang sedang mandi hujan.

example_semai: Huper eng ha cuti sebab ngha-ngeng kenun eng nu klinik.
example_en: Tomorrow I want a day off because I want to send my son to the clinic.
example_ms: Esok saya nak cuti sebab saya nak hantar anak saya pergi klinik.

definition_en: hampala; type of freshwater fish found in South-East Asia
example_semai: Kak sebarau adeh selalojeh had mong ku teu de bacet ru rengleng taleh.
example_en: The hampala fish is usually found in small and clear rivers.
example_ms: Ikan Sebarau kebiasaannya terdapat pada sungai yang kecil dan jernih.

example_semai: Wak Kiran kisep minyak angin ku ijog de bikap ya sebej.
example_en: Wak Kiran rubbed ointment on her feet, which had been bitten by mosquitoes.
example_ms: Wak Kiran menyapu minyak angin pada kakinya yang digigit oleh nyamuk.

example_semai: Sebej adeh halos, lebeh macot ju kemet. Amen kikap pek hisedar ru tiba-tiba hirasa behej taleh.
example_en: Gnats are tiny insects, which are smaller than mosquitoes. We are not aware when they bite, only suddenly feel itchy.
example_ms: Agas adalah serangga yang halus, yang lebih kecil dari nyamuk. Kita tidak menyedari jika ianya menggigit, cuma tiba-tiba terasa gatal sahaja.

example_semai: Sebelom mong cawan ru mangkok, mai manah entem naiguna sebok sebegei tempat tempat ngeknut teu atao sop.
example_en: Before the cup and the bowl were created, people in ancient times drank water and soup from coconut shells.
example_ms: Sebelum cawan dan mangkuk dicipta, orang pada zaman dahulu meminum air atau sup menggunakan tempurung kelapa.

definition_en: to say; to utter; to mention; to pronounce
example_semai: Wak Sara kijap medei imuh pek bisebot ku mase pemilehan ha pemain bula jareng sekulah.
example_en: Wak Sara cried because her name was not mentioned during the selection event for a netball player to represent the school.
example_ms: Wak Sara menangis kerana namanya tidak disebutkan semasa acara pemilihan bagi pemain bola jaring bagi mewakili sekolahnya.

example_semai: Dij seburaj nu matik cengroi de bibok ya Bah Deli medei pek kisedar ikunci kerite tecucok nu guni cengroi ajeh lei teloh.
example_en: The rice brought by Bah Deli fell from its sack and scattered on the floor as he did not realize that his car keys had pierced the rice sack until there was a hole in it.
example_ms: Beras yang dibawa oleh Bah Deli jatuh dari guninya dan bersepah ke atas lantai kerana dia tidak menyedari kunci keretanya menyucuk pada guni beras tersebut sehingga berlubang.

example_semai: Bah Suan kihol lingah nu itempat kerjak medei pek kisedar ha iengrok jam.
example_en: Bah Suan came late to his workplace because he did not recognise the sound of his alarm clock.
example_ms: Bah Suan datang lambat ke tempat kerjanya kerana tidak menyedari bunyi jam locengnya.

definition_ms: sedih; perasaan pilu di dalam hati
example_semai: Wak Amis kisedeh kineng ikenon kuceg dat bilanggar ya luri.
example_en: Wak Amis is sad to see her kitten is dead after being hit by a truck.
example_ms: Wak Amis sedih melihat anak kucingnya mati dilanggar oleh lori.

example_semai: "Eng pek ngsbesedie lagi ngha-begensir," Wak Manje kiberlag ha iamek.
example_en: "I am still not ready to get married yet," Wak Manja replied to her mother.
example_ms: "Saya masih belum bersedia lagi untuk mendirikan rumah tangga," Wak Manja menjawab ibunya.

definition_ms: busuk; sesuatu bau yang tidak menyenangkan
example_semai: Lungkang ajeh seeg ru cahar ingoi medei teu ju tandas kihol nu majeh.
example_en: The drain stank and smelled like urine because water from the toilet came out there.
example_ms: Longkang itu busuk dan hancing baunya kerana air dari tandas keluar ke situ.

definition_ms: suam; hangat berkenaan dengan kepanasan air, api, suhu, dll.
example_semai: Bah War kingut teu seep medei ilemunj pehod amen kingut teu sengij.
example_en: Bah War drank warm water because his teeth would hurt if he drank cold water.
example_ms: Bah War meminum air suam kerana giginya akan menjadi sakit jika meminum air sejuk.

example_semai: Wak Jijah kidek telas kiog caknak nu mai gila ru kibeh pek panei bile mai gila ajeh kiulur iteg kaha-salam ha ilei, medei kiseer.
example_en: Wak Jijah immediately left after giving food to the madman and pretending not to see when the madman reached out his hand to shake hands with her, because she felt disgusted.
example_ms: Wak Jijah terus berlalu pergi setelah memberi makanan kepada orang gila tersebut dan membuat tidak nampak apabila orang gila tersebut menghulurkan tangannya untuk bersalam dengannya, kerana dia merasa jijik.

example_semai: "Agok kiseg kambeg ajeh ku keneng legos medei ku pajeh mong jeoi gesok," Bah Ramli kipasal nu ikenon.
example_en: "Do not tie the goat to the rambutan tree because there are weaver ants there," Bah Ramli said to his son.
example_ms: "Jangan mengikat kambing pada pokok rambutan kerana terdapat kerengga disitu," Bah Ramli berkata kepada anaknya.

definition_en: classifier for the segment inside fruit such as durian, citrus, mangosteen, etc.
definition_ms: ulas; bagi isi buah-buahan sebagai durian, limau, manggis dll.
example_semai: Wak Sila kicak nar segar telei jap kelem sebegei ganti canak.
example_en: Wak Sila eats two bananas every night instead of rice.
example_ms: Wak Sila memakan dua ulas pisang pada setiap malam bagi menggantikan nasi.

example_semai: Wak Yani pek kibeli sayo de bijual ku pasaraya ajeh medei ayat pek segar.
example_en: Wak Yani did not buy the vegetables that were being in the supermarket because none of it was fresh.
example_ms: Wak Yani tidak membeli sayur-sayur yang dijual di pasaraya tersebut kerana semuanya tidak segar belaka.

example_semai: Bah Ude segat kerakjak, had ikenah taleh de bekerjak kakkek caknak ha peringak ubai.
example_en: Bah Ude is too lazy to work, only his wife works to earn a living for their family.
example_ms: Bah Ude malas bekerja, cuma isterinya sahaja yang bekerja mencari rezeki bagi keluarga mereka.

definition_ms: menumbuk; menghancurkan sayur-sayuran atau bijirin (padi, cabai, dll ) supaya menjadi cebisan kecil dan halus
example_semai: Wak Sara ru iamek ubai seh bak de naikej padehjeh.
example_en: Wak Sara and her mother are pounding the paddy that they harvested the other day.
example_ms: Wak Sara dan ibunya sedang menumbuk padi yang dituai tempoh hari.

example_semai: Bah Lalei pek kigemar cak sej, kek had kigemar cak kak taleh.
example_en: Bah Lalei does not like to eat meat, he only likes to eat fish.
example_ms: Bah Lalei tidak suka memakan daging, dia hanya suka memakan ikan sahaja.

example_semai: Mat Bah Joe as bisej ya senej mase kiteh legos kelemnek.
example_en: Bah Joe's eyes were swollen as a consequence of being stung by a hornet while harvesting rambutan the previous evening.
example_ms: Mata Bah Joe bengkak akibat disengat oleh tebuan semasa dia memetik buah rambutan semalam.

example_semai: Sejak dat ikenah, Bah Ami kigemar gigei kihalei.
example_en: Ever since his wife's death, Bah Ami always isolates himself from others.
example_ms: Semenjak kematian isterinya, Bah Ami selalu menyendiri.

definition_ms: sejarah; peristiwa yang benar-benar telah terjadi pada masa dahulu
example_semai: Wak Sanje kibacak bob sejarah.
example_en: Wah Sanje is reading a history book.
example_ms: Wah Sanje membaca buku sejarah.

example_semai: Wak Talia sek kaha-beh ikerjak ku padeg medei selalo bikacau ya ikekenon.
example_en: It is difficult for Wak Talia to work from home because she is always harassed by her children.
example_ms: Sukar bagi Wak Talia untuk bekerja dari rumah kerana selalu diganggu oleh anak-anaknya.

example_semai: Wak Minah birok ya icikgu medei sek kibeh ikerjak sekulah.
example_en: Wak Minah was scolded by her teacher for doing her school work wrong.
example_ms: Wak Minah dimarahi oleh cikgunya kerana salah membuat kerja sekolahnya.

definition_ms: sekam; kulit padi yang tertanggal selepas ditumbuk atau dikisar
example_semai: Bak biasajeh biseh canuk medei baha-wes isekap sebelom kijadi cengroi.
example_en: The paddy will be pounded first to remove the husk before it becomes rice ready for cooking.
example_ms: Padi akan ditumbuk terlebih dahulu bagi membuang sekamnya sebelum ianya menjadi beras.

definition_ms: kasihan; perasaan dukacita atau tidak gembira terhadap penderitaan dan kesengsaraan orang lain.
example_semai: Wak Nani kien kenon kuceg nu imadeg medei kisekian kineng kenon kuceg ajeh bipej ku kawasan pasa.
example_en: Wak Nani brought the kitten to her house out of pity seeing it had been intentionally  abandoned at the market area.
example_ms: Wak Nani membawa anak kucing ke rumahnya kerana kasihan melihat anak kucing tersebut dibuang di kawasan pasar.

example_semai: Enjop Wak Salia kitaj sekik, kaha-beh ceruk caknak.
example_en: Wak Salia's grandmother weaves the screwpine leaves to make a place mat.
example_ms: Nenek Wak Salia menganyam mengkuang bagi membuat tikar tempat makan.

example_semai: "Bah Kafa kiet kiseklap kak ku teu Groh," imenang kipasal nu Bah Daus mase Bah Daus kihol nu imadeg kaha-ajak ilei hol nu pekan.
example_en: "Bah Kafa has gone diving for spear fishing in the Groh river," his brother said to Bah Daus when Bah Daus went to his house to take him out to town.
example_ms: "Bah Kafa pergi menyelam ikan di sungai Groh,"

example_semai: "Mongka habakek seknog butol wine adeh?" Bah Lee kitanya nu ikenah.
example_en: "Have you sene the cork for this wine bottle?" Bah Lee asked his wife.
example_ms: "Kamu ada nampak penyumbat botol wine ini?" Bah Lee bertanya pada isterinya.

example_semai: Bah Sula kikumpol isekrap lei 2 minggu, telas ajeh baruleh kijual sekali amen ya jeoi.
example_en: Bah Sula will collect his rubber scraps for 2 weeks, then he will sell them when there are a lot.
example_ms: Bah Sula mengumpul sekerap getahnya selama 2 minggu, kemudian dia akan menjualnya setelah ianya menjadi banyak.

definition_en: to regret; to repent; to have guilt or remorse
definition_ms: menyesal; insaf; kesal; rasa bersalah; serik
example_semai: Hamapen ya bekali-kali bipet ya iapak, Bah Jamil lekat pek kisekreg ru lekat kiet nu runggen.
example_en: Although he had been beaten many times by his father, Bah Jamil still did not regret and still went to the dance party.
example_ms: Walaupun beliau sudah berkali-kali dipukul oleh bapanya, Bah Jamil masih tidak serik dan masih pergi ke pesta joget.

example_semai: Bah Jula kijer ju imeskar medei sekru ku itaya depan ya tateg.
example_en: Bah Jula fell off the bike because the screw on the front tyre had come off.
example_ms: Bah Jula jatuh dari basikalnya kerana skru yang terdapat pada tayar hadapannya sudah tertanggal.

example_semai: Kenon Wak Sufi kijap lei kisekseg medei kiyog ju imeskar ku nong timbok.
example_en: Wak Sufi's son sobbed because he fell from his bicycle onto the tar road.
example_ms: Anak Wak Sufi menangis teresak-esak kerana dia jatuh dari basikal ke atas jalan tar.

example_semai: Bah Mali kikerjak sebegei jaga ku sekulah.
example_en: Bah Mali works as a security guard at the school.
example_ms: Bah Mali bekerja sebagai penjaga keselamatan di sekolah.

example_semai: Sel adeh ya sil medei mai naigu-berkep ha isej.
example_en: The forest tortoise is almost extinct because people catch it for its meat.
example_ms: Kura-kura hutan sudah hampir pupus kerana orang menangkapnya bagi memakan dagingnya.

example_semai: Bah Dani kiseladig bile kicerengai gah danan ikej.
example_en: Bah Dani choked when he heard the news of his uncle's death.
example_ms: Bah Dani tersedak apabila mendengar berita kematian pakciknya.

definition_ms: kebun; ladang; kawasan yang telah dibersihkan untuk bercucuk tanam
example_semai: Bah Wan kitulog cah selai ijenak.
example_en: Bah Wan helped to cut down the bushes at his mother-in-law's farm.
example_ms: Bah Wan membantu untuk menebas ladang ibu mertuanya.

example_semai: Sog kenon Bah Long de pai yos ajeh selajar hamapen ilei ru ikenah sog ubai geril.
example_en: The hair of Bah Long's newborn son is straight even though he and his wife have curly hair.
example_ms: Rambut anak Bah Long yang baharu lahir itu lurus walaupun dia dan isterinya berambut kerinting.

example_semai: Selak sempak ajeh jeoi kijer medei bitehol ya pinoi.
example_en: Many of the leaves of the durian tree are falling because they are being blown by the wind.
example_ms: Daun pokok durian itu banyak yang gugur kerana ditiup oleh angin.

example_semai: Eng selalo ngriyak kenon eng.
example_en: I always miss my kid.
example_ms: Saya selalu rindu pada anak saya.

example_semai: Wak Kila kikerker medei kibakek selarah ku keneng bunga raya.
example_en: ak Kila screamed because he saw a Hagen's pit viper on the hibiscus tree.
example_ms: Wak Kila menjerit kerana ternampak ular kapak hijau pada pokok bunga raya.

example_semai: Wak Rima kibet ru ihad selat medei ihad kipenat, lei pek kisedar ikenon kijap kihot ha susu.
example_en: Wak Rima slept very soundly due to fatigue, so she did not realize her child was crying because she wanted to be breastfed.
example_ms: Wak Rima tidur dengan sangat lena kerana kepenatan, sehingga tidak menyedari anaknya menangis kerana ingin menyusu.

example_semai: Dij keneng jehuk ru rumpot naijadi selei ru sot ku mase musem beket medei ya liu pek kimanik.
example_en: All trees and grass wither and dry up in the summer because it has not rained for a long time.
example_ms: Semua pokok dan rumput menjadi layu dan kering pada musim panas kerana sudah lama hujan tidak turun.

example_semai: Canak de hek masak jenek selej ngcak ha eng.
example_en: The food you cooked earlier is finished, I ate it.
example_ms: Makanan yang kamu masak tadi habis saya makan.

example_semai: Wak Siti kicip pelahat ku ris de pai bimop ajeh medei selej.
example_en: Wak Siti walked slowly on the newly mopped floor because it was slippery.
example_ms: Wak Siti berjalan dengan perlahan pada lantai yang baharu dimop kerana ianya licin.

example_semai: Bah Ijon ajeh iberog bacet, jadi senang kiselep ku engkap pintu de it ajeh.
example_en: Bah Ijoh has a small body, so it is easy for him to sneak in the narrow door.
example_ms: Bah Ijoh mempunyai badan yang kecil, jadi mudah bagi beliau menyelinap masuk ke pintu yang sempit itu.

example_semai: Selipa Bah Sali kigecat mase tengah kimain batak ru ikekawat.
example_en: Bah Sali's slippers broke while he was playing tag with his friends.
example_ms: Selipar Bah Sali terputus semasa beliau bermain aci kejar bersama rakan-rakannya.

definition_en: to be afraid or feel horrified to see something; to feel horror
definition_ms: geli; takut atau berasa seram melihat sesuatu
example_semai: Hamapen ilei keral, tapi Bah Aril kiseler ha tabeg.
example_en: Although he is a man, but Bah Aril has a horror of frogs.
example_ms: Walaupun dia lelaki, tetapi Bah Aril merasa geli terhadap katak.

definition_en: to slice; to cut into slices
example_semai: Jaras teg Wak Hani teluka ya yoj mase kiseler ha bawang.
example_en: Wak Hani's finger was injured while she was slicing an onion.
example_ms: Jari Wak Hani terluka ketika dia sedang menghiris bawang.

example_semai: Bile ya selesei rimdij ikerjak, baruleh Wak Jamaliah kiberihat kineng TV.
example_en: When all of her work is finished, only then Wak Jamaliah rests by watching TV.
example_ms: Apabila kesemua kerjanya telah selesai, baharulah Wak Jamaliah berehat dengan menonton TV.

example_semai: Wak Tiya kicuet ha imenang de selir, medei pek dapat kigei tempat mase tengah ubai poj giliran baiha-bakek ha dokte medei imenang ajeh kikehol.
example_en: Wak Tiya pinched her hyperactive brother, who could not sit still while they were waiting for their turn to see the doctor because her brother had a cough.
example_ms: Wak Tiya mencubit adiknya yang hiperaktif tersebut, yang tidak boleh duduk diam semasa mereka sedang menunggu giliran untuk berjumpa dengan doktor kerana adiknya tersebut mengalami batuk.

definition_en: to fill something such as bamboo with glutenous rice
definition_ms: mengisi pulut dalam sesuatu sebagai buluh
example_semai: Bah Man kitulog ikenah selor pulot nu kateh awat.
example_en: Bah Man helped his wife to fill the bamboo with glutinous rice.
example_ms: Bah Man menolong isterinya mengisi pulut ke dalam buluh.

example_semai: Bah Mani kingut ihad jeoi teu medei kirasa ihad selot telas jeoi kikerjar mase kimain bula.
example_en: Bah Mani drank a lot of water because he felt very thirsty after running a lot while playing football.
example_ms: Bah Mani meminum banyak air kerana beliau merasa sangat dahaga selepas banyak berlari semasa bermain bola sepak.

example_semai: Hamapen Wak Talia ajeh sedap isuara, tapi kinyek bedindang ku engkap mai medei kirasa ihad kiselsel amen kijinjeg ku ngar mai jengoi.
example_en: Although Wak Talia has a good voice, she refuses to sing in front of people because she feels very shy standing in front of a crowd.
example_ms: Walaupun Wak Talia mempunyai suara yang merdu, tetapi dia enggan menyanyi di hadapan orang kerana dia merasa sangat malu jika berdiri di hadapan orang ramai.

example_semai: eng
example_en: "My grandmother has no teeth, so she eats soft foods like porridge," Wak Lila told her friends who came to visit her grandmother at home.
example_ms: "Nenek saya tidak mempunyai gigi, jadi dia memakan makanan yang lembut seperti bubur," Wak Lila memberitahu rakan-rakannya yang datang melawat neneknya di rumah.

example_semai: Bah Alang ajeh numom de cerie. Susah hiha-neng ilei kibelal, tapi ilei kigemar berseluro ru bok-bok taleh.
example_en: Bah Alang is a cheerful person. It’s hard to see him angry, but he likes to joke with everybody.
example_ms: Bah Alang adalah seorang yang ceria. Sukar untuk melihat dia marah, tetapi dia suka bergurau dengan sesiapa sahaja.

definition_en: indigenous peoples in peninsular Malaysia, located in the valleys or inland Perak and some part of Pahang
definition_ms: suku kaum Orang Asli yang terdapat di lembah-lembah atau pendalaman negeri Perak dan sebahagian di negeri Pahang

example_semai: Wak Lia kikerker bile kiburu tijiik kihol ju balak semak mase tengah kileh lada.
example_en: Wak Lia screamed when she saw a snake coming out of the bush while she was picking the chili peppers.
example_ms: Wak Lia menjerit apabila ternampak ular keluar dari kawasan semak semasa dia sedang memetik cili.

example_semai: Rimdij kerite de mong ku kemil nong naibrentik medei mong lembu kidakdak ku semakdek nong. Lembu ajeh langsong pek kibeganjak hamapen bihon ya kerite atao bihalau ya mai.
example_en: All vehicles on the road stopped because there was a cow lying in the middle of the road. The cow did not move at all despite vehicles honking at it or people chasing it.
example_ms: Semua kenderaan yang ada pada jalanraya berhenti kerana terdapat lembu berbaring di tengah-tengah jalanraya. Lembu tersebut langsung tidak berganjak walaupun telah dihon oleh kenderaan atau dihalau oleh manusia.

example_semai: Bah Rukan kisemanj iapak kibeli meskar pai ha ilei, tapi bibeh pek panei taleh ya iapak medei ilei kikedei jaga barang, selalo kiperusak.
example_en: Bah Rukan asked his father to buy him a new bike, but his father ignored his request because Bah Rukan did not know how to take care of things, he was always ruining them.
example_ms: Bah Rukan meminta bapanya membelikan basikal baharu bagi dirinya, tetapi bapanya tidak mengendahkan permintaan beliau kerana beliau tidak tahu menjaga barang, selalu merosakkannya.

definition_en: pin; a tool used to pin two things together
definition_ms: semat; jarum peniti; alat yang digunakan untuk mencucuk dua benda supaya bercantum
example_semai: Wak Siti kiguna jarop peniti kisemat ha abat ajeh sebelom kicig.
example_en: Wak Siti used a pin to hold the fabric in place before sewing the cloth.
example_ms: Wak menggunakan jarum peniti sebagai penyemat sebelum menjahit kain itu.

example_semai: Sembei de mong ku beg pantei lebeh biyeg ru halos amen hibandeng ru sembei ku tempat kilek.
example_en: The sand on the beach is whiter and finer when compared with sand found elsewhere.
example_ms: Pasir yang terdapat di tepi pantai lebih putih dan halus jika dibandingkan dengan pasir yang terdapat di tempat lain.

definition_ms: semai; menabur benih untuk bercucuk tanam
example_semai: Wak Yuya kisemei beneh betek.
example_en: Wak Yuya is sowing papaya seeds.
example_ms: Wak Yuya menyemai benih betik.

example_semai: Teg Wak Nana as bisej ya semej mase kikerkor ku selai iamek.
example_en: Wak Nana's hand was swollen because it was stung by a hornet when she clearing the scrub at her mother's garden.
example_ms: Tangan Wak Nana bengkak disengat oleh tebuan semasa dia menebas di kebun ibunya.

example_semai: Bah Kuan birok ya ibos medei semedang kibeh salah ikerjak.
example_en: Bah Kuan was scolded by his employer for often doing his job wrong.
example_ms: Bah Kuan dimarahi oleh majikannya kerana semedang salah melakukan kerjanya.

example_semai: "Kelem ajehnek semet kuat kibeengrok, susah eng ngha-bukbet," Wak Jaja kipasal nu iamek.
example_en: "Last night the sound of the crickets was very loud, it was hard for me to sleep," Wak Jaja told her mother.
example_ms: "Malam tadi bunyi belalang pelesit sungguh kuat, susah saya mahu tidur," Wak Jaja memberitahu ibunya.

example_semai: Dikdij sengoi naihod sinui de semiak.
example_en: All people want to live in peace and tranquility.
example_ms: Semua manusia menginginkan kehidupan yang aman dan tenteram.

definition_ms: durian; sejenis buah yang mempunyai kulit berduri dan beraroma kuat
example_semai: Teg Bah Samdin luka ya jerlak sempak mase kaha-kah sempak ajeh.
example_en: Bah Samdin's hand was injured by the durian thorn when he was trying to split the durian.
example_ms: Tangan Bah Samdin terluka oleh duri durian semasa mahu membelah durian tersebut.

example_semai: Wak Dia kigemar cak sempak belande.
example_en: Wah Dia likes to eat soursops.
example_ms: Wah Dia suka makan durian belanda.

definition_en: to stroke; to rub; to pinch and massage with the fingers
definition_ms: melurut; menyepit sesuatu dengan jari, kemudian mengurutnya
example_semai: Wak Jaja kisempet isog mendei kaha-persod isog ajeh.
example_en: Wak Jaja rubbed her hair because she wanted to dry it.
example_ms: Wak Jaja melurut rambutnya kerana mahu mengeringkannya.

example_semai: Bah Lali kisah isog ya sabon buku medei isempo ya dij.
example_en: Bah Lali washed his hair with a bar of soap because the shampoo had run out.
example_ms: Bah Lali membasuh rambutnya dengan sabun buku kerana shampunya sudah habis.

definition_ms: bulu mata; rambut halus yang tumbuh pada pada tepi kelopak mata
example_semai: Sempoi mat Wak Ramlah ihad lawa, hineng ihad lebat ru keruen.
example_en: Wak Ramlah's eyelashes are very beautiful, they look very thick and long.
example_ms: Bulu mata Wak Ramlah sangat cantik, ianya kelihatan sangat lebat dan meletik.

definition_en: to stroke; to rub; to apply (ointment, cream, etc.)
definition_ms: belai; sapu; gosok; menyapu dengan lembut menggunakan tangang ke atas sesuatu permukaan dsb; mengusap sesuatu permukaan dengan tangan dan berulang-ulang
example_semai: Bah Bakri kisempur minyak angin ku ikui kerana kiluig.
example_en: Bah Bakri rubbed ointment on his head because he felt dizzy.
example_ms: Bah Bakri menyapu minyak angin di kepalanya kerana mengalami pening.

example_semai: Ihat senang Bah Jali kihuj keneng betar, sekejap taleh ya buleh kilei nu imol.
example_en: It is very easy for Bah Jali to climb the petai tree and it doesn't take much time for him to get to the top.
example_ms: Bah Jali memanjat pokok petai dengan amat mudah sekali dan hanya sebentar sahaja masa yang beliau ambil untuk ke hujung pokok.

example_semai: Wak Meriah kiguna senangkot baju kisusot bor-bor iabat-baju ku kateh lemari.
example_en: Wak Meriah uses a clothes hanger to neatly arrange her clothes in the closet.
example_ms: Wak Meriah menggunakan penyangkut baju bagi menyusung dengan kemas pakaiannya di dalam almari.

example_semai: "Adeh senarei muh mai de naiha-et nu Langkawi ku gecek depan," Wak Lila kiurok nu Bah Ibah.
example_en: "This is a list of names of people who want to go to Langkawi next month," Wak Lila told Bah Ibah.
example_ms: "Ini adalah senarai nama orang-orang yang mahu pergi ke Langkawi pada bulan hadapan," Wak Lila berkata kepada Bah Ibah.

example_semai: Sendap kari kak de bimasak ya Wak Nanten.
example_en: The fish curry cooked by Wak Nanten is delicious.
example_ms: Sedapnya kari ikan yang dimasak oleh Wak Nanten.

definition_en: scoop; ladle; rice paddle; a tool for scooping
definition_ms: senduk; alat untuk mencedok nasi, gulai, dsb
example_semai: Wak Mary kiet nu deg wal kaha-kot sendok kaha-cidok canak ha ikenon, tapi kisip ma kaha-beh telas kingut teu canuk.
