definition_en: big metal plate made of copper as a traditional musical instrument
definition_ms: sejenis gong besar yang diperbuat dari tembaga
example_semai: Mai bahbeh persembahan ajeh naimaen tawak.
example_en: The people who presented the show played traditional gongs.
example_ms: Orang yang membuat persembahan tersebut memainkan ketawak.

example_semai: Tawig kibeh ideg ku keneng sempak.
example_en: Spiders make their webs in durian trees.
example_ms: Labah-labah membuat sarangnya di pokok durian.

definition_ms: tayar; lapisan getah pada roda kenderaan bagi melicinkan pergerakkan dengan menyerap hentakan
example_semai: Bah Peran kitukar itaya kerite madei itaya ajeh ya rekah.
example_en: Bah Peran changed the car tyre because it had cracked.
example_ms: Bah Peran menukar tayar keretanya kerana tayar tersebut sudah merekah.

definition_en: to type, to write something using a typewriter or word processor
definition_ms: menaip, menulis sesuatu dengan menggunakan mesin taip atau pemproses kata
example_semai: Ya sudah kibeh draf ku kertas, Bah Oli kitaep ikerjak ajeh ku komputer.
example_en: After he had written the draft on paper, Bah Oli typed his work on the computer.
example_ms: Setelah membuat draf pada kertas, Bah Oli menaip kerjanya tersebut pada komputer.

example_semai: Kenon menaleh eng tayur isog pek besenikat medei telas kimamuh.
example_en: My daughter's hair is messy and not combed because she has just had her bath.
example_ms: Anak gadis saya serabai rambutnya tak bersikat kerana baru lepas mandi.

example_semai: Kitayut iarap nu kateh kerite.
example_en: He lifted his stuff in the car.
example_ms: Dia mengangkat barangnya ke dalam kereta.

definition_en: to raise a hand as a sign of greetings from afar
definition_ms: mengangkat tangan kepada seseorang sebagai tanda sapaan dari jauh
example_semai: Azril kiteal iteg nu eng mase kilintas nong.
example_en: Azril raised his hand to greet me as he crossed the road.
example_ms: Azril mengangkat tangannya kepada saya untuk menyapa semasa dia melintas jalan.

definition_en: to point a finger to indicate a direction or an object
definition_ms: mengacukan jari bagi menunjukkan sesuatu arah atau objek
example_semai: Bah Hem kiteal nu mateu bile ngtanya ku belok buleh ngsuj tek eng.
example_en: Bah Hem pointed his finger towards the river when I asked where I could wash my hands.
example_ms: Bah Hem mengacukan jari ke arah sungai apabila saya bertanya di mana saya boleh mencuci tangan.

example_semai: Amek Bah Sam kiingak besimbang pek kisedar ikenon sanget ya kicip lei nu tebeg teu.
example_en: Bah Sam's mother was busy chatting and she did not realize that her son had already walked to the river bank.
example_ms: Ibu Bah Sam khusyuk bersembang dan dia tak sedar yang anaknya sudah pergi ke tebing sungai.

example_semai: Ku kateh kutak ajeh tebeg ya pelek jambu.
example_en: That box is full of guavas.
example_ms: Dalam kotak itu penuh dengan buah jambu.

definition_ms: memasukkan sesuatu (kain dll.) ke dalam air selama beberapa ketika
example_semai: Amek eng kitebeg abat ku limpon sebelom kisah dui doh.
example_en: My mother soaked the clothes in the basin before washing them later in the evening.
example_ms: Ibu saya merendam kain di dalam besin sebelum membasuhnya petang nanti.

definition_ms: sejenis serangga yang bersaiz kecil dan biasanya membuat kediaman di batang-batang pokok dsbnya
example_semai: Sempog tebel ihad mahal irega medei susah hiha-berkep.
example_en: The honey from stingless honey bees is very expensive because it is hard to get.
example_ms: Madu kelulut sangat mahal harganya kerana susah untuk diperolehi.

definition_ms: membuat lubang yang tembus (seperti lubang kasut)
example_semai: Amek kitebok memerip lubang ku kit butol mineral manah, kaha-beh pasu bunga.
example_en: Mother punched several holes in the bottom of the old mineral water bottle so she could use it as a flower pot.
example_ms: Ibu menebuk beberapa lubang pada bawah botol mineral yang lama, dia mahu jadikan (botol mineral tersebut sebagai) pasu bunga.

definition_en: to board (a ship); to mount (a horse); to ride (a car, bicycle, motorbike, etc.)
example_semai: Bah Daus kitebot mutu Bah Is mase kaha-et nu isekulah.
example_en: Bah Daus rode Bah Iskandar's motorcycle when he went to school.
example_ms: Bah Daus menaiki motosikal Bah Is semasa mahu ke sekolahnya.

definition_en: shady; overcast; describing weather that is not scorching hot
definition_ms: redup; untuk cuaca yang tidak panas terik
example_semai: Amen hiha-tengroj bor ku arik tedeh dea pek bitod ya pengrag.
example_en: If we want to go fishing, it is good to go when it is cloudy so that we don't get sunburned.
example_ms: Jika mahu memancing, baik (dilakukan) pada cuaca redup supaya tidak dibakar oleh terik matahari.

definition_en: to be under the shade; to take shelter
example_semai: Ku kateh ceknip jarha-jog ju pekan neh kimanik. Jadi, jar apak jarbetedeh ku piknoj bas leileh iarik hoj.
example_en: It was raining when my father and I were on the way back home from the town. So, we stopped and took shelter at the bus stop until it stopped.
example_ms: Di dalam perjalanan mahu pulang dari pekan tadi hujan. Jadi, bapa dan saya berteduh di perhentian bas sehingga hujan berhenti.

definition_ms: tangan; anggota badan dari siku hingga ke hujung jari
example_semai: Teg Bah Selik begod madei kiyog ju keneng betar.
example_en: Bah Selik's hand was fractured because she fell from a petai tree.
example_ms: Tangan Bah Selik patah kerana jatuh dari pokok petai.

definition_en: to remove; to take off; to pull out
example_semai: Apak kiteg paku ku cenol telnil abat madei kiyek doh kena kui.
example_en: Father removed the nail that was on the pole of the clothes line, because he did not want people to hurt their heads when they were passing by under it.
example_ms: Bapa mencabut paku yang ada pada tiang penyidai, kerana dia tidak mahu ia terkena pada kepala.

definition_en: to tear; to shred cloth or paper
example_semai: Bah Buli kijap medei imenang kiteg ibob sekulah.
example_en: Bah Buli cried because his brother tore his school book.
example_ms: Bah Buli menangis kerana adiknya mengoyakkan buku sekolahnya.

example_semai: Nung kampug Wah Mawar tegak taleh inong. Sebab ajehleh mong jeoi kemalangan tejadi ku nong kampug ajeh medei naien laju ku tegak inong.
example_en: Wah Mawar's village road is straight. Hence lots of accidents occur on that road because people tend to drive faster on a straight road.
example_ms: Jalan di kampung Wah Mawar lurus sahaja jalannya. Sebab itulah terdapat banyak kemalangan terjadi di jalanraya kampung tersebut kerana memandu laju di jalan lurus.

example_semai: Apak eng ru tenek keral eng ubai tarek tali cenglei lei tegang, baruleh ubai beg ku icenol.
example_en: My father and my brother pulled the wire for the washing line until it was tight, then they tried to tie it to the poles.
example_ms: Bapa dan abang saya menarik tali ampaian sehingga tegang, barulah mereka ikat di tiangnya.

definition_en: fresh and clear (in mind or eyes)
example_semai: Hamapen ijam ya pukol 10 kelem, mabek sanget lekar tegar imat enai, lekat naimuman ku kateh bilek.
example_en: Even though it is already 10 o'clock at night, the children are still fresh and not sleepy, so they are still playing in the bedroom.
example_ms: Walaupun waktu sudah pukul 10 malam, kanak-kanak masih segar tidak mengantuk, mereka masih bermain di bilik tidur.

example_semai: Ceknet mai ajeh tegar kena ya teu.
example_en: This man's plants are fresh, because they have already been watered.
example_ms: Tanaman orang ini segar kerana sudah disiram.

example_semai: Hamapen ya kiengrak, Tun Mahathir Mohammad lekat mong itegerat kaha-kerakjak.
example_en: Even though he is already old, Tuh Mahathir Mohammad still has the strength to work.
example_ms: Walaupun masih tua, Tun Mahathir Mohammad masih punyai kekuatan mahu bekerja.

example_semai: Bah Jasin ajeh tengin isengoi, asa ma taleh de bibual langsong pek kijoi.
example_en: Bah Jasin is a stubborn person and ignores others' advice.
example_ms: Bah Jasin orang yang keras kepala, langsung tidak mengendahkan nasihat orang lain.

example_semai: Mase ku Tapah cinek, Bah Amsal kitegor ha jik.
example_en: When we were at Tapah (town), Bah Amsal greeted us.
example_ms: Semasa di (pekan) Tapah tadi, Bah Amsal menegur kami.

example_semai: Bah Goston bitegor ya Bah Rizal ha isenilap de kibeh mase sama-sama ubai rop kak lei telas kak de baiha-cap ajeh.
example_en: Bah Goston was admonished by Bah Rizal for the mistake he made when both of them were tickling fish and missed the fish they wanted to catch.
example_ms: Bah Goston ditegur oleh Bah Rizal akan kesilapan yang dia lakukan ketika mereka berdua bersama-sama menggagau ikan sehingga terlepas ikan yang mahu ditangkap.

example_semai: Tegum iarik gamak kaha-manik.
example_en: It's just cloudy, going to rain.
example_ms: Cuaca mendung saja agaknya mahu hujan.

definition_en: to tear down (huts, house, etc.); to bring down something (curtains, picture frames, etc.); to pluck (coconut, rambai, etc.) from its branches
example_semai: Bah Meran kiteh ideg wal madei kaha-ganti iris pai.
example_en: Bah Meran tore down his kitchen because he wanted to put in a new floor.
example_ms: Bah Meran merobohkan dapur rumahnya kerana dia mahu menggantikan lantai baharu (bagi dapur tersebut).

definition_en: trees shrubs whose leaves are dried and made into a drink
definition_ms: pokok tumbuhan renek yang daunnya dikeringkan dan dibuat minuman
example_semai: Mai kekawat eng naiet nu ladang teh ku Cameron Highland.
example_en: My friends went to the tea plantation at Cameron Highlands.
example_ms: Kawan-kawan saya pergi ke ladang teh di Cameron Highland.

definition_en: to set down or lower the load carried
definition_ms: menurunkan beban yang dipikul atau dibawa
example_semai: Apak eng kiteh raga kek de mong semak ku ikateh.
example_en: My father set down the basket containing the durians.
example_ms: Ayah saya menurunkan raga yang mengandungi durian di dalamnya.

definition_en: to warm up near a fire
definition_ms: berdiang; memanaskan badan berdekatan dengan unggun api
example_semai: Enjop eng kitehir iberok ku beg os.
example_en: My grandmother warmed up her body by the campfire.
example_ms: Nenek saya memanaskan badannya di tepi unggun api.

example_semai: Jeoi pelancong naigemar enget nu Cameron Highland medei icuace ku pajeh tehog.
example_en: Many tourists want to go to Cameron Highlands because of the cold weather there.
example_ms: Ramai pelancong suka pergi ke Cameron Highland kerana cuacanya yang sejuk.

example_semai: Wak Sam kikerakmik telas kitehol ku ililen kek hari jadi.
example_en: Wak Sam was happy after she blew out the candles on her cake.
example_ms: Wak Sam gembira setelah meniup api pada lilin kek hari jadinya.

definition_en: to treat sickness (as a traditional healer)
example_semai: Mai halak ajeh kitehor nyaknik Wa Rita.
example_en: The traditional healer is treating Wa Rita's illness.
example_ms: Bomoh itu merawat sakit Wa Rita.

definition_en: the act of casting spells to cure illness (by a shaman or traditional healer)
definition_ms: perbuatan melakukan jampi-jampian untuk mengubati sakit-penyakit (oleh seseorang dukun atau bomoh)

example_semai: Gerik selalo naiteltil ku balak pengrak, naihod ha tehor berog enai ya pengrag mat arik.
example_en: Monitor lizards usually sit under the heat of the sun so that it will warm their bodies.
example_ms: Biawak selalu berjemur di tengah panas supaya terik matahari memanaskan badan mereka.

definition_en: pain (in limbs); stinging on mouth or lips due to eating, chopping onions, chili etc.
definition_ms: pedih (pada anggota badan); perit pada mulut atau bibir akibat memakan, memotong bawang, cili dll
example_semai: Hamapen tehur iempag kicak pejet, Bah Rilan lekat kicak lada medei mimang kigemar caknak pejet.
example_en: Even though his mouth is sore when he eats spicy food, Bah Rilan keeps eating hot chili because he really likes spicy food.
example_ms: Walaupun pedih mulutnya memakan pedas, Bah Rilan masih memakan lada kerana memang dia suka (memakan) makanan pedas.

definition_en: really?; is it true? (as a question)
example_semai: Tei? Oh le pek hik panei.
example_en: Is it true? Not sure, we don't know either.
example_ms: Yakah? Entahlah, kita pun tak tahu.

example_semai: Kenon sanget Wak Ana kigu-tej imat sejak cinek medei ya kaha-bukbet.
example_en: Wak Ana's small child has been rubbing his eyes since a minute ago because he already wants to sleep.
example_ms: Anak kecil Wak Ana sering menggosok mata dari tadi kerana sudah mahu tidur.

definition_ms: cenekah; monyet sikah; sejenis monyet berekor panjang

example_semai: Wak Rima kitekan butang loceng bas bile bas de kihuj ajeh ya lei nu peknoj bas ku isimpang kampug.
example_en: Wak Rima pressed the bell when the bus that she rode arrived at the bus stop at the junction of her village.
example_ms: Wak Rima menekan butang loceng bas bila bas yang dia naiki tersebut sudah sampai di perhentian bas di simpang kampungnya.

definition_en: to break a taboo regarding eating and drinking
example_semai: Bah Suki kiterek madei kicergai gah danan iamek.
example_en: Bah Suki broke his abstention when he heard the news that his mother had died.
example_ms: Bah Suki pecah pantang apabila dia mendengar khabar yang maknya meninggal.

example_semai: Neng luri ajeh tekteg itaya.
example_en: See that truck that its tires were pulled off.
example_ms: Tengok lori itu tercabut tayarnya.

example_semai: Mase lekat jisanget, jik adek-beradek selalo jiet nu mateu, jimamuh telanjang medei jinyek baju jik keaj. Doh birok ya amek.
example_en: When we were kids, my sibling and I always went to the river. we swam naked because we didn't want our clothes to  get wet. Otherwise, mother would be angry with us.
example_ms: Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, kami adik-berdik selalu pergi ke sungai, kami mandi telanjang kerana tidak mahu pakaian kami basah. Jika tidak, akan dimarahi oleh ibu.

definition_en: a species of freshwater fish that originated in Africa
definition_ms: sejenis ikan yang berasal dari Afrika; ikan air tawar yang boleh didapati di kawasan bekas-bekas lombong dan tasik
example_semai: Bah Amar pai kijog ju itengroj, kek kiberkep lapan ikor kak telapia.
example_en: Bah Amar has just come home from fishing, he caught eight tilapia.
example_ms: Bah Amar baru pulang dari memancing, dia memperolehi lapan ekor ikan tilapia.

example_semai: Bok hentok de telas ju itanggongjawab nu iagama, ibangsa ru inegare.
example_en: No one is free from the responsibilities of his/her religion, race and nation.
example_ms: Tiada siapa yang bebas dari tanggungjawabnya terhadap agama, bangsa dan negara.

example_semai: Kenon dog de jibela sejak isenanget ya telas medei pek jiperasan itali bekneg ku itangen ya repot.
example_en: The baby monkey that we raised since it was small escaped because we did not realize that the rope around its neck was already rotten.
example_ms: Anak monyet yang kami bela sejak kecil sudah terlepas kerana kami tidak perasan tali pengikat pada lehernya sudah mereput.

definition_en: to have happened; to have passed
example_semai: Bah Pat pek sempat kaha-pos isurat medei waktu beurusan ku pejabat pos ya telas.
example_en: Bah Pat does not have a chance to post his letter because office hours at the post office have already passed.
example_ms: Bah Pat tidak sempat mengepos suratnya kerana waktu berurusan di pejabat pos sudah berlalu.

example_semai: Wak Ani kisuj teg imenang telas kibercak imenang ajeh.
example_en: Wak Ani washed her sister's hands after feeding her.
example_ms: Wak Ani membasuh tangan adiknya selepas memberi makan kepada adiknya.

example_semai: Kek ajeh telei ju hik.
example_en: He is different from us.
example_ms: Dia itu berbeza dari kita.

example_semai: Kitiba telei nu madeh.
example_en: He came here alone.
example_ms: Dia datang seorang diri ke sini.

example_semai: Apak eng mong ikebon. Ku ikebon ajeh kicet tebeg ya keneng telei taleh medei iregak hunen mahal.
example_en: My father has a farm. His farm is filled only with banana trees because the market price is high.
example_ms: Bapa saya mempunyai kebun. Di kebunnya tersebut dipenuhi oleh pokok pisang sahaja kerana harganya mahal.

definition_en: a type of banana with dark yellow skin and wite flesh
chestnut banana, a type of banana with yellow skin with small black dots and reddish, soft, sweet and fragrant flesh
saba banana; cardaba banana, a type of cooking banana
lady finger banana, a type of banana which is sweeter than cavendish bananas
a type of banana with a yellow or orange color and red, creamy and sweet flesh
a type of banana with yellow skin and reddish and watery flesh
to observe; to watch diligently or intently
definition_ms: memerhati dengan bersungguh-sungguh; melihat dengan perasaan yang marah
example_semai: Kipan telen ha hik, tah ma de pek kipuas isengik nu hik adeh.
example_en: She watched us intensely for something she wasn't satisfied with.
example_ms: Dia memerhati kami dengan bersungguh-sungguh, entah apa yang dia tidak puas hati dengan kami.

example_semai: Ku Kelantan mong sanget mai hik bitelet ya gajah.
example_en: In Kelantan there is an aboriginal kid being trampled by an elephant.
example_ms: Di Kelantan ada budak Orang Asli dipijak oleh gajah.

example_semai: Bah Kanteng kitelingik ha ubai kenah gengsir baibegadoh ku engkap belakang deg.
example_en: Bah Kanteng eavesdropped on a husband and a wife fighting at the back of the house.
example_ms: Bah Kanteng mencuri dengar suami isteri bergaduh di belakang rumah.

definition_en: to speak by telephon; to make a call to
example_semai: Kitelipon ikenon madei kiriyak.
example_en: She called her child because she missed him.
example_ms: Dia telefon anaknya kerana dia rindu.

example_semai: Telas kicah kawasan semak ajeh, apak eng kitelog cag jehuk, kaha-tanda sempadan de kaha-cet ibenih betar.
example_en: After he cleared the area, my father broke (several) branches to mark the boundaries where he wanted to plant his petai seeds.
example_ms: Setelah dia menebas kawasan semak itu, bapa saya mematahkan ranting kayu, (kerana) mahu menanda sempadan (tempat) dia mahu tanam benih petainya.

example_semai: Bah Kira teloh ru idaknek.
example_en: Bah Kira summoned his (supernatural) agent.
example_ms: Bah Kira memanggil belaannya.

definition_en: to be leaked; to have a hole; to be torn
example_semai: Pelok deg jik kiteloh madei terok ya batu sentet mabek sanget.
example_en: The roof of our house leaks because it was struck by a stone, shot with a slingshot by some children.
example_ms: Atap rumah kami bocor kerana terkena batu yang dilastik oleh budak-budak.

definition_en: elephantiasis; the enlargement and hardening of limbs or body parts due to tissue swelling, caused by mosquito bites.
definition_ms: penyakit untut; sejenis penyakit yang menyebabkan bengkak pada bahagian kaki dan disebabkan oleh gigitan sejenis nyamuk
example_semai: As ijog madei kikena telug.
example_en: Her leg is swollen because she has elephantiasis.
example_ms: Kakinya bengkak sebab dia kena penyakit untut.

example_semai: Temagik Han Sura lut madei bipoh la cag jehuk.
example_en: Han Sura's forehead is swollen because she was hit by a tree branch.
example_ms: Dahi Han Sura benjol kerana terpukul oleh dahan pokok.

definition_en: scabies; a skin infection caused by a mite; sore
example_semai: Luka ku jog Bah Ram ya kijadi temak madei pek kiperlai.
example_en: The wound on Bah Ram's foot became a sore because he didn't treat it.
example_ms: Luka pada kaki Bah Ram sudah menjadi kudis kerana dia tidak mengubatinya.

definition_en: kissing gourami, a type of fish living in freshwater
definition_ms: ikan temakang, sejenis ikan air tawar
example_semai: Amek eng ru ikekawat naiet nu teu ku belakang kampug naha-teroj kak temakang.
example_en: My mother and her friends went to the river behind our village to fish, because they wanted to catch a kissing gourami.
example_ms: Ibu saya dan kawan-kawannya pergi ke sungai di belakang kampung (kerana) mahu memancing ikan temakang.

definition_en: to check; to inspect; to test
definition_ms: periksa; memeriksa; memerhati atau melihat dengan teliti
example_semai: Pulis naibeh roadblock ku nong kampug jik medei naiha-temat lisen mai de bemutu.
example_en: The police have set up a roadblock on our village road to inspect motocycle riders' licences.
example_ms: Polis melakukan sekatan jalan raya di jalan kampung kami kerana mahu memeriksa lesen (memandu) penunggang motosikal.

definition_en: a type of bamboo with a small trunk and straight and long sections, used to make bamboo blowpipes
definition_ms: sejenis buluh dengan batang yang kecil dan lurus serta ruas yang panjang, digunakan untuk membuta alat sumpitan

definition_en: to contemplate; to reflect; to think long and deep; to ponder
example_semai: Wak Akil kitemenung kihalei, kiserakngik begeiharik kaha-pasal iniat kaha-begensir nu iamek apak.
example_en: Wak Akil pondered, thinking how to tell her parents about her intention to get married
example_ms: Wak Akil termenung seorang diri, memikirkan bagaimana dia mahu memberitahu niatnya mahu bersuami kepada ibu bapanya.

definition_en: tembusu tree, a type of hardwood tree with heavy foliage in the jungle
definition_ms: pokok tembusu, pokok di hutan, kegunaanya adalah membuat tiang rumah sebab sangat keras dan tahan tidak reput
example_semai: Ku serag jeoi keneng jehuk temesu.
example_en: There are many tembusu trees in the jungle.
example_ms: Di hutan ada banyak pokok tembusu.

example_semai: Maknok eng kikerjak ku kebon temikei.
example_en: My sister-in-law works at the watermelon farm.
example_ms: Kakak ipar saya bekerja di kebun tembikai.

definition_en: Temiar people, one of the Senoic ethnic groups in Peninsular Malaysia
definition_ms: suku Temiar, orang asli dari puak Senoi
example_semai: Tak eng mai Temir kampug Lasah.
example_en: My father-in-law is a Temiar from Lasah village.
example_ms: Bapak mertua saya orang Temiar (dari) kampung Lasah.

example_semai: Tempat kerjak Bah Meran rek beng Hospital Teluk Intan.
example_en: Bah Meran's place of work is near the Teluk Intan Hospital.
example_ms: Tempat kerja Bah Meran hampir dengan Hospital Teluk Intan.

definition_en: to face; to meet; to experience
definition_ms: to meet; to experience; to face

definition_en: beardless barb, a type of freshwater fish
example_semai: Menai eng kikep kak temperas mase kitengroj cinek.
example_en: My brother-in-law caught some beardless barb fish while fishing earlier.
example_ms: Adik ipar saya mendapat ikan temperas semasa memancing tadi.

definition_en: tempinis tree, a type of tree in the jungle that produces white latex
definition_ms: pokok tempinis, sejenis pokok kayu hutan yang menghasilkan susu getah putih

example_semai: Mabek askar naitempor mai jehat de nailintas sempadan Malaysia.
example_en: Soldiers attack criminals that cross Malaysian borders.
example_ms: Askar menyerang penjahat yang melintas sempadan Malaysia.

definition_en: Temuan people, one of the Proto-Malay ethnic groups in Peninsular Malaysia
definition_ms: suku Temuan, orang asli dari puak Malay Proto
example_semai: Eng mong nar urak kawat mai Temuan.
example_en: I have two Temuan friends.
example_ms: Saya ada dua orang kawan orang Temuan.

example_semai: Alif bicereg hol nu temuduge bomba. Amen kitelas temuduge ajeh, kek doh kiet nu latehan rekrut.
example_en: Alif has been called for an interview to become a firefighter. If he gets through the interview, he will go for recruitment training.
example_ms: Alif dipanggil hadir (ke) temu duga bomba. Jika dia melepasi temu duga tersebut, dia akan pergi ke latihan rekrut.

example_semai: Deg Bah Jinal temun ru deg Wak Mayeh.
example_en: Bah Jinal's house faces Wak Mayeh's house.
example_ms: Rumah Bah Jinal menghadap ke rumah Wa Mayeh.

example_semai: Ku arik temuteh doh jik mong lawatn nu Zoo Taiping.
example_en: The day after tomorrow we will visit Taiping Zoo.
example_ms: Lusa nanti kami akan ada lawatan ke Zoo Taoping.

definition_en: tin, can, a metal vessel for liquids
definition_ms: tin, bekas yang dibuat daripada logam
example_semai: Apak eng kijual ten manah nu kedai besi.
example_en: My dad sells old cans to the metal recycling shop.
example_ms: Ayah saya menjual tin lama ke kedai besi (terpakai).

example_semai: Kengwat kitendang lei begut pintu.
example_en: He kicked the door so hard that he broke it.
example_ms: Kuat betul dia sepak sampai patah pintu.

definition_en: older sibling; older brother or sister
definition_ms: saudara kandung yang lebih tua dari diri sendiri
example_semai: Muh tenek kendor eng Wak Rika, mu tenek keral eng Baj Jesi.
example_en: My older sister's name is Wak Rika, and my older brother's name is Bah Jesi.
example_ms: Nama kakak saya Wak Rika, nama abang saya Bah Jesi.

example_semai: Mai selalo naisangka Bah Sam ru Bah Def ajeh mai kileeq, padehal ubai ajeh tenek-menang, pek mai kilek.
example_en: People always assume that Bah Sam and Bah Def are strangers to each other, but the truth is that they are siblings, not strangers.
example_ms: Orang selalu menyangka (bahawa) Bah Sam dan Bah Def itu orang lain (yang tidak mempunyai perkaitan darah), padahal mereka itu adik-beradik, bukannya orang lain.

definition_en: classifier for a complete day (with Semai number one, two and three)
definition_ms: bagi hari yang lengkap (bagi satu, dua dan tiga dalam Bahasa Semai)
example_semai: Bah Rilan ru ikenah ubai melancong seminggu nu Amerika. Ubai baigei nutenem ku New York, niq tenem ku Dallas, nar tenem ku Virgina, ru nar tenem nij ku Las Vegas. Sepanjang tujoh arik ubai ku peteh, ubai betol-betol bairiag baiha-chak ha canak!
example_en: Bah Rinlan and his wife went for a holiday to the US. They spent one day at New York, three days at Dallas, two days in Virginia, and two more days at Las Vegas. For the seven days they were there, they really missed eating rice!
example_ms: Bah Rilan dan isterinya melancong seminggu ke Amerika. Sehari mereka tinggal di New York, tiga hari di Dallas, dua hari di Virgina, dan dua hari lagi di Las Vegas. Sepanjang tujuh hari mereka tinggal di situ, mereka betul-betul rindu mahu makan nasi!

definition_en: to be in the middle of (doing something)
example_semai: Bah Mat tengah kicakcak ru Bah Ron.
example_en: Bah Mat was eating with Bah Ron.
example_ms: Bah Mat sedang makan dengan Bah Ron.

example_semai: Tengah Bah Mat ru Bah Ron ubai cakcak, aleh-aleh mije caknak ubai ajeh kisarep.
example_en: While Bah Mat and Bah Ron were eating, suddenly their table collapsed.
example_ms: Ketika Bah Mat dan Bah Ron sedang makan, tiba-tiba meja makan mereka itu runtuh.

definition_en: copper mahseer, a type of freshwater fish
example_semai: Enjop eng kirendang kak tengas de kiberkep mase kitengroj pegelap cinek sebegei icaknak tengah ariik.
example_en: My grandmother is frying the copper mahseer that she caught this morning for her lunch.
example_ms: Nenek saya menggoreng ikan tengas yang dia dapat semasa memancing pagi tadi sebagai makanan tengah harinya.

definition_en: constipation; difficulty in emptying the bowels
example_semai: Wak Sal birok ya iamek medei ikenon kitengat ya nar tenem pek kicacoh tapi lekat pek kien nu klinik.
example_en: Wak Sak was scolded by her mother because her son had been constipated for two days and not able to defecate, but she still did not take him to the clinic.
example_ms: Wak Sal dimarahi oleh ibunya kerana anaknya sembelit sudah dua hari tidak membuang air besar, tapi masih tidak dia bawa (anaknya) ke klinik.

definition_en: to have a headache; painful in head
example_semai: Amek jop eng kidakdak taleh medei tengau ikui.
example_en: My grandmother is just laying down because she has headache.
example_ms: Nenek saya baring sahaja kerana kepalanya sakit.

example_semai: Tengileng hunen ya gumakin kaha-pupus medei jeoi mai naimuru naiha-jual naiha-berkep ha duet.
example_en: Pangolins are already almost extinct because there are a lot of people hunting them, to sell them for money.
example_ms: Tenggiling sekarang sudah semakin hampir pupus kerana ramai orang memburunya untuk dijual bagi mendapatkan wang.

definition_en: to sin; to do something that violates the beliefs or beliefs of a community
definition_ms: berdosa, melakukan kesalahan; melakukan sesuatu perkara yang melanggar adat kepercayaan atau kefahaman sesuatu kefahaman masyarakat
example_semai: Mai hik naipecaya amen pek hicerengai bengwal mai engrak, hik doh hitenghak. Icuntoh, hikep senusah ru nehajap medei pek hicerengai bengwal mai engrak.
example_en: Orang Asli believe that if someone does not obey his parents, he is sinning. For example, he will have difficulties and be poor because he does not listen to his parents.
example_ms: Orang Asli mempercayai (bahawa) jika kita tidak mendengar kata-kata orang tua, kita akan mendapat dosa. Contohnya (adalah seperti), mendapat kesusahan dan kemiskinan kerana tidak mendengar kata-kata orang tua.

example_semai: Wa Ana kitenghen ma iamek kibual.
example_en: Wa Ana hears what her mother says.
example_ms: Wa Ana mendengar apa yang maknya cakap.

example_semai: "Mongka betar ku ilemok?" "Ya tengheng bisij."
example_en: "Are there petai beans on the tree?" "It's already gone, being stolen."
example_ms: "Adakah petai di atas pokok?" "Sudah habis dicuri."

definition_en: spell; incantation; words or sounds uttered as a magic spell
example_semai: Halak kiguna tengher kiperyep nyaknik mai nyaknyik.
example_en: The witch-doctor used a spell to heal the sick person's disease.
example_ms: Bomoh menggunakan jampi untuk menyembuhkan penyakit pesakitnya.

definition_en: to borrow goods or equipment belonging to others with or without permission, even if one already has those goods or equipment
definition_ms: pinjam, menggunakan barangan atau peralatan milik orang lain dengan izin atau sebaliknya, walaupun sudah mempunyai barang atau peralatan tersebut
example_semai: Bah Man kigemar betengkar ha hak mai padehal hak ilei pen mong.
example_en: Bah Man likes to borrow other's things, even though he also has his own.
example_ms: Bah Man suka menggunakan barang orang lain walaupun dia ada memiliki barang tersebut.

definition_ms: memakai pakaian yang tidak sesuai saiz
example_semai: Amek Wa Ngah kicerite ha kenon menaleh de kitengkar ha ibaju hamapen ibaju ajeh it.
example_en: Wah Ngah's mother told us about her daughter who wore clothes that did not fit her, even though her clothes were tight.
example_ms: Ibu Wah Ngah mencerita mengenai anak perempuan yang memakai bajunya yang tidak sesuai dengan saiznya walaupun bajunya itu sempit.

example_semai: Penganten keral kilog tengkulok ku ikui mase kibesandéng.
example_en: The bridegroom wore a headdress during the sitting-in-state ceremony.
example_ms: Pengantin lelaki itu memakai tengkolok di kepalanya semasa bersanding.

definition_en: visitor;  people who come to visit the home; people who are invited to attend a ceremony
definition_ms: tetamu; orang yang datang melawat ke rumah; orang yang dijemput untuk hadir ke dalam sesuatu majlis
example_semai: Amek eng ru tetenek kerdor eng sibok naibrenchet ku dengwal medei naiha-jamu tengloh, kekawat apak de naihol ju Pahang.
example_en: My mother and my sisters are busy cooking in the kitchen because they want to prepare food for the visitors, who are my father's friends from Pahang.
example_ms: Ibu dan kakak-kakak saya sibuk memasak di dapur kerana mereka mahu menjamu tetamu, (iaitu) kawan-kawan bapa (saya) yang datang dari Pahang.

definition_en: pipe; something (bamboo, pvc, cement, etc.) used to channel water flow
definition_ms: paip; sesuatu (belahan buluh, paip pvc, dsb.) yang digunakan untuk melancarkan aliran air
example_semai: Ku jaman manah entem, mase pekseg lekat mong teu pili, mai hik naiguna tenglor awat naisambung teu nu deng teu.
example_en: Long ago, before pipe water was introduced, the Orang Asli used bamboo pipes to channel water to the bathroom.
example_ms: Pada zaman dahulu, semasa belum ada air paip, Orang Asli menggunakan paip buluh (bagi) menyambungkan air ku bilik air.

definition_en: to have a headache; painful in head
example_semai: Apak Wak Mar kihol nu madeg jik, kisemanj penglaay medei tengor ikui kena ya manik mase kijog ju kerjak cinek.
example_en: Wak Mar's father came to our house to ask for medicine for his headache, because he had been caught in the rain on the way home from work earlier.
example_ms: Bapa kepada Wak Mar datang ke rumah kami, meminta ubat kerana kepalanya sakit kerana ditimpa hujan semasa pulang dari kerja tadi.

definition_en: water flowing through a bamboo channel or from a pipe; spring water
definition_ms: pancuran air; air yang disalurkan dengan menggunakan buluh
example_semai: Entem jik jiguna teu tengrol sebelum mong teu pili.
example_en: Formerly we used spring water that was channeled through bamboo pipes before we had tap water.
example_ms: Dahulu kami menggunakan air pancur yang disalurkan oleh buluh sebelum adanya air pili.

definition_en: hornet living in the holes of trees.
definition_ms: tebuan yang tingggal di dalam lubang-lubang pokok
example_semai: Tengkeg naibeh deg ku keneng sempak.
example_en: Hornets make their nest in durian trees.
example_ms: Tebuan membuat sarang di pokok durian.

example_semai: Menang eng kibakek nuikor tengwak ku kateh lungkang.
example_en: My brother saw a 'tin' snake in the ditch.
example_ms: Adik saya ternampak seekor ular timah di dalam longkang.

definition_en: gauge, an instrument used to measure
definition_ms: tolok ukuran, sejenis alatan yang digunakan untuk mengukur

example_semai: Iarik pek tentu, entah kiku-manik gikdoh.
example_en: The weather is not certain, maybe it will rain.
example_ms: Cuaca tak menentu entah-entah nanti hujan.

example_semai: Bor tenulis Wak Intan, buleh hipaham amen hibaca.
example_en: Wak Intan's handwriting is beautiful, we can easily understand if we read it.
example_ms: Cantik tulisan Wak Intan, boleh difahami jika dibaca.

example_semai: Jak eng kiteop bejehuk ha ngeknut teh dui adeh.
example_en: My mother-in-law boiled cassava for afternoon tea.
example_ms: Mak mertua saya merebus ubi kayu bagi minum petang.

definition_en: a type of weaving that uses the polished bar sticks to be used for a home wall, etc.
definition_ms: sejenis anyaman yang menggunakan bilah-bilah batang bertam yang sudah diraut untuk dijadikan dinding rumah dsb.
example_semai: Hunen ya susah hiha-neng deg de idinig ju tepas. Ku kampug jik, had deg atok eng taleh de idinig deg ya tepas. Deg mabek kilek amen pek ya awat atao papat, mesti ya simen.
example_en: Nowadays it is hard to see a house with a tepas wall. In our village, only the wall of my grandfather's house is made from tepas. Other houses, if the walls are not bamboo or wood, must be made of cement.
example_ms: Sekarang sudah susah untuk kita lihat rumah yang dindingnya dari tepas. Di kampung kami, cuma rumah datuk saya sahaja yang dindingnya dari tepas. Rumah yang lain jika tidak dari buluh atau papan, mesti dari simen.

definition_en: a type of medicine, medicinal powder made from rice and pandan leaves that have been ground
definition_ms: sejenis ubat; tepung yang dicampur bersama dengan daun pandan dan seterusnya digiling untuk dijadikan ubat-ubatan dalam perawatan tradisional masyarakat Orang Asli

example_semai: Dij mai enai tepok teg telas Perdana Menteri dij kiberucap.
example_en: All the people clapped their hands after the Prime Minister finished speaking.
example_ms: Semua orang menepuk tangan selepas Perdana Menteri habis berucap.

definition_en: to be scratched, to be cut or to bleed on the limbs as a result of shifting something
definition_ms: calar, luka atau berdarah pada anggota tubuh badan akibat bergesel dengan sesuatu
example_semai: Ter ijog kena ya timbok medei kiyog ju mutu mase kijog ju ikerjak.
example_en: His foot was scratched on the road because he fell from his motorcycle on the way home from work.
example_ms: Kakinya calar terkena jalan raya kerana dia jatuh dari motor semasa pulang dari kerja.

definition_ms: kawasan tanah rendah (di kaki bukit atau di kaki gunung)
trak; sejenis kenderaan dagang yang beroda empat
example_semai: Bah Renan biangkot ya terak Pulis nu jel medei kitelibat ru lumbe haram.
example_en: Bah Renan was transferred to the jail by a police truck because he was involved with illegal motorcycle racing.
example_ms: Bah Renan diangkut oleh trak Polis ke penjara kerana dia terlibat dengan lumba haram.

definition_ms: sejenis ikan sungai, dikenali juga dengan nama ikan sisik tenang dan dengan belakangnya ada satu titik berwarna hitam
example_semai: Mase jibejala kak cinek, jik jeoi jikep kak teramis.
example_en: We caught a lot of teramis fish when we were fishing with a net.
example_ms: Semasa kami menjala tadi, kami mendapat banyak ikan teramis.

definition_ms: terang; jelas; tidak kabur; sinar atau cahaya yang membolehkan sesuatu dilihat dengan mata kasar
example_semai: Mase jarjog ju mesyuarat kampug cinek, jar Wak Kalsom jaryog ju mutu medei ilampu mutu walah pek terang. Pek kibakek lubang ku semakdek nong.
example_en: On the way home from the village meeting, Wak Kalsom and I fell from the motorcycle because her motorcycle light was not bright enough. She did not see the hole in the middle of the road.
example_ms: Semasa kami pulang dari mesyuarat kampung, saya dan Wak Kalsom jatuh dari motosikal kerana lampu motosikalnya tidak terang. Dia tidak nampak lubang (yang ada) di tengah-tengah jalanraya.

example_semai: Nong nu Cameron Highland bingkang-bingkok ru jeoi terap. Ya jeoi kerite de eksiden naiyog ku kateh terap ku nong ajeh.
example_en: The road to Cameron Highlands is a windy road with lots of ravines. Lots of cars have accidentally fallen into the ravine (at the side) of that road.
example_ms: Jalan ke Cameron Highland (adalah) bengkang-bengkok dan banyak gaung. Sudah banyak kereta yang kemalangan jatuh ke dalam gaung di jalan tersebut.

definition_en: lotus, a type of water plant that grows in lakes
definition_ms: teratai, sejenis tumbuhan air yang tumbuh di dalam tasik
example_semai: Mase cuti sekulah padeh jeh, jik nuperingak jirahroh nu Taiping. Mong jicekcip nu Tasik Taiping ru jineng mong jeoi teratei ku tasek ajeh.
example_en: During the recent school holiday, our whole family went to Taiping for a holiday. We went to Taiping Lake and saw that there were a lot of lotus plants on that lake.
example_ms: Semasa cuti sekolah tempoh hari, kami sekeluarga berjalan-jalan ke Taiping. Kami ada pergi ke Tasik Taiping dan melihat ada banyak teratai di tasik tersebut.

definition_ms: anak sungai, sungai kecil; tali air
example_semai: Mase jisanget, jik selalo jirengrop kenon kak ku teu terayel.
example_en: When we were kids, we always went to catch fish by hand at the stream.
example_ms: Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, kami selalu menangkap anak ikan di anak sungai.

definition_en: to put somebody on a ride (horse, chariot, car, etc)
to approach; to come across, to encounter; to meet
example_semai: Eng doh ngterbuk Encik Hamdan pukul 11 pegelap ku ipejabat.
example_en: I will meet Mr. Hamdan at 11 a.m. at his office.
example_ms: Saya akan berjumpa Encik Hamdan pada jam 11 pagi di pejabatnya.

definition_en: a type of fish; bonylip barb; hard-lipped barb; silver sharkminnow
definition_ms: ikan terbul; sejenis ikan air tawar
example_semai: Jik jeoi jikep kak terbul mase jibejala kelemnek.
example_en: We caught a lot of bonylip barbs when we were fishing with nets yesterday.
example_ms: Kami banyak mendapat ikan terbul semasa menjala ikan semalam.

definition_en: to be affected by a disease, catastrophe, disaster for violating a taboo or belief (with respect to some supernatural event or something mystical)
definition_ms: terkena sesuatu penyakit, malapetaka, bencana kerana melanggar sesuatu pantang larang atau kepercayaan (berkenaan dengan alam ghaib atau sesuatu yang mistik)

definition_en: another wife of a woman's husband in polygamous marriage
definition_ms: isteri yang lain kepada suami sendiri dalam perkahwinan poligami
example_semai: Wah Limah ajeh tereg Wak Kuni. Gensir ubai ajeh Bah Sabit.
example_en: Wak Limah is another wife of Wak Kuni's husband. Their husband is Bah Sabit.
example_ms: Wah Limah itu isteri yang lain kepada suami Wak Kuni. Suami mereka itu namanya Bah Sabit.

definition_en: when the first wife calls another wife of her own husband
definition_ms: panggilan isteri yang lain kepada suami sendiri untuk isteri yang pertama

example_semai: Bah Ket sedeh kirasa medei ikerjak sekulah Matematik ajeh ihad susah. Bok hentok de buleh betulog kiseryap ikerjak sekulah medei rimnar iapak ru iamek pek ubai besekulah entem.
example_en: Bah Ket was sad because his maths homework was very hard. Nobody could help him because neither of his parents had ever been to school.
example_ms: Bah Ket merasa sedik kerana kerja sekolah Matematiknya sangat susah. Tiada siapa yang mampu menolong dia menyiapkan kerja sekolahnya tersebut kerana kedua-dua ibu bapanya tidak besekolah dahulu.

definition_en: to free, to liberate, to release
disaster; catastrophe; something that happens to a person or a place as a result of violating the custom of belief or in violation of the law of a god or sprite, etc.
definition_ms: bencana; malapetaka; hal atau perkara yang menimpa seseorang atau sesuatu tempat akibat melanggar adat kepercayaan atau melawan hukum tuhan, dewa dsbnya
example_semai: Mai hik naipecaya, amen hidajal ha binatag doh mest hikena terlaj. Bibalas ya jenang bahneh enai ajeh ru pes jear, atao beag, atao garaj.
example_en: Orang Asli people believe that if we torture animals, we will be repaid with natural disasters. God will pay back their actions with violent storms or floods or land slides.
example_ms: Orang Asli percaya (bahawa) jika kita mendera binatang, nanti kita akan kena (balasan) malapetaka. Dibalas oleh tuhan perbuatan mereka itu dengan ribut petir, atau banjir, atau tanah runtuh.

definition_en: hothead; a person who gets mad easily
example_semai: Bah Rajot terlampau bernos pek kikira ru sanget pen kaha-belal juga.
example_en: Bah Rajot is a hotheaded, even with kids he will be angry too.
example_ms: Bah Rajot seorang yang pemarah, dia tidak mengira dengan kanak-kanak pun dia (akan) marah juga.

definition_en: to let go; to free; to release
example_semai: Amin kiterlas cerek de kibela sejak cenek ajeh pai kiyos.
example_en: Amin set free the squirrel that he had raised from birth.
example_ms: Amin membebaskan tupai yang dibelanya sejak tupai tersebut baru lahir.

definition_en: to show off; to tend to demonstrate superiority
definition_ms: menunjuk-nunjuk; suka memperlihatkan kelebihan yang ada pada diri
example_semai: Bah Zul numom neterloh, terutame ikerjak kek pek memerip ajeh.
example_en: Bah Zul is a person who shows off himself, especially his job which isn't very important.
example_ms: Bah Zul seorang yang suka menunjuk-nunjuk, terutamanya jawatannya yang tidak seberapa itu.

definition_en: to possess in a shamanic trance (evil spirits)
example_semai: Bah Sani bien nu halak medei ilei biterloh ya nyanik mase kimamuh ku teu talag ku kampug englag.
example_en: Bah Sani was brought to the shaman because he had been possesed by a ghost when he was bathing at the waterfall in the neighbouring village.
example_ms: Bah Sani dibawa ke tok bomoh kerana dia dirasuki oleh hantu ketika mandi di air terjun di kampung sebelah.

definition_ms: menjodohkan; mengahwinkan; menyatukan sebagai pasangan suami isteri
example_semai: Tenek eng bitermuk ru litau mai Bidor.
example_en: My older sister is married to a young man from Bidor.
example_ms: Kakak saya dijodohkan dengan pemuda dari Bidor.

definition_en: to combine firewood with charcoal to make a stronger flame
definition_ms: menyatukan kayu api yang mempunyai bara supaya dapat menyalakan api yang lebih besar
example_semai: Bah Uda kitermuk jehuuq os ajeh dea sej de kisalei gij kicet.
example_en: Bah Uda put charcoal on the firewood so that the meat that he was roasting would be cooked faster.
example_ms: Bah Uda menyatukan bara pada kayu api supaya daging yang di salainya cepat masak.

definition_en: to point a finger in direction or at an object
definition_ms: mengacukan jari; menunjukkan jari pada sesuatu arah atau objek
example_semai: Sanget ajeh kijinjap sambil kiteryol nu itenek de beusek ha kek.
example_en: The child was crying while pointing her finger at her older brother who was teasing her.
example_ms: Budak itu menangis sambil mengacukan jari kepada abangnya yang mengusiknya.

definition_en: to show; to display; to reveal
example_semai: Tenek eng kiteryol senalah eng de ngcereh pingat kaca ku amek jik.
example_en: My older brother exposed to our mother my misdemeanour of breaking a glass dish.
example_ms: Abang saya mendedahkan kesalahan saya yang memecahkan pinggan kaca kepada ibu kami.

definition_ms: mengacukan jari; menunjukkan jari pada sesuatu arah atau objek

example_semai: Amek eng jeoi kicet keneng terog dea pek payah selalo jibeli sayo.
example_en: My mother plants many aubergine bushes so that we never need to buy vegetables.
example_ms: Ibu saya ada menanam banyak pokok terung supaya kami tidak perlu selalu membeli sayur.

definition_ms: terung pipit; sejenis terung kecil dan hijau yang boleh dijadikan makanan
example_semai: Bor amen himasak terog belade ru kak mileh ru lada.
example_en: Turkey berry is good when it is cooked with anchovies and chili.
example_ms: Terung pipit sedap jika dimasak dengan ikan bilis dan cili.

definition_en: a type of green eggplant which is small and short
definition_ms: sejenis terung kecil dan panjangnya lebih kurang dalam  5cm warnanya hijau campur putih sedikit
example_semai: Eng pek buleh ngcak terog telunjok madei doh deras behej berog-ng.
example_en: I cannot eat small eggplant because my body will itch if I do.
example_ms: Saya tidak boleh memakan terung telunjuk kerana badan saya akan gatal-gatal (jika saya memakannya).

definition_en: to go fishing; to catch fish with a line and hook
example_semai: Amen mong mase lapang, eng nggemar teroj kak.
example_en: If I have free time, I like to go fishing.
example_ms: Jika ada masa lapang, saya suka memancing ikan.

example_semai: Apak kibedil becog pek terok ku ikui, tapi kena ku ijog.
example_en: Father shot the mousedeer, not right on target in the head, but rather it was shot in the foot.
example_ms: Ayah menembak kancil tidak tepat pada kepalanya, tetapi terkena pada kakinya.

example_semai: Nyaknik apak Bah Sam ya guterok, ilei ya bipermuj nu kateh wat.
example_en: The illness of Bah Sam's father is getting more and more serious, he has already been admitted to the ward.
example_ms: Penyakit bapa Bah Sam sudah semakin teruk, dia sudah dimasukkan ke dalam wad.

example_semai: Kenun Bah Ram bipermuj nu kateh wat madei terok ya nyaknik denggi.
example_en: Bah Ram's child was admitted to the ward because he was affected by dengue.
example_ms: Anak Bah Ram dimasukkan ke dalam wad kerana ditimpa penyakit denggi.

definition_en: continuously; nonstop; with no delay; with no stops
definition_ms: terus; lantas; tidak berhenti; tidak bertangguh; tidak singgah di mana-mana lansung
example_semai: Bile ngtanya nu sengoi ku tepi nong chinek, ku belok deg Bah Sani, kiberlag begei adeh, "Cip teros, agok belok. Hacip tegak taleh, inong ku ke depan atah doh baru habakek simpang nu deg Bah Sani."
example_en: When I asked someone at the side of the road about the direction to Bah Sani's house, he said, "Keep going straight, do not turn. Keep going straight and the road (to his house) will be in front of you, only then will you see the junction to Bah Sani's house."
example_ms: Bila saya tanya pada orang di tepi jalan tadi, di mana rumah Bah Sani, dia menjawab, "Jalan terus, jangan belok. Kamu jalan lurus sahaja, jalan (ke rumahnya) di depan atas sana nanti, barulah kamu akan lihat simpang ke rumah Bah Sani."

definition_en: to kindle; to ignite; to light (fire)
definition_ms: menyalakan (api); menjadikan kayu kering dibakar api; menyatukan (puntung kayu api yang masih berbara) dan menjadikan api supaya menjadi makin panas serta kuat nyalaannya
example_semai: Bah Raman kiteros os lei der medei kaha-rag kak.
example_en: Bah Raman lit the fire until it burned strongly because he wanted to roast the fish.
example_ms: Bah Raman menyalakan api sehingga hidup kerana dia mahu membakar ikan.

definition_en: to chase; to follow in a rush or immediately
definition_ms: mengekori dengan terburu-buru atau segera; mengejar; mengikuti
example_semai: Bah Amat Kiterug ambulan de engen iamek nu Hospital Ipoh medei kikol.
example_en: Bah Amat chased after the ambulance that carried his mother to Ipoh hospital because she had suddenly collapsed.
example_ms: Bah Amat mengejar ambulan yang membawa ibunya ke Hospital Ipoh kerana tiba-tiba dia tumbang.

definition_en: binoculars; an instrument for seeing things that are far away
definition_ms: teropong; alat untuk melihat benda yang jauh
example_semai: Mase ku kemil Bukit Bendera, hik buleh higuna terupong hiha-neng bandar Pulau Pinang.
example_en: While we were on top of Bendera Hill, we were able to use binoculars to see the whole island of Penang.
example_ms: Semasa di atas Bukit Bendera, kita boleh menggunakan teropong bagi melihat bandar Pulau Pinang.

definition_en: to cut with a knife or machete
definition_ms: potong; memotong dengan menggunakan pisau atau parang
example_semai: Bah Long kitet pog kiguna yoj teknet sej.
example_en: Bah Long cut the chicken using a meat cleaver.
example_ms: Bah Long memotong ayam menggunakan parang pemotong daging.

definition_en: to chop; to cut up; to slice
example_semai: Sebelom kimasak, tukang masak ajeh kitet sej pog ru kiseler kacag.
example_en: Before cooking, the chef cuts up the chicken and slices the long beans.
example_ms: Sebelum memasak, tukang masak itu mencincang daging ayam dan menghiris kacang.

definition_en: but (used to express things that are contrary)
example_semai: Kenon-kenon eng rajet naiet nu sekulah, tetapi naisegat bahbeh kerjak ku kateh deg.
example_en: My children are diligent at school, but they are lazy at doing housework.
example_ms: Anak-anak saya rajin pergi ke sekolah, tetapi mereka malas melakukan kerja-kerja rumah.

definition_en: at the end where it is possible to fall down; at the edge
definition_ms: di hujung yang berkemungkinan akan jatuh ke bawah
example_semai: Bah Rujew kisengoh hekhuj nu keneng betar medei kiheg gigei tetegel ku mol cag betar.
example_en: Bah Rujew is afraid to climb up the petai tree because he feels giddy sitting at the end of the petai tree branch.
example_ms: Bah Rujew takut memanjat pokok petai kerana dia gayat duduk di hujung pada hujung ranting (pokok) petai.

example_semai: Hik manusia kena hingut lapan gelas teu nuarik.
example_en: We humans should drink eight glasses of water a day.
example_ms: Kita (sebagai) manusia harus minum lapan gelas air sehari.

example_semai: Bile mong mase lapang, jik rimdij nuperingak jiet jitengroj nu tew ku belakang deg.
example_en: When we have free time, our entire family goes fishing at the river to the rear of our house.
example_ms: Bila ada masa yang lapang, kami sekeluarga semua pergi memancing ke sungai di belakang rumah.

example_semai: Wak Manja kingut teu anggor de kibeli ku kantin sekulah.
example_en: Wak Manja drinks grape juice that she buys at the school canteen.
example_ms: Wak Manja meminum air anggur yang dia beli di kantin sekolah.

example_semai: Bah Ikmal kigemar ngekngut ngeknut de sengij, jadi kek mesti kiletak teu batu ku ma-ma taleh ingeknut.
example_en: Bah Ikmal likes to drink cold drinks, so he adds ice to whatever he drinks.
example_ms: Bah Ikmal suka meminum minuman yang sejuk, jadi dia mesti meletakkan ais pada minumannya.

definition_en: water that has been brewed; cool water that has previously been heated
definition_ms: air yang sudah dijerang; air sejuk yang dimasak
example_semai: Amek kigap jeoi teu cet, kidandat ha majles hari jadi menang eng huper.
example_en: Mom is cooking a lot of boiled water, as preparation for my brother's birthday party tomorrow.
example_ms: Mak menjerang banyak air masak, persediaan bagi majlis hari jadi adik saya keesokan hari.

example_semai: Kibeh teu gule madei kaha-masak ais sirap.
example_en: She made syrup because she wanted to cook cold syrup drink.
example_ms: Dia buat air gula sebab dia nak masak ais sirap.

example_semai: Jok gikdoh hi muh teu latak.
example_en: Let's bathe at the waterfall later.
example_ms: Jom nanti kita mandi air terjun.

example_semai: Bah Duma jot iteu mat madei imat muj ya habok.
example_en: Bah Duma shed tears because dust had got in her eyes.
example_ms: Bah Duma menitiskan air mata kerana matanya dimasuki habuk.

example_semai: Bah Ket kipan-jap lei jot iteu moh madei kaha-joi i'apak nu kedei.
example_en: Bah Ket cried until he had a runny nose because he wanted to go with his father to the shop.
example_ms: Bah Ket menangis bersungguh-sungguh sehingga keluar air dari hidungnya kerana mahu mengikuti bapanya ke kedai.

example_semai: Tandas awam ku Malaysia selalojeh seeg ya ngoi teu nom medei ya sikap rakyat negare hik de pek naipeduli ha kebersehan tandas awam.
example_en: Public restrooms in Malaysia usually reek with the smell of urine because Malaysian citizens do not care about the cleanliness of their public toilets.
example_ms: Tandas awam di Malaysia selalunya berbau busuk dengan bau air kencing kerana sikap rakyat Malaysia yang tidak memperdulikan tentang kebersihan tandas awam.

example_semai: Tiap pegelap Bah Yus kikus awal madei kinyek lingah et nu kerjak.
example_en: Every morning Bah Yus wakes up early because he doesn't want to be late for work.
example_ms: Setiap pagi Bah Yus bangun awal kerana dia tak mahu lewat pergi kerja.

example_semai: Hujong minggu padeh jeh, jik nuperingak jirahroh nu Pulau Pinang. Mase ya jitiba nu majeh, kawat apak eng kien jik cakcak ku Gurney Plaza.
example_en: Last weekend, the whole family went to Penang for vacation. When we arrived there, my father's friend brought us to Gurney Plaza for dinner.
example_ms: (Pada) hujung minggu yang lalu, kami sekeluarga berjalan-jalan ke Pulau Pinang. Semasa kami sudah sampai di situ, kawan bapa saya membawa kami makan di Gurney Plaza.

definition_ms: penyakit batuk kering; penyakit paru-paru; tuberkulosis
example_semai: Entem mase jik lekat jisanget, selalo jicerengai mai naikena penyaket tibi. Tapi hunen, ya susah hiha-cerengai mong mai naikena penyaket ajeh.
example_en: When we were young, we often heard about people who suffered from tuberculosis. But now, it is rare to hear of anyone getting that disease.
example_ms: Dahulu, semasa kami masih kecil, kami sering mendengar (kisah) orang menghidapi penyakit batuk kering. Tetapi sekarang, agak sukar untuk mendengar ada orang yang menghidap penyakit tersebut.

definition_ms: tiga suku; sakit jiwa; gila; tidak siuman
tiang; batang kayu, besi dsbnya yang didirikan atau berdiri lurus menegak (tiang rumah, tiang kayu, tiang besi dll)
example_semai: Bah Sabit kikek memerip batag jehuk, kaha-beh itihag deg pai.
example_en: Bah Sabit is looking for several pieces of wood, because he wants to use them as poles for his new house.
example_ms: Bah Sabit mencari beberapa batang kayu, dia mahu jadikan tiang bagi rumah barunya.

example_semai: Tijik ajeh binatang de pek berjog. Kawat eng kiserel ha tijik ajeh.
example_en: A snake is an animal without legs. My friend feels disgust towards snakes.
example_ms: Ular adalah binatang yang tidak berkaki. Kawan saya merasa geli-geleman terhadap ular.

example_semai: Ku kasut menang eng mong cektat tik.
example_en: There is dirt on my younger brother's shoe.
example_ms: Terdapat tanah yang melekat pada kasut adik saya.

example_semai: Sempadan tik mai hik ru tik Gop bipisah ya teu lalek.
example_en: The boundary between the aboriginal people's area and the Malay area is a small river.
example_ms: Sempadan kawasan orang Asli dan kawasan orang Melayu dipisahkan oleh sebatang sungai yang kecil.

example_semai: Bah Sani kigeram medei hamapen ya memerip kali kisuj iteg, ngoi belacat ku iteg tik mong.
example_en: Bah Sani got angry because even though he had washed his hands several times, the smell of belacan still remained on them.
example_ms: Bah Sani geram kerana walaupun telah berberapa kali membasuh tangan, (tapi) bau belacan ditangannya masih ada.

example_semai: Nong nu kampug Bah Sadan ajeh tik ceher, jadi telas hijog ju kampug ajeh, kerite hik doh kijadi renanj, melekat ya tik ajeh.
example_en: The road to Bah Sadan's village is latrite, so after returning from that village, our car turns red, because the dirt sticks on it.
example_ms: Jalan ke kampung Bah Sadan adalah tanah merah, jadi selepas pulang dari kampung tersebut, kereta kita akan berwarna merah, (kerana) melekat oleh tanah tersebut.

example_semai: Eng tiktok ku padeg mase kawat-ng kitiba.
example_en: I was not present at the house when my friend arrived
example_ms: Saya tidak ada di rumah semasa kawan saya datang.

definition_ms: menjemur di bawah terik matahari; meletakkan sesuatu yang basah untuk mengeringkannya di bawah terik matahari
example_semai: Bak bitil canuk sebelom buleh biseh.
example_en: The rice paddy will be dried before it is pounded.
example_ms: Padi akan dijemur terlebih dahulu sebelum ditumbuk.

definition_ms: tilam; pengalas tidur yang diperbuat daripada kapas, kekabu atau bahan lembut untuk menampung posisi tubuh sewaktu tidur atau berbaring; lapik tempat tidur;
example_semai: Wak Diana kibeli tilam pai de lebeh entoi nij, madei pek liu nij kaha-begengsir.
example_en: Wak Diana has bought a new and bigger mattress because she is going to get married soon.
example_ms: Wak Diana membeli tilam baharu yang lebih besar, kerana tak lama lagi dia nak berkahwin.

definition_en: spinny eel; a type of freshwater fish
example_semai: Apak eng selalo kipasag bubu ku batag arik medei kaha-berkep kak tilat.
example_en: My father always puts traps in the river because he wants to catch spinny eels.
example_ms: Bapa saya selalu memasang bubu di sungai kerana ingin menangkap ikan tilan.

definition_en: to wrap or cover one's body with something
definition_ms: menyelimuti atau menutup tubuh badan dengan sesuatu
example_semai: Wak Mar kitilop abat mase kineng TV madei ha kisengij.
example_en: Wak Mar wrapped her body in a blanket while she watched TV because she felt cold.
example_ms: Wak Mar meyelimuti badannya dengan kain semasa menonton TV kerana merasa sejuk.

example_semai: Wak Maria kitimbang iberog ru inyahneh ya gumaken huj.
example_en: Wak Maria weighed herself and her weight had increased.
example_ms: Wak Maria menimbang badannya dan beratnya semakin naik.

example_semai: Mase cuti sekulah padeh jeh, jik mong jibeh lawatan nu Melaka. Ku pajeh jimelawat nu istane manah kote Melaka de rek beng timbok manah kote ajeh de tik gek taleh de mong hunen.
example_en: During the school holiday, we visited Melaka. There we visited the little that remains of the old palace of Melaka city near the old city wall.
example_ms: Semasa cuti sekoleh tempoh hari, kami ada mengadakan lawan ke Melaka. Di situ kami melawat istana lama kota Melaka yang hampir dengan tembok lama kota itu yang masih ada sedikit sahaja yang tinggal sekarang.

example_semai: Kebanyakkan kampug hik hunen ya mong nong timbok, tapi lekat mong juga kampug-kampug de ku pendalaman de pekseg lagi mong nong timbok bibeh ya kerajaan.
example_en: Most Orang Asli villages already have paved roads, but there are still villages in the rural area that  do not yet have paved roads built by the government.
example_ms: Kebanyakan kampung Orang Asli sudah ada jalan raya, tetapi masih ada juga kampung-kampung yang di pendalaman yang belum lagi ada jalanraya dibina oleh kerajaan.

example_semai: Mai naiurok ku batag arik kampug jik mong buaya, mong iarik doh kitimbol nu kemiil teu. Tapi eng pek ngpecaya medei pek pernah ngbakek.
example_en: People say that there is a crocodile in the river at our village, and that sometimes it will rise to the surface of the water. But, I do not believe it because I have never seen it.
example_ms: Orang berkata bahawa di sungai kampung kami terdapat buaya, ada masanya dia akan timbul ke permukaan air. Tapi saya tidak percaya kerana tidak pernah melihatnya.

definition_en: to hit; to fall on something
definition_ms: menimpa; tumbang atau jatuh atas sesuatu
example_semai: Kerite Bah Kudung bitimpak ya jehuk medei kelem jihnek pes kuat.
example_en: Bah Kudung's car was hit by a tree because it was stormy last night.
example_ms: Kereta Bah Kudung ditimpa oleh pokok kerana malam tadi ribut kuat.

definition_en: to emerge; to rise to the surface
definition_ms: timbul; naik ke permukaan (dari dalam air ke permukaan air); muncul atau naik ke atas dari dalam air
example_semai: Biasajeh, mai naiet naibejala kak ku idui medei mong jeoi kak naitimul.
example_en: Usually people will go fishing with cast nets during the evening because a lot of fish  appear at the surface during that time.
example_ms: Biasanya orang akan menjala ikan pada waktu petang kerana terdapat banyak ikan yang timbul.

example_semai: Tingkap adeh ifungsi dea buleh pinoi ru cahya mat arik kimuj nu kateh dek. Tapi amen iarik kimanik, tingkap bitutop dea pek kiperai ya manik.
example_en: The function of window is to let air and sunlight enter the house. But if it is raining, the windows will be closed so that the rain water will not spill inside.
example_ms: Fungsi tingkap adalah bagi membenarkan angin dan cahaya matahari masuk ke dalam rumah. Tetapi sekiranya hujan, tingkap ditutup supaya tidak tempias oleh hujan.

definition_en: to survey; to stretch out the neck to see; to look with head thrust forward
example_semai: Sebelom jibuka kebon pai, jik jitinyau itempat cahuk.
example_en: Before opening a new farm, we will survey the place first.
example_ms: Sebelum membuka kebun yang baharu, kami meninjau tempatnya dahulu.

definition_ms: tirai; langsir; sejenis kain yang digunakan untuk perhiasan pada tingkap, pintu dll
example_semai: Jap kali ku raya Krismas, Wak Seni mesti kiganti itirei deg de manah ru tirei de pai kibeli.
example_en: Every Christmas, Wak Seni replaces the old curtains at her house with new ones.
example_ms: Setiap kali perayaan Krismas, Wak Seni mesti menggantikan tirai rumahnya yang lama kepada tirai yang baharu dibeli.

definition_ms: meniru; mengikut sesuatu (perbuatan, pertuturan, gaya dsb.)
rasuk; roh setan iblis yang menguasai tubuh seseorang dan mengawal setiap

example_semai: Bah Firas bitirog ya nyanik de kikena ku itempat kerjak.
example_en: Bah Firas is possessed by a ghost at his work place.
example_ms: Bah Firas dirasuk oleh hantu yang dia kena di tempat kerjanya.

definition_en: a metal-tipped wooden spear used for catching fish or turtles
definition_ms: lembing yang ada mata dibuat daripada besi, diguna untuk menangkap ikan atau labi-labi dsbnya.
example_semai: Biasajeh, mai hik naiguna tirok bile naiha-kek peas.
example_en: Usually the Orang Asli use a spear when they are hunting for turtles.
example_ms: Biasanya Orang Asli menggunakan lembing semasa mencari labi-labi.

definition_en: to hunt somthing (turtle, fish, etc.) with a spear
definition_ms: menikam; mencari sesuatu (labi-labi, ikan, dll) dengan menggunakan lembing
example_semai: Apak eng kitirok peas.
example_en: My father is hunting turtles with a spear.
example_ms: Bapa saya mencari labi-labi dengan lembing.

example_semai: Biasajeh, jik jibeh hal lijiik memaseg ku kateh deg. Tapi amen mong cerite P. Ramlee ku tiwi, dikdij lijik mesti sama-sama jigei ku ngar tiwi.
example_en: Usually we will do our own thing at home. But if the P. Ramlee movie is being played on television, all of us will sit in front of it.
example_ms: Biasanya kami akan membuat hal masing-masing di dalam rumah. Tetapi jika ada cerita P. Ramlee di televisyen, kesemua kami mesti sama-sama duduk di hadapan televisyen.

definition_ms: membakar; mengenakan sesuatu pada api yang bernyala
example_semai: Tenek eng kitod selak sempak de ya sot telas kisapu laman deg.
example_en: My older sister burned dried durian leaves after she had swept the front yard.
example_ms: Kakak saya membakar daun durian yang telah kering setelah menyapu halaman rumah.

definition_en: toddy; palm wine; fermented alcoholic drink made from coconut juice
definition_ms: todi; sejenis minuman yang memabukkan; sejenis minuman yang diperbuat dari nira kelapa yang diperam untuk suatu jangka yang tertentu

example_semai: Tog mong jeoi ku pasu bunga amek eng medei naiha-cak ha selak bunga.
example_en: There are many snails in the my mother's flower pot because they want to eat the leaves of the flowers.
example_ms: Terdapat banyak siput pada pasu bunga ibu saya kerana mereka mahu makan daun bunga.

definition_en: to be blistered or scalded due to contact with hot objects
definition_ms: melecur atau melepuh akibat terkena benda yang panas
example_semai: Teg sanget ajeh kitog madei terok ya teu teh beket de saruk.
example_en: The boy's arm was scalded as a result of the spillage of hot tea.
example_ms: Tangan budak itu melecur kerana terkena tumpahan air teh yang panas.

definition_en: to knock; to hit with a palm or fist or with some object
definition_ms: ketuk; pukul; memukul dengan menggunakan tangan atau sebarang objek
example_semai: Mabek sanget naitog kok susu ajih lei celihut.
example_en: The children hit the milk tin until it was squashed.
example_ms: Kanak-kanak tersebut mengetuk tin susu itu sehingga kemik.

example_semai: Mase tengah kicakcak, Bah Rek kitoh caknak de mong ku kateh iempag medei kirasa begei mong paser.
example_en: While eating, Bah Rek spit out the food in his mouth because it tasted as if there was sand in it.
example_ms: Semasa sedang makan, Bah Rek meludah makanan yang ada di dalam mulutnya kerana merasa seperti ada pasir (pada makanannya).

example_semai: Amek eng ru tenek kerdor eng ubai toj tarog gale ha entek tengah hari adeh.
example_en: My mother and my older sister picked the taro shoots to make a dish for lunch today.
example_ms: Ibu saya dan kakak saya memetik pucuk ubi untuk dijadikan juadah makanan tengah hari ini.

definition_en: snail; a small animal that is soft and slow and has a spiral shell
definition_ms: siput; sejenis binatang kecil yang lembut dan bergerak perlahan serta mempunyai cengkerang yang berpilin
example_semai: Mong nar ikor tok kateh deg mahnuh jik.
example_en: There are two snails in our bathroom.
example_ms: Ada dua ekor siput dalam bilik air kami.

example_semai: Hamapen renis ubai ajeh rek-rek, tapi Bah Selan ru Bah Karat ajeh enyuk tok pek beradek.
example_en: Even though their faces are alike, Bah Selan and Bah Karat are not siblings.
example_ms: Walaupun muka mereka seiras, tetapi Bah Selan dan Bah Karat itu tidak bukannya adik-beradik.

definition_en: leader of a village in Orang Asli communities
definition_ms: ketua kampung atau ketua masyarakat orang asli di dalam sesebuah perkampungan
example_semai: Amen mong ma-ma hal ha kampug jik mesti jik terbuk tok batin.
example_en: If there are any matters concerning our village, we must meet the village head.
example_ms: Kalau ada apa-apa hal tentang kampung kami mesti berjumpa dengan ketua kampung.

example_semai: Tok ma, agok risau. Eng buleh ngtulog hek.
example_en: That's ok, don't worry. I can help you.
example_ms: Tidak apa, jangan risau. Saya boleh tolong kamu.

definition_ms: kalis air; sesuatu yang dapat menahan air dari memasuki atau membasahi
example_semai: Beg sekulah eng tok telap teu, jadi pek ngrisau amen manik madei bob sekulah eng mesti pek keaj.
example_en: My school bag is waterproof, so I don't have to worry if it is raining because my book won't get wet.
example_ms: Beg sekolah saya kalis air, jadi saya tak perlu risau jika hujan kerana buku saya tak akan basah.

example_semai: Tokong tempat mai Buddha naisembahyang ajeh entoi.
example_en: That temple where the Buddhists worship is big.
example_ms: Tokong tempat orang Buddha bersembahyang itu besar.

example_semai: Iarik ya pukol 8 pegelap, tapi Wak Geroi toksek lagi kicip nu ikerjak.
example_en: It is 8 o'clock in the morning, but Wak Geroi has not gone to work yet.
example_ms: Jam sudah pukol 8 pagi, tetapi Wak Geroi belum lagi pergi kerja.

definition_ms: belum lagi; masih tiada; masih tidak lagi
example_semai: Bah Selah kiyal bemain, toktik kibeh ikerjak sekulah hamapen ijam ya pukol 9 kelem.
example_en: Bah Selah is preoccupied playing and has not finished his homework yet, even though it is already 9 o'clock at night.
example_ms: Bah Selah khusyuk bermain (dan) belum lagi membuat kerja sekolahnya walaupun jam sudah pukul 9 malam.

example_semai: Ku Cameron Highland mong jeoi bicet tomato.
example_en: In the Cameron Highlands many tomatoes are grown..
example_ms: Di Cameron Highland banyak ditanam tomato.

definition_en: blanket; thick cloth used to cover the body while sleeping
definition_ms: selimut; gebar; kain tebal yang digunakan untuk menutup tubuh ketika tidur
example_semai: Kelemnek sengij iarik, nyampang eng mong abat tombelik.
example_en: Last night it was cold but fortunately I had a blanket.
example_ms: Malam tadi harinya sejuk, mujur saya ada kain selimut.

definition_en: a girl who enjoys tough activities traditionally associated with boys and wears clothes like boys
definition_ms: perempuan yang berkelakuan dan berpakaian seperti lelaki
example_semai: Wak Sila ajeh begei tomboy ru kigemar bekawat ru mabek keral.
example_en: Wak Sila is a tomboy and likes to be friends with males.
example_ms: Wak Sila seperti tomboi dan suka berkawan dengan lelaki.

definition_en: bin or big can to be filled with something
definition_ms: tong; tin atau kaleng yang besar untuk mengisi sesuatu
example_semai: Bah Sam silap kiterpej kertas resit nu kateh tong sampah.
example_en: Bah Sam mistakenly disposed of a receipt in the dust bin.
example_ms: Bah Sam tersilap membuang kertas resit ke dalam tong sampah.

definition_en: to stay quiet wihout making any sound
example_semai: Wak Sulah ru imenang keral top ubai kerakdik ju menain ubai telas ubai cerengai engrok engkuk.
example_en: Wak Sulah and her sister stayed quiet saying nothing and stopped playing after they heard the sound of thunder.
example_ms: Wak Sulah dan adiknya berdiam tidak bersuara dan berhenti dari bermain setelah mendengar bunyi kilat.

definition_en: to perch, to be on; to gather around; to be crowded around
definition_ms: hurung; berkumpul mengelilingi sesuatu; mengerumuni sesuatu secara banyak
example_semai: Hik hotleh selalo hitutop caknak, amen tok doh bitop ya roi.
example_en: We should always cover food, if not it will be surrounded by flies.
example_ms: Kita hendaklah selalu menutup makanan, jika tidak akan dihurungi oleh lalat.

definition_en: to receive; to get; to obtain
example_semai: Bah Meran kitrima hadiah pelajar cemerlang SPM ku peringkat lengrik Perak.
example_en: Bah Meran received an SPM student award of excellence in the state of Perak.
example_ms: Bah Meran menerima hadiah pelajar cemerlang SPM pada peringkat negeri Perak.

example_semai: Pek ngsangka Wak Maria kipanei bemain trompet medei ya biasa amen hineng mai naimain gita atao piano, tapi trompet pek pernah.
example_en: I did not suspect that Wak Maria knew how to play the trumpet, because although it is common to see people play the guitar or piano, we have never seen anyone play a trumpet.
example_ms: Saya tidak menyangka Wak Maria tahu memainkan terompet kerana sudah biasa jika kita melihat orang memainkan guitar atau piano, tetapi trompet kita tidak pernah melihatnya.

definition_en: to apply a hot or cold compress to the body (with water bottle, cloth, etc.)
definition_ms: tuam; menuam; menuami; menuamkan; menekan, melekap benda yang panas (botol, kain dll yang diisi atau dibasahkan dengan air panas atau sejuk) pada atau atas sesuatu (anggota tubuh badan)
example_semai: Amen nyik iket, ajok jik selalo kituam iket ajeh ya batu beket.
example_en: If she had a stomach ache, our grandmother would apply a hot compress to her stomach with a hot stone.
example_ms: Jika perutnya sakit, nenek kami selalu menuam perutnya itu dengan batu panas.

example_semai: Ajeh Tuan Rosli. Ileileh pemilek kilang adeh.
example_en: That is Mr. Rosli. He is the owner of this factory.
example_ms: Itu Tuan Rosli. Dialah pemilik kilang ini.

example_semai: Encik Lim ajeh tuan tik kampug jik adeh. Hamapen kampug jik adeh ku kemil tik sawet kek, ilei pek pernah kihalau jik ju kendeh.
example_en: Mr. Lim is the land owner of our village. Even though our village is located on his palm oil plantation, he has never asked us to move away from here.
example_ms: Encik Lim adalah pemilik tanah kampung kami ini. Walaupun kampung kami ini berada di atas tanah sawit beliau, (tetapi) dia tidak pernah menghalau kami dari sini.

example_semai: Ha entek jik tengah arik adeh, amek eng kiberchet kak kayu masak tucu.
example_en: As a dish for lunch today, my mother cooked tuna with fermented soybeen paste.
example_ms: Bagi juadah kami tengah hari ini, ibu saya memasak ikan kayu masak tauchu.

example_semai: Mase jiha-cip mamuh nu mateu, jik jikekjet medei jibakek tudeng kilintas ku semakdek nong.
example_en: On the way to swim in the river, we were shocked because we saw a porcupine crossing the pathway.
example_ms: Semasa dalam perjalanan kami mahu mandi ke sungai, kami terkejut kerana terjumpa dengan landak yang sedang melintas jalan.

definition_en: toddy; fermented alcoholic drink made from coconut juice
definition_ms: todi; sejenis minuman beralkohol yang diperbuat dari nira kelapa yang diperam untuk suatu jangka yang tertentu

example_semai: Amen amek eng kiet nu selai, kek kipakai tudog kui.
example_en: When my mother goes to the field, she wears a head covering.
example_ms: Jika ibu saya pergi ke kebun, dia akan memakai tudung kepala.

example_semai: Bak ajeh ya cukop imusem baha-tuei.
example_en: It is the right time for the paddy to be harvested.
example_ms: Padi tersebut sudah cukup masanya untuk dituai.

definition_ms: Tuhan; Pencipta, pemilik segala sesuatu ciptaan-Nya yang ada di langit, bumi dan di bawah bumi
example_semai: Hat Tuhan taleh de buleh betulog hik.
example_en: Only God can help us.
example_ms: Hanya Tuhan saja yang boleh menolong kita.

example_semai: Ku kateh peringak jik mong tujoh urag adek-beradek.
example_en: In our family there are seven siblings.
example_ms: Di dalam keluarga kami ada tujuh orang adik-beradik.

definition_en: to lead; to point at something; to direct at something
example_semai: Nong adeh kituju nu Slim River.
example_en: This road leads to Slim River.
example_ms: Jalan ini menuju ke Slim River.

definition_en: to suit; matched; equivalent; right; fit
definition_ms: sepadan; sama sepadan; sesuai; sesuai benar (pakaian, rupa paras, tingkahlaku)
example_semai: Care Wak Melah kikerna ipenakei baju tukoh ru ilei sebegei numom Guru Besar sekulah.
example_en: The way Wak Melah wears her clothes suits her as a headmistress of a school.
example_ms: Cara Wak Melah mengenakan pakaiannya bersesuaian degan dirinya sebagai seorang Guru Besar sekolah.

example_semai: Tukang masak ku kenduri caknak Wak Ria naitukok tujoh gantag nij canak, naidandat naisengoh doh pek cukop.
example_en: The cooks at Wak Ria's wedding feast added seven more bushels of rice as a precaution, because they worried that there would not be enough food.
example_ms: Tukang masak di kenduri perkahwinan Wak Ria menambah tujuh gantang lagi nasi, sebagai persediaan kerana risau (makanan) tidak akan mencukupi.

definition_ms: tukul; alat untuk mengetuk atau mencabut paku
example_semai: Bah Gerej kisip entah ku belok kidek tukol de kiguna kelemnek, hunen ya kaha-guna nij ya bepayah-payah hod kikakkek canuk ha itukol ajeh.
example_en: Bah Gerej has forgotten where he put the hammer that he used yesterday, now he will have to struggle to find that hammer before he can use it again.
example_ms: Bah Gerej lupa di mana dia meletakkan tukul yang dia gunakan semalam, sekarang harus bersusah-payah mencari dahulu tukul tersebut (sebelum) dapat menggunakannya lagi.

definition_en: a consequence or an accident caused as a result of disobeying elderly people or customs related to belief
definition_ms: tulah; bala atau kecelakaan akibat mengingkar larangan orang tua atau adat kepercayaan
example_semai: Maay hik naipecaya hik pek buleh hisebot muh mai engrak sebarang, amen lekat hibeh juga doh hikena tulah begei hieksiden.
example_en: The Orang Asli believe that we cannot mention the name of an elderly person carelessly; if someone continues to behave like that, he will certainly be afflicted with hardships such as an accident.
example_ms: Orang Asli mempercayai (bahawa) kita tidak boleh menyebut nama orang tua dengan sembarangan, jika masih berkelakuan sedemikian pasti akan ditimpa tulah seperti kemalangan.

example_semai: Bah Kisa kitulak imutu madei ya dij iminyak.
example_en: Bah Kisa pushed his motorcycle, because the petrol had run out.
example_ms: Bah Kisa menolak motorsikalnya kerana minyak motosikalnya itu sudah habis.

example_semai: Bah Remy mong jeoy itulan.
example_en: Bah Remy has a lot of friends.
example_ms: Bah Remy mempunyai ramai kawan.

example_semai: Bah Man kitules ipengalaman mase naibecuti nu Pulau Pangkor padehjeh ku kateh ibob catatan.
example_en: Bah Man wrote the experience when he was on vacation to Pangkor Island the other day on his journal.
example_ms: Bah Man menulis pengalamannya semasa bercuti ke Pulau Pangkor tempoh hari di dalam buku catatannya.

example_semai: Wak Sal ru Wak Senah ubai tulog Cekgu Azman en iarap nu kelas 5B.
example_en: Wak Sal and Wak Senah helped (Teacher) Mr. Azman carry his belongings to class 5B.
example_ms: Wak Sal dan Wak Senah membantu Cikgu Azman membawa barangnya ke kelas 5B.

definition_en: to cane; to box; to hit as action of striking with the knuckles
example_semai: Sanget ajeh bitumbok la ikawat sekulah lei selah imat. Rimnar liubai bien nu bilek Guru Besar.
example_en: The boy was punched by his classmate until his eye turned black. Both of them were sent to the principal's room.
example_ms: Budak itu ditumbuk oleh rakan sekolahnya sehingga matanya lebam. Kedua-dua mereka dibawa ke bilik Guru Besar.

definition_en: heel; the back part of a foot
definition_ms: tumit; bahagian tapak kaki yang belakang sekali
example_semai: Tenek kerdor eng kikerjak ku kedei caknak. Ilei nyik itumit jog ha bebilir kijinjeg.
example_en: My older sister works as a waitress at a restaurant. Her heels hurt because she is constantly standing.
example_ms: Kakak saya bekerja sebagai pelayan di restoran. Tumit kakinya sakit kerana sering berdiri.

definition_en: top of a tree or mountain; the highest part
definition_ms: puncak atau hujung pokok atau gunung ; bahagian yang paling atas
example_semai: Tumpog Lod Kinabalu buleh hibakek ju kennyak. Ihat ibernor amen hineng.
example_en: The top of Mount Kinabalu is visible from afar. It is a beautiful sight to see.
example_ms: Puncak Gunung Kinabalu boleh kelihatan dari jauh. Sangat cantik jika dipandang.

definition_en: fiancee; fiance; future husband or wife
example_semai: Tunang Wak Sali imuh Bah Jal. Ilei kikerjak sebegei aska ku Sungai Besi, Kuala Lumpur.
example_en: Wak Sali's fiance's name is Bah Jal. He works as a soldier at Sungai Besi, Kuala Lumpur.
example_ms: Tunang Wak Sali namanya Bah Jal. Dia bekerja sebagai askar di Sungai Besi, Kuala Lumpur.

example_semai: Sebelum jar bekenah-gengsir jarpiker jarha-betunang canuk.
example_en: Before we got married we thought we would get engaged first.
